name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5c328brhhkphquf6s28dj627cvc7s0q2e2agr8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg6eoj6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zon0smiqph5e9ajushtoq0rrp8efsdr0g4134a0g_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg6eoj6cdh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg31k67thak59oj8o8pn5fc1gbs7i0fepgh5h7t0_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg6eoj6cdh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zllb5vqcn9rinqbfhq1jrgnk7mi2m1bko09pp460_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj3cth69p3246h22sh2s8i6ep36cdg6eoj6cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztg2184q7jvchv5vv25baf0fl0e4dique3epuii8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg6eoj6cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zntv5tck7540np7nb7cl579m6jmbio75oogsnaco_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4cphm0pr2cphm49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1nl99u80cu804stvarrn6n4gtnsd39rvdmhupl8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg69o32cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze94nvnge0a9r56bjvgb1arohelu61mr9svcach8_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg69o32cph2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5icm0c1pnovobd37j8snr89ljl5n0glrtho15o_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg69o32cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kl4sdsf95apk7ubslkglmjhon34bburh4041vo_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg69o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32cdjm4p73c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6h3i68c2fvjtjmkkhd6oodmse3al0tuljlar88_rp22sh2s8i6ep36cdg69o32cph2bs)_

Columbia University students are calling for classes to become virtual and urging the administration to do more to assure public safety as anti-Israel protesters invade campus in a tent encampment. Columbia students Friday wrote in a letter that they do not feel safe as chaos descended upon the Ivy League campus. Anti-Israel protesters refuse to leave the "Gaza Solidarity'' tent encampment until the school meets their "demands" including divesting from companies that do business with the Jewish State.

Like many young married couples, Kansas residents Roy and Emily Schmeidler were excited to learn about Emily’s pregnancy, their first child. name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K2zAQh59GvsmMJdVyDj4EvIHC7raQQ49mVpo4E2RJWHJL376Ybu57nY_55s_v19v8hhw4Lu-40silzFuZI853DkH69JAFgyz7NitQRoKRCmbV-PGb6obb0NDY2U730FsFzX2E3nt_-jAa9YAf3lp_UuTcCS1YpW7Y8Hh4wCgAawZjWhwMob1pohM56gZhYM8eK7UcC3sqLqWcU-DKrrRpW5ow3mvNReizUBehLiG3x7LFY6CW_C7UxVPGra4Uq0w3-dhLZUfHFb_p79GkL8UJPUEHBt5BGfUK5-nH9PJyFarf6zqXtG-OhJ7ylkomVzkun2glz_sq9EQrcvgsOlwz8hKFnnx6PAf9RylWilXo6Xp-nX-e5ffrVT6f0Gyjz384BC69FQaWw9m6tDb1q1n8CwAA__8zP5GY) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K2zAQh59GvsmMJdVyDj4EvIHC7raQQ49mVpo4E2RJWHJL376Ybu57nY_55s_v19v8hhw4Lu-40silzFuZI853DkH69JAFgyz7NitQRoKRCmbV-PGb6obb0NDY2U730FsFzX2E3nt_-jAa9YAf3lp_UuTcCS1YpW7Y8Hh4wCgAawZjWhwMob1pohM56gZhYM8eK7UcC3sqLqWcU-DKrrRpW5ow3mvNReizUBehLiG3x7LFY6CW_C7UxVPGra4Uq0w3-dhLZUfHFb_p79GkL8UJPUEHBt5BGfUK5-nH9PJyFarf6zqXtG-OhJ7ylkomVzkun2glz_sq9EQrcvgsOlwz8hKFnnx6PAf9RylWilXo6Xp-nX-e5ffrVT6f0Gyjz384BC69FQaWw9m6tDb1q1n8CwAA__8zP5GY)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K2zAQh59GvsmMJdVyDj4EvIHC7raQQ49mVpo4E2RJWHJL376Ybu57nY_55s_v19v8hhw4Lu-40silzFuZI853DkH69JAFgyz7NitQRoKRCmbV-PGb6obb0NDY2U730FsFzX2E3nt_-jAa9YAf3lp_UuTcCS1YpW7Y8Hh4wCgAawZjWhwMob1pohM56gZhYM8eK7UcC3sqLqWcU-DKrrRpW5ow3mvNReizUBehLiG3x7LFY6CW_C7UxVPGra4Uq0w3-dhLZUfHFb_p79GkL8UJPUEHBt5BGfUK5-nH9PJyFarf6zqXtG-OhJ7ylkomVzkun2glz_sq9EQrcvgsOlwz8hKFnnx6PAf9RylWilXo6Xp-nX-e5ffrVT6f0Gyjz384BC69FQaWw9m6tDb1q1n8CwAA__8zP5GY)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Inside Scoop Politics

Federal Election law allows individuals to donate up to $6,600 per election cycle: $3,300 for the primary election and $3,300 for the general election. Couples may contribute up to $13,200 from a joint account and such contributions require both signatures. Federal multi-candidate PACs can contribute $10,000 per election cycle. Federal law requires us to obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. Contributions by corporations, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), labor unions, federal government contractors, and minors under the age of 18 are prohibited. Federal election law prohibits contributions from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organization or national bank, from any person contributing another's fund, from a federal government contractor or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

A CNN panel on Friday appeared happy about former President Donald
Trump’s possible discomfort in a New York courtroom, noting that the
setting differs from his usual extravagant surroundings. Trump is
currently on trial for 34 felony counts related to a $130,000 payment
to porn star Stormy Daniels for her silence about an alleged affair
during his 2016 campaign.

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT2PnDAQhn-N6bwaf6yBgiLSiY4U16S0BtuwTmyDbMPq_n2ENpv6upHedx7pmfk16Ql98Gn9idENOepcdI66ID0x0cVbWszjibPmwCUFSTlo2dhB9bztWOMG1jKhGKju3jwGyzqmwLaghLtbw7jt-lkYyYUSy9ybxg8XByQH6GQr4cYW0wHvXQtojb0LIiG7_ZiDN5gi_t6yr1-35GoThketeyHiB-Ej4SPm6k1w5VYi5oqluHozWyR8PDGtB2ZLz3IZuODr1zW_TK5tMR416rId2TgiPjL6FPGPy4SrKzAYd_RruqKIWi8YjDZbqi5VfWJavH2zXv1XRMTHvu16OYs2W9wxO_3EUP9jq8vxXwckMC5Rf070c6LvmzR5sPvTh-CLaomENaIPl1RTv_uavwEAAP__XoSZyA)

All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A_jZl2R0Uw5VUJf23lnfyA~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A_jZl2R0Uw5VUJf23lnfyA~~/AARclAA~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A_jZl2R0Uw5VUJf23lnfyA~~/AARclAA~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gkjvHet2D6M2B8ZCJ15tlg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoBhvQP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpmIVaBI2ZaG3B_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OhWtcPkIFJQF4uO_g2S6bA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoBhvQP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmIVaBI2ZaG3B_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~~ Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: ~~ The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ~~** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

# SATURDAY, APRIL 20, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1841, Edgar Allan Poe's story, "The Murders in the Rue Morgue" first appeared in Graham's Lady's and Gentleman's Magazine. The tale is generally considered to be the first detective story, and it served as partial inspiration for Sherlock Holmes and Batman. ([Read More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO8yAQBOCnwR0WrBeTFBR_4y5_e6VFYAl7IiEyXKy8_emsK6-drxjNfFzWi-fCj9t_fyfXU1196PyiFSUoCbjiEF0iApoGctrqadazmXDILpFKOtgZTaBwJgRrjTbJa6-u1ngzsAMFqBCUOpkZT6OCYEyEcA3qfAaPAhVF7nUbPys_eqZU3vVF2xjqfSgu9_5sYvonYBGw7Ps-Zm69bu8fF7D0zE1G_5b8kL8iYEm8tS4jdTqGyCOX3OTz61q4ZYrD5uJz51K4zVagut09l6Oz__nAdwAAAP__Rt5e4g)) Last week, we mentioned the glorious spring weather and all the barbecue thoughts it inspired. This week, we're thinking about our favorite vacation spots; in true Western spring fashion, snow has replaced our sunshine. Maui, the Florida Keys, and Puerto Vallarta all received votes, and all that happy vacation talk put us in the mood for a giveaway. At the end of next week, one _Flyover _reader who clicks a special contest link in each of next week's editions (Mon-Sat) will receive a $250 Visa gift card (use it for a flight if you'd like ✈️). Keep an eye out for it in Monday's edition! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbdEx_lsh8HDL0VMP107InM2cK2BiLip-vZV1bHZv-l77Yc-SpFtfolrDnXah8hVHnmgE8IJaSCdwpQzZqNzaHxjXOOsIb0E9szGWJe8izim5NkmjzC2tmnxwlFLQEACQoCLdXQ5A7K1CXlkaFuMpAhykrof57ddtrrkqXztj3yceV91CUutt7sy_xR2Cru_RGHXx1n4v2zvP8Z0WZlrun1KKXJ3XhHMa5Tya91HXZW5EugjPDe6Pg34DgAA__8HPlsi). ## Man Sets Himself on Fire Outside Trump Trial
Authorities have identified the man who set himself on fire outside a Manhattan courthouse Friday as [Max Azzarello](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwzAMBp9G3hjQtPw3aOiiLV07GopFxyxky5CUpMnTF-nc5Vs-4HC4r_N0dhJkv366jU1Z4uTmIneeNBAC6UlX3izMxE3Fpu7rpqu7ttHVarxvvG7JjwvrnvHiqO946LDVF8SZhkoMIWnUhDi0nR5OSHPbepovM44jOa00spcS0-k7yl5WXsIz3jmd5rhVwaylHFk1H4qsIrs_j5jL-1Jk32BFFt9Tj4rsLcPOj6zIbm6Hxxohc4HMYYG4wyKJId5KFs9Q0m07oCRxAcR7cBk29wPu9XKJQ4iKbJWMPx4SguSuVxqvm5PwZ1X-bfQbAAD__9kdZ0g), a self-described investigative researcher from Florida. According to reports, Azzarello entered the Collect Pond Park around 1:30 p.m., [opened a backpack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Lty4yAUgOGnQR0afLhILii2ofO2W2qO4WCx4eJBxBq_fSap0__FP9-_23bDlFN9_MVCdsS2oR_pRZviIDioTU3BRiIgOZG9LBdpLkZLNe12CSiMkRJ1iNfVBClioEg6alhxEWpKFgQooUCIVRu1zgK81gH83YvrFVAxJSik0fr8v6U6dor53V7UZ9_KlO0-xvNg8g8Dx8Cd5znXu690vlv_-E4YuErnwcDl5jEzcAUrP2gcfE_loBx5TJ346J_lyUdPmHnBuuMYWBk4LaVZV2Dgpm7D80w5p8MsTIlHwZR_LsavJl8BAAD__7EtYvs) full of pamphlets, and threw them around the park. He then poured a liquid accelerant on himself before setting himself on fire. The pamphlets included a link to a digital newsletter where [Azzarello published a manifesto](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQgOFfox0OLChaUHzNdfe1KZ09WXQTkBvkzuR-fSap07_FO8_bdb4iR97X_5jI1ZBnXCo_aTYCpAAzm9a7QASkW3LKKj2oodem3ZyV2g6LmtSkgp_QBrRGWd9bNWqDXrbsQIKRBqQc-8GMnYSl7z0st0VOE6BpjCTPNZfuPfNeNwrxKz-pdEtObXRbrfej0f8auDRwOc-z2-k8TqKPn6CBSyH0IuGnwNcLC8WYRcKdAx01C7zlRxWR163yvoqN00ExiMCFRC2PdBe1MEahxgn0MLbF-fvJMfIx2MbINSHH35H6J8t3AAAA__-9G2UP). He wrote that he set himself on fire outside the Trump trial to draw attention to various conspiracy theories involving Hollywood, cryptocurrency, COVID, and politics. First responders on the scene treated Azzarello and [transported him to a burn unit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1j4AXY8MHTxlq4dLQyP-FUYLCCx-vdVOnc76YaT7uu-3i1FSo9Pe6BpIa_WNXrhqjgIDmpVnTcBEVB2aIZpkOMwaqm63UyznyW4oIVUoGGUQdz0psU06AHC5jsyIEAJBULc9KhuvQCntQe3OTHPYBVTAj21XPrvTKntGOJPfmHpXT66aPbWzsrkB4OFwXJdV--2mvCqb89geSOD5cRSc-IVW-UVY-A58UAFeUJbuMvP0ngrz-PkrtBByUbeCtnIYOmK8edFMVIdJ6bE47AU_-rt3xe_AQAA__8MsGDg) at New York-Presbyterian Cornell Medical Center, where he remains in critical condition.
## Israel and Iran Downplay Missile Strike
U.S. officials confirmed Israeli forces carried out a [promised counter-strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GO6yAQheGnwZ2t8XiwSUFxG3e57ZYWgXEyuxgiQLH27VfZersjfcXR_3Hdrk6ipPt_d7Bte96cb_LijXqEHmmjLtidGXnq2I7LOM3jrCfqHhZ2NtoTLUaHhTwxGArTPjqNegJDnVgEJCAEMHomMwB6rQP6m4fLBR0pAg7Schk-s6T24D1-5xeXweeji_bR2rOq6Z_CVeF6nueQbj7xWd-ucH3PN-QSg8JVanEc-yiHNA59bUW-uPZSXOqLT26k5YK6KzY8T4lR6rwogvvhJP4etj_zfwIAAP__ImtbWQ) on Iran late Thursday, five days after hundreds of Iranian missiles and drones struck Israel. One report indicated bombs allegedly fell near a major Iranian air base and a nuclear site in central Iran. Both Iran and Israel [downplayed the report](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAQQH-N2Wwdx4HJwNAlW7p2tPg4EipsIhvF6r-v0rnre9KT3tdtuflSy3b_9Cu7ntviYy8vXmhEGJEWEsllZmQl2MlZKiONViQejsKsMMJ8kTqzlVllnzwYCwEg-CxFcQhIQAhgtSE7AUatE8YQ4XJBTwMBp9LbPn23svUH5_rTXrxPsa2iukfvz2NQHwNeB7ye5zmFEN9uwOvG5_GGba9pXEtKlUf2Rx-NtVoRoNhdep6l1nKYeSC4r77Uv3D_d_M3AAD__-5OUjU), signaling they were avoiding further escalation. Israeli officials remained mostly silent about the strike but [did say the attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuwzAMheGnsTcFNEXfBg1dsqVrR4OS6ISFbAeSkKBvX7hzx4OzfPi_bsuNNel-_-RNXF2PhUPVlyxkEAzSQm10qwiKbcV1Y2eHbugttQ_nZV6tZ7E9wDAKSRDfR0Kwc9dZmFp1CEhACDD1A00XwND3EYMPMM_I1BBI1Hrky_ehe33Imn6Ol-RLOLY2uUetz9LYjwavDV75ucu7nNc5ctWQpMGrZt6NlsySzKZRuFRTZS967MWQ6WZzIgyPIXgWFJyIPHuYZpmE7DgyUoy-zS4-35qSlmFsCO4ba_pz1H-r_AYAAP__g8VhOw) showed Iran that "Israel can attack its territory." During a speaking engagement on Friday, Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi [didn't reference the](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FurDAQheGnsTvQMB4DW7i4Dd3eNiUy9rA7iYGVbS3K20ekTnekrzj6P-7z3UuS_fHfb-zqesw-VHnzTA1CgzSTjm5lRjaaXTd0pu96a0g_HYXVLDdjbRyGhf0I_Tp2HSzGYLQxjFocAhIQAoy2p7EFDNZGDEuA2w09KQKOUo_cfh6y1yev6ft4c27DsenknrW-ijL_FE4Kp_M827CUnc9yucLpmgonKdlzaiT7vdmkFEnclJrliy_V2cXXKSlJ6QdF8Ni8pN-D-mfuTwAAAP__AzJWwQ) Israeli strike. Instead, he praised the Iranian bombardment of Israel.
## Russian Spies Arrested in Germany
German authorities arrested two individuals [believed to be Russian spies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOozAQxvGngc5oGBtICopr6HLtlWiwBzK3xka2E8Tbr7L1dp_0az79_z3mB4mXsP2lnceyxplskTfPRiEoNLOp3bgyI-uax3Zodd_2nTb1c3TUwUJu0GurubcwEC_IrYMOCBlsLSMCGjAIcOt6c2sAbdc5tIuF-x3JVAbYSYmp-R8llCev_opvTo2Ne-3HZylHrvSfCqcKp_M8m7DYwGf-eIXTZ34gJu8qnDZOO4VLUUqcS1bplbOQyselMi2x0Mbq8LGoV1a7eCmULpWlcFavr0QSWJE4lWyg1ty0bus0uuMU7yX3Q2Vg20n8z7fya6nvAAAA__-6FW0i) Thursday on suspicion they collected information on possible targets for attack, including U.S. military facilities. One suspect has been accused of several offenses, including [plotting an explosion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GO6yAQAL8GOlvLshC7oHhNurz2Soss64QTNpbNxbq_P-Xqa2ekkebjNt1iLnl9_I-LhDbXKXLLL5moQ-iQJtIpzCIoVkswF2O98c6SfoYxGkbv2SY2hh3NMMYERpxjYhi8zgEBCQgBBudp6AHZuYR8ZxhHjKQIJOVW9_6z5rU9ZS7f9SV7z3XRJTxb2w5l_ym8Krye59nf7_x2Cq-rnMcb1r2kTr72uknnh4GsI6P3kLYzl5IPf1EEjyXm8ttsfx7-BAAA__82SlBU), arson, and maintaining contact with Russian intelligence. The other is accused of helping to identify targets. The German foreign ministry has summoned the Russian ambassador. Reports indicate the two men sought [to undermine military support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL_GbEbmMBAGD13Y0rUjutgHudbYyDZB_H2Vzt2e9Jan93Wf78iew_qJG5myxBlt4RfNWoKSoGddObMQAbUVmWZo2r7pu1ZXT9Mpq2FoHwO2zUDOaXcjtEOz2N52oxorNqBAKw1K3bpe32oFtusc2IdV4wiohVbkuMRUf0cO5UmLv-KLUm3jVnnzLGXPov0QMAmYzvOs7SMHOvPbC5jeKGBaKW0YLpmOnBll3pmyPLLc2HPBdMnjJyEHkicmSXnnGHAlSUeKO8mAJQqYqmTcfrL3nPtBaLVuyP6vo_x75TcAAP__E7xmEw) and aid to Ukraine by Germany.

According to reports, Azzarello entered the Collect Pond Park around 1:30 p.m., full of pamphlets, and threw them around the park. He then poured a liquid accelerant on himself before setting himself on fire. The pamphlets included a link to a digital newsletter where . He wrote that he set himself on fire outside the Trump trial to draw attention to various conspiracy theories involving Hollywood, cryptocurrency, COVID, and politics. First responders on the scene treated Azzarello and at New York-Presbyterian Cornell Medical Center, where he remains in critical condition. One report indicated bombs allegedly fell near a major Iranian air base and a nuclear site in central Iran. Both Iran and Israel , signaling they were avoiding further escalation. Israeli officials remained mostly silent about the strike but showed Iran that "Israel can attack its territory." During a speaking engagement on Friday, Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi Israeli strike. Instead, he praised the Iranian bombardment of Israel. Russian Spies Arrested in Germany German authorities arrested two individuals Thursday on suspicion they collected information on possible targets for attack, including U.S. military facilities. One suspect has been accused of several offenses, including , arson, and maintaining contact with Russian intelligence. The other is accused of helping to identify targets. The German foreign ministry has summoned the Russian ambassador. Reports indicate the two men sought and aid to Ukraine by Germany. body:
Take Retirement Quiz

| | | | [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ypAHruhreBgbYgaE3PXiHQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
|
## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ypAHruhreBgbYgaE3PXiHQ~~/AARclAA~~~ "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/asv6PExp95DFo-uhKsDQ1A~~/AARclAA~~)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/asv6PExp95DFo-uhKsDQ1A~~/AARclAA~~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ypAHruhreBgbYgaE3PXiHQ~~/AARclAA~~~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fFO1XXYMDLqnKrufJoYMdw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ypAHruhreBgbYgaE3PXiHQ~~/AARclAA~~~ "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U_QNY59xQuvIIdY7xw1cDg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoBipYP0QqaHR0cHM6Ly9qb3IucG0tcmVzZWFyY2guY29tL2NvbnRlbnQvNy8zLzQ2VwNzcGNCCmYhHo8jZjC5H3NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U_QNY59xQuvIIdY7xw1cDg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoBipYP0QqaHR0cHM6Ly9qb3IucG0tcmVzZWFyY2guY29tL2NvbnRlbnQvNy8zLzQ2VwNzcGNCCmYhHo8jZjC5H3NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).

body:
See you Monday!
| | |
---
|
# CHESTERFIELD GOP
# MEETS THIS MONDAY
---
|
# NEW LEADERSHIP
---
|
---
| Please also consider following me on [Facebook at Amanda Chase Virginia Senator](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ps8PTnm87zDvDWxMR5kBgeiUPCDw0J31Rt3xkGvvLq6zDQTuVluPrs2X0tb2K73dAYYLQzkbQm8CcQLXDyPc8nedxeqQb7-yYkJ_Iepqnqlt6ZRZo6K9FnA4mO6Wc_wJMUn5YYWTywQbZFrfG1ff9RkkL6bTCnPQiHIaMIauznkmZHImxivpBrQVaUqnxOg859eGBamDEd4=&c=qbCRu5BM653akCjFYLfUtrAr6VAq1lZde3nApDBJj0bZTbZSlnpdgg==&ch=rP9Su8csZdLkdxrHxKNIgUn4y7oTlou3hDicvzrSP8Xrj1dC8FyUwA==) for my real time daily posts.
---
|
# IMPORTANT THAT YOU ATTEND
---
|
---
|
# NOTE FROM AMANDA CHASE
---
| Dear Chesterfield Friends & Supporters,
The Chesterfield GOP will meet for their first business meeting this coming Monday, April 22, under new leadership. It's so important that you attend and consider joining.
For the first time in over 15 years, the grassroots has taken over the Chesterfield GOP. The establishment is upset, to say the least. NOW is your chance. This coming Monday will be one of the most important business meetings of the year.
We want anyone who lives in Chesterfield and votes Republican to consider becoming an active member. Under new leadership, we are asking anyone who votes Republican and wants to make a difference to join us this coming Monday night. We need all hands on deck if we're county to turn our once red county red.
WE NEED YOU.
If you don't show up, the establishment can and will use parliamentary procedure to overtake the committee in which over 700 voters voted for fresh new leadership. Word is that they are going to try to dissolve the Chesterfield GOP because they don't want the grassroots in charge of the Chesterfield GOP. We have been losing local races under their leadership. They want to keep it small and keep it all. And they were the same GOP leaders who kicked me out of the Chesterfield GOP committee in 2019 as the Republican nominee for state senate and again several weeks ago when I attempted to vote for Chesterfield GOP leadership. Now's our chance to grow our Chesterfield GOP and create a red wave in Chesterfield like we've never seen before.
Do you live in Chesterfield County? Please come. Do you vote Republican? Please come. Do you want to make a difference in Chesterfield? Now's your chance
Word on the street is that the establishment leadership who was just overthrown is already plotting to overtake the committee like they did in Suffolk. We can't let this happen.
We need you to show up in overwhelming numbers on Monday to join the committee.
If you vote Republican but have never considered joining the Chesterfield County GOP, now is the time.
The Chesterfield Board of Supervisors is majority Democrat and we need to have a functioning committee that works to hard to return us back to a Republican majority.
Hope to see you Monday evening! In liberty,
---
|
---
| | [PLEASE DONATE HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ps8PTnm87zDvDWxMR5kBgeiUPCDw0J31Rt3xkGvvLq6zDQTuVluPrqwVeyp-W9Dz2ABG0Ph7HWrLf4BVxGGVeR7tWGkJ71hd3TjYd4tldXjal4qNyjFmybYbq2qhdlD8YlYW1HkF_gzek7se3E9H4Gh8_SL25EI8imK1WN00hZ4G0CNPsBTepA5OUx1MW7VQ_y4dmkTPBZWGBC0zQRPVARN6HEjJYE0x&c=qbCRu5BM653akCjFYLfUtrAr6VAq1lZde3nApDBJj0bZTbZSlnpdgg==&ch=rP9Su8csZdLkdxrHxKNIgUn4y7oTlou3hDicvzrSP8Xrj1dC8FyUwA==)

clean_body: See you Monday! | | | | CHESTERFIELD GOP MEETS THIS MONDAY | NEW LEADERSHIP | | Please also consider following me on == for my real time daily posts. | IMPORTANT THAT YOU ATTEND | | NOTE FROM AMANDA CHASE | Dear Chesterfield Friends & Supporters, The Chesterfield GOP will meet for their first business meeting this coming Monday, April 22, under new leadership. It's so important that you attend and consider joining. For the first time in over 15 years, the grassroots has taken over the Chesterfield GOP. The establishment is upset, to say the least. NOW is your chance. This coming Monday will be one of the most important business meetings of the year. We want anyone who lives in Chesterfield and votes Republican to consider becoming an active member. Under new leadership, we are asking anyone who votes Republican and wants to make a difference to join us this coming Monday night. We need all hands on deck if we're county to turn our once red county red. WE NEED YOU. If you don't show up, the establishment can and will use parliamentary procedure to overtake the committee in which over 700 voters voted for fresh new leadership. Word is that they are going to try to dissolve the Chesterfield GOP because they don't want the grassroots in charge of the Chesterfield GOP. We have been losing local races under their leadership. They want to keep it small and keep it all. And they were the same GOP leaders who kicked me out of the Chesterfield GOP committee in 2019 as the Republican nominee for state senate and again several weeks ago when I attempted to vote for Chesterfield GOP leadership. Now's our chance to grow our Chesterfield GOP and create a red wave in Chesterfield like we've never seen before. Do you live in Chesterfield County? Please come. Do you vote Republican? Please come. Do you want to make a difference in Chesterfield? Now's your chance Word on the street is that the establishment leadership who was just overthrown is already plotting to overtake the committee like they did in Suffolk. We can't let this happen. We need you to show up in overwhelming numbers on Monday to join the committee. If you vote Republican but have never considered joining the Chesterfield County GOP, now is the time. The Chesterfield Board of Supervisors is majority Democrat and we need to have a functioning committee that works to hard to return us back to a Republican majority. Hope to see you Monday evening! body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4f34bb5b9b7400693654dd2b319bf8b&_e=QBGmgpvwQhWY6dyaeQnzykdZP0qFUYEDisiGY2Hi_Z_uKZ72F4wHoJsrWHvjpZPwX79Lar1Bq5we1pOUfiMIJnaKDhFqGupopuGaGDANepk9MC1TDeF8eLGExr-bwroWixGbWgtXbtim4NG07wE5InfkXDGagOkMcDmr3hvBtSK1NR5vFdHJ5myFujpS5cYd2fPXz6AhX1bYV0PJ2XEaLU3U3YtLMr4_rvlLsq_OcrDLsfLRsZ51-juU-YKOmms7zU6CHxk46jNaqIqqxiBwXgk_AO-zSYbIIIynQoUPGwp2uDu1Y30RIZg9ycxtyjillKhuyHh0NKYx5kqwp38Lch7Ws4Juny3KWwNc_Uocees%3D)
---
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4f34bb5b9b7400693654dd2b319bf8b&_e=QBGmgpvwQhWY6dyaeQnzykdZP0qFUYEDisiGY2Hi_Z_uKZ72F4wHoJsrWHvjpZPwX79Lar1Bq5we1pOUfiMIJnaKDhFqGupopuGaGDANepk9MC1TDeF8eLGExr-bwroWixGbWgtXbtim4NG07wE5InfkXDGagOkMcDmr3hvBtSK1NR5vFdHJ5myFujpS5cYd2fPXz6AhX1bYV0PJ2XEaLcT0JYSZwTQlR1dDodkhXrstNrWyacNvOQsZ0jasUSOGLgXZCCY06EEjceMmWIjk3cd8sspuvoWNMkfpXf-baya1HKurG2gCPmKO3z7opw_Lrab3-PYbIF2_MpHGWO6X2MrHwMwnhNpmrkZ3exMnSKM%3D) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4f34bb5b9b7400693654dd2b319bf8b&_e=QBGmgpvwQhWY6dyaeQnzykdZP0qFUYEDisiGY2Hi_Z_uKZ72F4wHoJsrWHvjpZPwX79Lar1Bq5we1pOUfiMIJnaKDhFqGupopuGaGDANepk9MC1TDeF8eLGExr-bwroWixGbWgtXbtim4NG07wE5InfkXDGagOkMcDmr3hvBtSK1NR5vFdHJ5myFujpS5cYd2fPXz6AhX1bYV0PJ2XEaLVmd4UoVzP4oxLIvpvxX2hf6PEoQbF4yagBKckwjHcga84R8OysqKw-XA3lPkN1234sM3TfYOis3uOsv4Rxu9MRUNQPlqzugCtxltyY0aZFdMKdVD89C-xhmPX6_TyFarCdRgjXxnnGvEFXUF5F7fic%3D)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4f34bb5b9b7400693654dd2b319bf8b&_e=QBGmgpvwQhWY6dyaeQnzykdZP0qFUYEDisiGY2Hi_Z_uKZ72F4wHoJsrWHvjpZPwX79Lar1Bq5we1pOUfiMIJnaKDhFqGupopuGaGDANepk9MC1TDeF8eLGExr-bwroWixGbWgtXbtim4NG07wE5InfkXDGagOkMcDmr3hvBtSK1NR5vFdHJ5myFujpS5cYd2fPXz6AhX1bYV0PJ2XEaLSEjgb7MyQv4iLmsYaOO_qGRWpr7aqCx94oJR2QoRkJA7aGUwQDSC2-qpKqOdr5EUBOWn7boCfJuzWSjA8BIugaUFSIoiT0HZhNNvXtx65MnwYmHKu5xUI0xcxE6V2ZN2nW_1kHmmyM2rSpmd0tibY8%3D)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

Dear Patriot, Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail. Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy**through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time But there's more. Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There's much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment! This can't go on. That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96e6e5a9199c43c3b104267be9d147b3&_e=dwVpnMi5LPqsCls_mnq35dYVodAOlxjcHVtrCnqUptjWwRLlu4GWQCm698YbNU_9SlaBrkXP5iHqaB0XOPKbEKoaC2qXKabQMjBHPcj8ovkB2yXFflSJOPV8b7atBwwlMYr_6hwVX7ylqgtlwndqrE4Fy17dyGSKft-b1sIRLbwoHPVxgLipYGbuLeBVq8irZBEMhodr_fo2KEWn4A-1A7rhgIjccT1HLfQRq_kWXJXbKWdQ2DzHP0l2FSSpaHAqF0FlEcVO1C0Q5bnj7b2rDhH_K1R9VJHtdk4n5tukgFFQJNGLVAfZHNhr9cW8WROiNQwuzAzUsQ-8npN_Bi6SvaF_5h0N-EPLAAyutgEbJF72TckSaWsm8P75BGVZJHyDy5JtgQOcZ0JHIzu24eEEkQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96e6e5a9199c43c3b104267be9d147b3&_e=dwVpnMi5LPqsCls_mnq35dYVodAOlxjcHVtrCnqUptjWwRLlu4GWQCm698YbNU_9SlaBrkXP5iHqaB0XOPKbEKoaC2qXKabQMjBHPcj8ovkB2yXFflSJOPV8b7atBwwlMYr_6hwVX7ylqgtlwndqrE4Fy17dyGSKft-b1sIRLbwoHPVxgLipYGbuLeBVq8irZBEMhodr_fo2KEWn4A-1A7rhgIjccT1HLfQRq_kWXJXbKWdQ2DzHP0l2FSSpaHAqarw2hS5i2fvFSxwbECuHCcD73rtlXDNFnTEcbSn0EqygmcxdJjp9-qcDyJdGHLaeTba7bjGtd9UOd4FJ0bsqlp0YH0aDgCD28ox3TaIPp2l5LqLQ79_OBgzPb7hMbY7lhoi7yMb9O4Kj5CcroQSs0A%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=96e6e5a9199c43c3b104267be9d147b3&_e=dwVpnMi5LPqsCls_mnq35dYVodAOlxjcHVtrCnqUptjWwRLlu4GWQCm698YbNU_9SlaBrkXP5iHqaB0XOPKbEKoaC2qXKabQMjBHPcj8ovkB2yXFflSJOPV8b7atBwwlMYr_6hwVX7ylqgtlwndqrE4Fy17dyGSKft-b1sIRLbwoHPVxgLipYGbuLeBVq8irZBEMhodr_fo2KEWn4A-1A7rhgIjccT1HLfQRq_kWXJXbKWdQ2DzHP0l2FSSpaHAqTnoakK0lzV_dN2GxSlTYG8xjzEbIPKRfsE0WlPNE5lkY8q57TB7quW6zDkSCRfhC0Y6Jn_G6JIOVw6VDHCBf8uKEPCy9-x72Ip2OdVzpSd8UwKTiX447AAQLw7dZwF87tv4xsI-Fni0iOoOkJc6Sew%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. clean_body: Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _
