subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0537d6218464fdeae8fffbe22c03468&_e=phrqOztfn1o73Jh70LpDdkip0kur7QtF4lqgIIFyd46OVPlxC6buJUopOzsjUkJwhR_hP2t6X3A1NN82TyYrOsqYimV07YfvtDe1vVnfEPJT_Q0AtPKcZK3FXTGBFgPWrcBf6N_-h0z3OdiaeBGP9qKiRxn6x_5fEHP8btKhqyxpLvWLJT2afa5eOvMt9LYd8XOeRAVdaCggw808n4M0uJrua2PNLrI42Sb0EPZ3kDrQO9oyyck_JXQZKMm6zt7XJSLHOATdKRMQkS3WKgB8SsLHnltfLlkOU223WV1mZZOvmR-0Ew8CbHfUAHdkEV56QT3DRp7MRK2-uz5hcEk4BGZmWjV0RjPMyqGiN7szA1g%3D)
---
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0537d6218464fdeae8fffbe22c03468&_e=phrqOztfn1o73Jh70LpDdkip0kur7QtF4lqgIIFyd46OVPlxC6buJUopOzsjUkJwhR_hP2t6X3A1NN82TyYrOsqYimV07YfvtDe1vVnfEPJT_Q0AtPKcZK3FXTGBFgPWrcBf6N_-h0z3OdiaeBGP9qKiRxn6x_5fEHP8btKhqyxpLvWLJT2afa5eOvMt9LYd8XOeRAVdaCggw808n4M0uDcgD4faUTey_lnsj1HGThHxRsHb6GAO5wm28YuMu6ah-TekUO1qtKuADZinmrStX_Wfn13LPafubA3_kk6Z_KyXwNPB9tGW3Gd3b2zmf452Ix3yGIvt3gJvxmT_gcD68XKvEDRd-TYfm3Ye5Kaw-0U%3D) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0537d6218464fdeae8fffbe22c03468&_e=phrqOztfn1o73Jh70LpDdkip0kur7QtF4lqgIIFyd46OVPlxC6buJUopOzsjUkJwhR_hP2t6X3A1NN82TyYrOsqYimV07YfvtDe1vVnfEPJT_Q0AtPKcZK3FXTGBFgPWrcBf6N_-h0z3OdiaeBGP9qKiRxn6x_5fEHP8btKhqyxpLvWLJT2afa5eOvMt9LYd8XOeRAVdaCggw808n4M0uCfpdsbZPT8QkvapnvC2huI7xYTV6E0XXZF0rrPga5SjV6Fmgmf21TOocoDuBGIdtVZ33z_O4qvtfc8AAIDvJ0eIxWwvI_-e6KRChuYzei-EGmtDuhgwBFqcEZpkDoL7BxKbvm74LrA2m-i98ecNalw%3D)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0537d6218464fdeae8fffbe22c03468&_e=phrqOztfn1o73Jh70LpDdkip0kur7QtF4lqgIIFyd46OVPlxC6buJUopOzsjUkJwhR_hP2t6X3A1NN82TyYrOsqYimV07YfvtDe1vVnfEPJT_Q0AtPKcZK3FXTGBFgPWrcBf6N_-h0z3OdiaeBGP9qKiRxn6x_5fEHP8btKhqyxpLvWLJT2afa5eOvMt9LYd8XOeRAVdaCggw808n4M0uB75EKdym-TIwqm9LyKcnsDgvlmXyjsw3962BOxJAiw9KqrsYFHyHcm_Wald7eofqqcfBtk52LeeppOQVBjb9WkuGHA7NrcGKB1pInP9giVSAkOQvGNyhHeJl1etz0QUYjTd8am_ShWLDf7H3GSAo90%3D)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0537d6218464fdeae8fffbe22c03468&_e=phrqOztfn1o73Jh70LpDdkip0kur7QtF4lqgIIFyd46OVPlxC6buJUopOzsjUkJwhR_hP2t6X3A1NN82TyYrOsqYimV07YfvtDe1vVnfEPJT_Q0AtPKcZK3FXTGBFgPWrcBf6N_-h0z3OdiaeBGP9qKiRxn6x_5fEHP8btKhqyxpLvWLJT2afa5eOvMt9LYd8XOeRAVdaCggw808n4M0uFZSir_vd4kMV56y9y-G5ky5WmRyDRHf3KDAa6uOBBEGVvTbKaLqwTDTZrSFyWMIyxOUCeHMcq-MLaK6jtFbmBGiwHAf99pQ17Mlns3_K2Ep1US_rYP5qDavwXikthBUoju6z8g7Cm2oeUpB44UySxc%3D)**

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: David Hogg
subject: I'll be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This team’s support is providing an enormous boost to our candidates.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T726cd578-7ea0-44ca-a65d-65cdf7ee2389/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| Peter, I can’t thank this team enough for your support. Not only have we announced our first slate of 2024 Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidates — we even won an early victory when Christine Cockley won her primary in Ohio! [Peter, the outpouring of support from this grassroots team is providing an enormous boost to each of our candidates. We need to keep up our momentum as we get closer to the November election. Split a $10 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30721c3b-9a80-42f7-bc10-a4cfc0c6e1a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We are proud to be working with our first round of 2024 endorsed candidates:
* Sarah McBride for U.S. Congress (Delaware)
* Christine Cockley for Ohio House
* Bryce Berry for Georgia House
* Ashwin Ramaswami for Georgia Senate
* Anna Thomas for Pennsylvania House
* Anja Wookey-Huffman for Montana House

From now until November, we’ll be doing everything we can to elect these young progressive leaders to fight for our generation’s values and defend our future. And, just like we did in Virginia last year, we’re preparing to make significant investments in each of these campaigns to help them win big this November. We’re going to be on the ground supporting all of our 2024 endorsed candidates by running ads, managing effective volunteer and canvassing programs, and helping them reach the voters they will need on their side to win these races. I’ll be blunt: Winning these races isn’t cheap. These campaigns require serious resources — and that’s why the support from this grassroots team is so vital. [Peter, will you make a $10 contribution to Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee8ba6cd-2a7e-4d07-a9f5-a5f0a7dbb056/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1450321-001a-4414-b139-1f9d5445e04f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for your support! David Hogg
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e981980-15c3-4cf1-8ca4-e8d9505e4186/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

name: Jesse
subject: Why I am pro-life
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWf30M4iQN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWf30M4iQN

Friend of Life,

My name is Jesse. It's wonderful
to meet you!

You've never received an email
from me before. I don't work for Live Action, but I consider
myself a part of Live Action's community of Life Defenders who
are working to end abortion 365 days a year.

Sometimes when I think about the
issue of abortion, it seems daunting. But when I realize that if
I have the power to save just one life, I know I am making a
difference.

If I, as a pro-life person, don't
step up to rescue these innocent children, who will?

That's why I joined as a Live
Action Life Defender in 2015 to help end abortion in my lifetime
and build a culture of life. I am hoping you will join me in this
critical work. Your gift of just $50 is enough to change
thousands of minds on abortion.

We, as pro-life people, are the
answer. This is the most pressing human rights issue of our day.
We can't wait for someone else. It's up to us to live out the
pro-life message every day.

When my mother conceived me, she
was single. My father made the "simple" offer to pay for the
abortion.

My mother, however, embraced life
- which not only gave me a chance to live but also the seven
children that I am blessed to be the father of. Once I became a
dad, I knew I wanted to be the best father that I could be.

Even though it wasn't easy for my
mother to move ahead alone, she pushed through those early
difficult times, and I guarantee you that she never once imagined
how many lives would come through the one she decided to keep. I
am thankful for her resolve.

My mom motivates me to continue
fighting for the least of these, our most defenseless children.

Every month as I see my donation
go through, I know that I am rescuing innocent children from
abortion and transforming our society. And I know I'm not only
fighting for these children, but their children's children, and
for their mothers and families who would be broken abortion. We
cannot overvalue the impact of a single life saved.

Imagine the lives we will save
together if you join our team of Life Defenders!

Start your impact to save lives
now:
https://give.liveaction.org/your-gift-will-save-lives-from-abortion/

Join me in bringing an end to
abortion and building a culture that truly embraces every human
life.

Sincerely,

Jesse
Live Action Life Defender since
2015

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB
111 Arlington, VA 22201

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWf30M4iQN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWf30M4iQN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

clean_body: Find out about all of the incredible progress President Biden and Vice President Harris have made in this week’s Team Joe Newsletter! | | |

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The ‘Woke’ Onslaught – How Should Conservatives Respond?
body:
Uncover practical conservative responses to evolving social dynamics | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572246?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**This week, it emerged that the newly appointed head of America’s NPR (National Public Radio) hates the US Constitution.** Speaking in 2021, she described the First Amendment which safeguards free speech as “a challenge.”

**How could it be that the head of America’s public broadcasting service, established by an act of Congress, has such contempt for the US Constitution?**
---
|
---
_Katherine Maher, the ‘woke’ new head of NPR, supports state censorship._
| In her previous role running Wikipedia, the online encyclopaedia, Katherine Maher rejected a “free and open internet” as a guiding principle. **Such principles are, in her words, a “white male Westernized construct,"** according to reports.

Katherine Maher, reports say, support efforts to censor opinions that do not conform with her leftist world view. She spoke of the truth as being “a distraction”.

**Sadly, Katherine Maher is not a one off. She is fairly typical of the sort of people now running many of America’s institutions, HR departments, government agencies and universities. **

Ms Maher’s social media posts might read like parody. There is nothing funny about the way that people with Ms Maher’s outlook and opinions are busy subverting America’s Founding principles, and replacing them with a grim leftist dogma that risks destroying America and the West.

**Conservatives need to push back, but how?**
---
|
---
_Christopher Rufo on Fox News exposes NPR bias._
| **Until now, many conservatives have been better at identifying the problem than at tackling it.**

To defeat DEI, we need to pass laws, reform institutions, appoint the right people and set the right incentives. Most of all, however, we need to counter bad ideas with good ideas.

**Florida’s Governor, Ron DeSantis, has shown that states can take the lead against DEI, signing an Executive Order, restricting the use of public money for DEI programs.** State leaders in Oklahoma, Utah and Texas have also done something similar. **We need to see similar action here in Mississippi.**

**Two years ago, MCPP lead a successful campaign for a bill to combat Critical Race Theory here in Mississippi.** The new law goes some way to addressing the issue, but not far enough.

If we are serious about restricting DEI dogma, we need to ensure that your tax dollars cannot be spent promoting this divisive ideology.

**MCPP has been advocating for legislation to prevent your tax dollars being spent on DEI programs.**

---
|
---
_Leftists protest against Florida’s Ron DeSantis. _
| **Did you know that some Mississippi public universities use your tax dollars to promote Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI) programs?**

One of our leading public universities has an “institutional diversity, equity, and inclusion plan” governing every aspect of campus life. DEI shapes not only university admissions, administration and faculty hiring, but what young people are taught, with the development of an academic equity scorecard.

**Sunlight is the best disinfectant. That is why MCPP is working energetically to expose how many of your tax dollars are being spent to DEI programs here in Mississippi. **

**Instead of more DEI hires, the University of Florida recently decided to eliminate all DEI employee positions.** Last month, the University of Texas at Austin fired dozens of employees who used to work in diversity, equity and inclusion programs. **Mississippi needs to do the same.**
---
|
---
_The best antidote to the ‘woke’ mind-virus._
| The best way to defeat bad ideas is with good ideas. **Teaching young people the following truths about America will give them immunity against the ‘woke’ mind virus.**

* **America is built on liberty.** This country got started because people living in 13 former British colonies had had enough of being bossed about by a British king.
* **The US Constitution is the best system of government in the world.**
* **America is a force for good.** On three occasions – World War I, World War II and the Cold War - the United States intervened to save the free world.
* **Americans are inventive.** From the first flight to the advent of the iPhone, there is one country that has proved extraordinarily inventive: the USA.
* **Judeo-Christian ideals have shaped America.**

Here’s how we are working to ensure young people learn about American exceptionalism.
---
|
---
_Reaching young minds - our Leadership Academy works!_
| **Our Leadership Academy, now in its third year, takes a group of young Mississippians and teaches them about some of the underlying principles on which America is built. **

With input from state leaders and academics, we give students insights that will stay with them for life.
---
|
---
_The Book of American Patriotism – teaching the next generation of Americans the truth about their country._
| **It is never too early to teach young people about American exceptionalism.** With that in mind, MCPP will soon be publishing a children’s book aimed at 5 – 10 year olds.

**_The Book of American Patriotism_****teaches six key insights about our country that every American needs to know**(but aren’t being taught at school).

A generation ago, the conservative movement focused on things like tax cuts and red tape reduction. Those things remain essential, but we also need to ensure that we are promoting America’s Founding principles.

**This is a fight that we can win.** One day we will look back and think it absurd that someone with Katherine Maher’s outlook could be put in charge of public service broadcasting. **But there is a great deal that we need to do right now in order to get there!**

Thank you for reading about our plan to combat DEI dogma, and please have a wonderful weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=91db192ed4&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Want to change how you receive these emails?

This country got started because people living in 13 former British colonies had had enough of being bossed about by a British king. The US Constitution is the best system of government in the world. America is a force for good. On three occasions – World War I, World War II and the Cold War - the United States intervened to save the free world. Americans are inventive. From the first flight to the advent of the iPhone, there is one country that has proved extraordinarily inventive: the USA. Judeo-Christian ideals have shaped America. Here’s how we are working to ensure young people learn about American exceptionalism. | Reaching young minds - our Leadership Academy works! | Our Leadership Academy, now in its third year, takes a group of young Mississippians and teaches them about some of the underlying principles on which America is built. With input from state leaders and academics, we give students insights that will stay with them for life. | The Book of American Patriotism – teaching the next generation of Americans the truth about their country. | It is never too early to teach young people about American exceptionalism. With that in mind, MCPP will soon be publishing a children’s book aimed at 5 – 10 year olds. The Book of American Patriotism**teaches six key insights about our country that every American needs to know(but aren’t being taught at school). A generation ago, the conservative movement focused on things like tax cuts and red tape reduction. Those things remain essential, but we also need to ensure that we are promoting America’s Founding principles. This is a fight that we can win. One day we will look back and think it absurd that someone with Katherine Maher’s outlook could be put in charge of public service broadcasting. But there is a great deal that we need to do right now in order to get there! Thank you for reading about our plan to combat DEI dogma, and please have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8765cc616e648aab7b73adc22c35a2d&_e=aFSOm17p4LBeGIZeBF-EcZgKDdTWZFIVudkv4OebJ5Qr8RhfS4aJSIKXxkJnJQ0tx-oOnIbh18VUkXs9B6f623oGT6WZpwiEQPHvjgVyHImMijKjZjApoMEwK722nr9GAi8jKZFqQPsdHSLJdZFAH3UiFzbQZruQPvZuQN4InkwFnn8DUzqi7zHyrq6Uupx5xN6aGBWOcackXEUtuOqNjTIPSBswITDP8Ta7kT_kUe4h_fhbuJiQZaMxuWz_jwMv8pSbpjbddTjP24ggVogqTQqglVmgPjtz6jGKCXaIBsrUlPhlAnpogukaHeNpW8qqB8VzE5rDl9XFY2Dm6CTFm4ZjO66_FDRsy5cXJKOv4tE%3D)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what's really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on.

**That 's why I've filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I'm Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8765cc616e648aab7b73adc22c35a2d&_e=aFSOm17p4LBeGIZeBF-EcZgKDdTWZFIVudkv4OebJ5Qr8RhfS4aJSIKXxkJnJQ0tx-oOnIbh18VUkXs9B6f623oGT6WZpwiEQPHvjgVyHImMijKjZjApoMEwK722nr9GAi8jKZFqQPsdHSLJdZFAH3UiFzbQZruQPvZuQN4InkwFnn8DUzqi7zHyrq6Uupx5xN6aGBWOcackXEUtuOqNjZCZtkE3CkBdz6q0cA182Fy_OiuXkXDJV_31u-Tt8M0eVRjEVqK34wQ1xCyfaEHKLXjdv6EfOcEinpmaNkCwRLyGLxPOpXiWMe3AHZGqLXRCyXOKlKYowi8WrddgrnB6A6O0Dci2wLbRDXxGfmlj4f0%3D)**

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8765cc616e648aab7b73adc22c35a2d&_e=aFSOm17p4LBeGIZeBF-EcZgKDdTWZFIVudkv4OebJ5Qr8RhfS4aJSIKXxkJnJQ0tx-oOnIbh18VUkXs9B6f623oGT6WZpwiEQPHvjgVyHImMijKjZjApoMEwK722nr9GAi8jKZFqQPsdHSLJdZFAH3UiFzbQZruQPvZuQN4InkwFnn8DUzqi7zHyrq6Uupx5xN6aGBWOcackXEUtuOqNjdsJsKxBIT-QTEMC_PihOUbktWKX0pxE0szjUjgs2mJp9_XLSYNZLBdvgnvEbhMeG9a6fabztSUeSCwUrANkyI4nActqFBW5WLxGLx4IHRQLmYiV9BIM8kpfMfRvAqTqfx1BWLn-KzffETCIXNLFtHA%3D)**

Peter – sorry to be reaching out on a weekend, but this couldn't wait.
I checked our fundraising numbers this morning and noticed that we've seen a slow down in contributions during the past couple of days.
We've had times in the past where fundraising anomalies have occurred – support will slow, then pick back up. But this one has gone on too long for comfort. So I'm reaching out bright and early to ensure we get back on track.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: DEFEAT the Dems. Stand with Israel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
The Left won’t stand with Israel. We will! Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._EQ)
---
| | Did you see this, Fellow Conservative?
**In response to Iran’s unprecedented attack on Israel, Chuck Schumer released the following statement:** ** _“As Israel is under attack from Iran, we stand with Israel and its people, and the United States will do everything we can to support Israel’s defense against Iran.”_ I couldn’t agree with Chuck Schumer more. America _should_ have Israel’s back every step of the way. But here’s the problem: Chuck Schumer had the chance to help Israel but refused to do so. Schumer and Senate Democrats _**BLOCKED emergency aide to Israel**_ – not once, but FOUR times! The hypocrisy is STAGGERING – and it’s just the latest example of the Democrats’ failure to support our greatest friend and ally in the Middle East. **If you stand with Israel, please chip in a generous donation to help defeat the Biden Democrats in November and take back the U.S. Senate. **
---
[**DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT THE LEFT AND STAND WITH ISRAEL**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
As you read this email, pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers have been activated across the country. They’re _shouting_ anti-Jewish and anti-American slurs. And they’re trying to _intimidate_ politicians, college administrators, and business owners into cowering to their disgusting propaganda. **The Democrat Party REFUSES to stand up to their hate. They’re coddling these extremists and seeking out their votes. ** It’s time to make the Democrats pay at the box office in November. **[**Pitch in your best gift to keep Texas red and take back the Senate!**](http://trk.tedcruz._hArLx_uZ4Q)** Thanks so much for your support at this crucial moment in our nation’s history. For Liberty, Ted Cruz

Folks,

I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs.

I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself.

A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not.

My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend.

If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: **[[LINK]](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6140d36e6eca49369c6ec1c44b1743af&_e=6nyP6Y6cOAe2xx72zK_ucE6MO8Cje-zxV28wf9Fq5hNcolvbPR5OwEiA09puUTf8jLbtlBlgHqM3MB-Fh42jMBRcOMhgveuLd370aSEL1go5g1wAquLpUM7eYqaAy981wCDuTSJ9tm644ITdcuaFLoIMS6st13GXVWWi381EidAbJrAqGKY0pncyk8OE0IIjVa2DpXwVzMfNw-8MsGQO6ZHUkBbiXSVUhcNUYf8jxsPVIDKw_Va2VWSGKZiYg3QKOLK6Aa5thfn32B_kwDEogMqWlKP0iMeAzXAoZ7P0j-IxcEEbcxUgWT0806DboJUA2bWNXDO8FGajaZR448SdA-RtwOgXTgSYrWOQpnIZugpbzI-gbCsBhVtuspgT2cMj)**

-JNK

\- - - Begin forwarded message - - -

_Folks,

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government!

Chip in here: **[[Link]](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6140d36e6eca49369c6ec1c44b1743af&_e=6nyP6Y6cOAe2xx72zK_ucE6MO8Cje-zxV28wf9Fq5hNcolvbPR5OwEiA09puUTf8jLbtlBlgHqM3MB-Fh42jMBRcOMhgveuLd370aSEL1go5g1wAquLpUM7eYqaAy981wCDuTSJ9tm644ITdcuaFLoIMS6st13GXVWWi381EidAbJrAqGKY0pncyk8OE0IIjVa2DpXwVzMfNw-8MsGQO6Xff1CMv6r2MQZMTE-WJOTam3LZZWt26czvJaDSBBSk2OtpWvPDInkxEF03944St1cvs3p_939hBGCLVVkb6I3Togbg4WzOUm68GGUqH-AN4qW2du5oe0eFGK8jUy_hEs3IdLVlpU6PwjHTtavXVTT0bfQgg4hz0V-BdxuGpPUyp)**

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

God Bless,
Senator Kennedy

clean_body: | Folks, I’m more nervous than a cat in a room full of rocking chairs. I reached out the other day about how I won’t be able to hold down the front lines much longer without the resources and support from strong conservatives like yourself. A LOT of my supporters responded, but I was just alerted – you still have not. My request is simple. I just need $1 from you, Friend. If you feel up to the task of pitching in, you can do so here: [[LINK]]() -JNK \- - - Begin forwarded message - - - Folks, I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak. I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies. I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself. Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government! Chip in here: [[Link]]() I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom! God Bless, Senator Kennedy | Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore? -

Hi it’s Audrey, Email and SMS Manager at the DLCC. I’m reaching out to you personally because we’re just days away from our end-of-month launch, and we need your help. **I promise I’ll make this quick.** As of 8:00 this morning, we’re not on pace to hit our April fundraising goal. In fact, we’re less than halfway there. To make matters worse, we just got the news that Republicans are outraising us (by _millions_). **We only have 48 hours to get back on track before we kick off our end-of-month fundraising campaign. If we don’t, there could be major consequences for our ability to support our candidates and in-state partners.** But, if every Democratic supporter reading this email chipped in $7 or more, we could get back on track and head into the end of this month feeling confident. name: Jim Jordan
subject: 84% drop-off in support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2309.1.4d36f79509b79a14fb739ba25e6b373f )<-

->\*\*$6 ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2310.1.4e50947e5d0b6ed240a3b6911245e3ac )\*\*<-

More than 23,000 donations were made to my campaign in March with \*\*an average gift of $6\*\*. And let me tell you that while $6 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections – not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did. \*\*In fact, our fundraising numbers are down 84% in the first 11 days of April compared to the first 11 days of March.\*\*

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, \*\*would you be able to make a contribution of $6 ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2311.1.9f12f8a4909f6c1457065827d8075daa )\*\*, our average March donation, to help us kick-start our april fundraising?

->

\*\*CHIP IN $6

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2312.1.60430051c8cb79b269f28f8ebefebc5b )

<-

Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and \*\*not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.\*\*

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. \*\*Not me. Not now, not ever.\*\*

I know a couple of things to be true:

- We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

- \*\*Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1\*\*

That’s why I’m reaching out today. The stakes are as high now as they were in each of the past two elections, \*\*yet in just one month we've seen an 84% drop in donations ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2313.1.f3eb9431d9255cf8485b0204d170dab0 )\*\*. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by \*\*chipping in $6 ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2314.1.2716f39a56b26eb34eafc7d5d42d30de )\*\* or another amount today?

->

\*\*CHIP IN $6

\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=5311142.2315.1.71e68535e57f6b5edceead1a5f93f07e )

<-

When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _ \*\*Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it\*\* _.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, \*\*putting a damper on our efforts to keep our one-seat House majority\*\*. body:
In Endorsing Me for Congress |
---

Fellow American,

**I am grateful to have President Trump’s official support and endorsement for my campaign.**[**Now, will you stand with President Trump and join him in supporting my campaign?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6b9cdd37f6eb47e2870e93d0817b1afe&_e=L6n_4AlFFTGcHlRNyEkJJRQTQQVWoaIPoP0pF3KXMT-e0FhULko4PDqvijuRzy8cjZDgQ1r4WAOLsMYlLLMyWYoBXIzlEf1UoSGy56skKJN31dcL02G45yE46zllXGeyoj4_qa83Spv4vrvivS13s4Os_OJoMNVs9IqkwYffdZS1npJ8iEhEeb8ximICyB6d1eag3_dA3krOzOX2MBx6PZR2Ob5DK2QcMZ4CsyYbpjcGnM0Mp9vIy2lcGrLWqqAf9Q8ScyCUVyxYRyEd8u18cGXdfV6GWpOLMyNVb9waxaBt4rwQEtHrWGAShlRdZTGuqXx8xqzDsFHbMinjyURI1aeSEqUGevzxayZ7UGd0Yg9FVwn8tNIYLUMOuK-3Hd8WvIeFSo91ap2KeqY1bBVUnQ%3D%3D)

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6b9cdd37f6eb47e2870e93d0817b1afe&_e=L6n_4AlFFTGcHlRNyEkJJRQTQQVWoaIPoP0pF3KXMT-e0FhULko4PDqvijuRzy8cjZDgQ1r4WAOLsMYlLLMyWYoBXIzlEf1UoSGy56skKJN31dcL02G45yE46zllXGeyoj4_qa83Spv4vrvivS13s4Os_OJoMNVs9IqkwYffdZS1npJ8iEhEeb8ximICyB6d1eag3_dA3krOzOX2MBx6Pcam5orajBnIatdhwhcGX1SoYODgRwCB_FwUfPRDj30Z9WQBj5A0RxnkQirwmJBYOjvGn7hpOUu1kHKSqQ-AYGDD59EbZG7Rbsfs5KKc73bkeYG9GchXlQ20yHYiOYGtIukY06K-P6U1LP4MW6KO_Wq9fOjQB8kyDkpJQkxpy9O1i5-uf--ZAqgdvTjubvxcEQ%3D%3D)
_President Biden has destroyed Northeast Pennsylvania and our country over the past three years: the worst border crisis in history, historic inflation that is decimating families, and irresponsible spending that is pushing us further into debt.

The people of Northeastern Pennsylvania have chosen Donald Trump twice, and I’m grateful for his support this year as we work to win this district from top to bottom in November._

But just having his endorsement alone will not get me over the finish line on November 5. Joe Biden and his Radical Leftist Cronies have been dumping millions of dollars into BUYING this race for my opponent, Matt Cartwright. Reaching voters costs money, and President Trump’s endorsement does not come with a blank check. I need a grassroots Red Wave of donations so that I can reach swing voters and win this district from top to bottom.

[**I’m humbly asking you to join President Trump’s endorsement of my campaign and chip in just $1 or more by my midnight deadline.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6b9cdd37f6eb47e2870e93d0817b1afe&_e=L6n_4AlFFTGcHlRNyEkJJRQTQQVWoaIPoP0pF3KXMT-e0FhULko4PDqvijuRzy8cjZDgQ1r4WAOLsMYlLLMyWYoBXIzlEf1UoSGy56skKJN31dcL02G45yE46zllXGeyoj4_qa83Spv4vrvivS13s4Os_OJoMNVs9IqkwYffdZS1npJ8iEhEeb8ximICyB6d1eag3_dA3krOzOX2MBx6PZR2Ob5DK2QcMZ4CsyYbpjcGnM0Mp9vIy2lcGrLWqqAfeNmc_aiVMC5p17s_XgHx4YpCbVMoISBjwAjH50bHSuVm8F2T2LjZSs_T7N5G8PFwpbTcEi4Eu337nIgoSQPtTbTblW0--G4L4MZEgq1xUg2LWwZxigvhjc4A7k7Midby8rcyfAQXXa98-kaMmjpogg%3D%3D)

Thank you, President Trump, once again for your endorsement. And thank you, friend, in advance for joining him.

Best,
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6b9cdd37f6eb47e2870e93d0817b1afe&_e=L6n_4AlFFTGcHlRNyEkJJRQTQQVWoaIPoP0pF3KXMT-e0FhULko4PDqvijuRzy8cjZDgQ1r4WAOLsMYlLLMyWYoBXIzlEf1UoSGy56skKJN31dcL02G45yE46zllXGeyoj4_qa83Spv4vrvivS13s4Os_OJoMNVs9IqkwYffdZS1npJ8iEhEeb8ximICyB6d1eag3_dA3krOzOX2MBx6PZR2Ob5DK2QcMZ4CsyYbpjcGnM0Mp9vIy2lcGrLWqqAfNSTr7rkQueY9WIleleH3nuEliQUn09yGKctgig9m_UqVZRuIZbTNV7Hhoddg-l_YDtz4RX4YgDybGH1F5-ebDLZ_RQoAQ_odq4tT3R6XzKfXtM8OQpm3BSJ22_OQk3CS4J3nlLK8uUMgUKrVBoWlzg%3D%3D)

| [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6b9cdd37f6eb47e2870e93d0817b1afe&_e=L6n_4AlFFTGcHlRNyEkJJRQTQQVWoaIPoP0pF3KXMT-e0FhULko4PDqvijuRzy8cjZDgQ1r4WAOLsMYlLLMyWYoBXIzlEf1UoSGy56skKJN31dcL02G45yE46zllXGeyoj4_qa83Spv4vrvivS13s4Os_OJoMNVs9IqkwYffdZS1npJ8iEhEeb8ximICyB6d1eag3_dA3krOzOX2MBx6PZR2Ob5DK2QcMZ4CsyYbpjcGnM0Mp9vIy2lcGrLWqqAfJMSz-SM4ysU5-b0auPlxTwnDDVr-7goeFH-oLeUyWlJiuof-nrsPzPEEYtXUE7R_qDM2NQwc2wCqDKIpW_9H0M9LhKp1aE8fblBAqYHkLHQxkgs9xacAln4TlFycY8d0bPIddEmnuYl0gGxzKa--iw%3D%3D)

Meet Rob Bresnahan:

**A fifth-generation Northeastern Pennslyvanian, Rob Bresnahan took the reins of his grandfather's union electrical contracting company at age 19 and expanded the business across the commonwealth while tripling the number of good-paying union careers they provided to Pennsylvanians. Rob is focused on facing challenges head on to solve problems.

_That's why he's running for United States Congress._

Rob is committed to bringing people together and is uniquely qualified to send a jolt of energy through Congress and deliver results for everyone here in Northeastern Pennsylvania.

# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1354%2E135344%2E9SYGt7)

Friend --
Have you ever heard this saying? "The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The next best time is today."
That's true in a lot of ways -- with trees, but also starting healthy habits and other positive life changes...
It is also true of this campaign.
According to our records you haven't donated to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate yet. We don't see **dpwillis67@gmail.com** in our records as a donor (though maybe you used another address).
But if not, today would be the perfect time to make that first donation. It’s more effective now than it will be later in the campaign because of the flexibility it provides us to invest in more than just late advertising. Your support goes A LOT farther now, before things like TV reservations double and triple in price in the fall.
This is especially true while Republicans are busy in a bitter primary.
So friend, if you've been waiting for the right time to plant that tree in Michigan, let's make it today:

As a public servant, my priority is to represent my constituents accurately. I believe in the power of using your voice, so I want to hear directly from **YOU!** [_**Use your voice by participating in a short survey below.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83371462/468198677/1088305139?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWY5YWUxNS0xNmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4U19dEDB6W6q6nt5trly-5fJJUbECtHIaz3d95YPkbI=&emci=0f3840b7-c3fc-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=7af9ae15-16ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=37927032)_****_**👇**

Dear Peter,
We’ll keep this brief:
We've set [an ambitious $4 million goal](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=urgent_support_4_20_24_rs_nd1&n=3) this month to ensure RFK Jr. is on every state ballot this November and to support our critical voter outreach. _To hit that goal, we need a strong second half surge._ We need your donation to put us over the top.
We know the tense situation in the Middle East, higher tax bills, rising gas prices, and the persistent inflation crisis have all contributed to the recent slowdown in donations.
Yet, we must maintain, and increase every area of our national campaign.
Please help us now with a critical gift to [help push us beyond our goal](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=urgent_support_4_20_24_rs_nd1&n=4)-

| | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c5d3cc7de9304d55b152306596eab2f1&_e=snlN65T521uedJT5q5OkN_GF2F7rkTYDh1m5yO4m_rkgFYIPfy-khalHBE-u_5BT1xsE1eVR008zhmuGhrb-x5jqaaq4o4ONuXJfdwomfhazpLUxASjwVu8pxRPThB4-mAJz_temgzgc2Xf3UvenFzITAP4Occ69d5lIod3jMvMKf5pncrY4kzHBs9tR4xImgRvvg_3g0NptTUW0jCuipIz0znq59B98tcicJGzgQxHhA2vK-6b4YgBe4prAnGeduV25RfifvfUjd-iEEHkpnQV2fxu73y-QFsdeR1Rk_-2IYoWBkLfmdm4gAc_audj1mCCvdbgkW336wWPlOtSG7FPgmbUXQpYrR87ZGxyNVmWiIX9gfb_gBl43OGQr4y5TAdb2FEGbkvAupkM5bmEZpg%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. clean_body: The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. | | | | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: Dave Wallace
subject: Urgent: Support Dave Wallace's Campaign - In Triumph of Life, Liberty and The Pursuit of Happiness!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Wallace for America Campaign Committee
body:
Urgent: Support Dave Wallace's Campaign - In Triumph of Life, Liberty and The Pursuit of Happiness! | | | |
---
| **PUT AMERICANS FIRST**
---
| Dear Peter,

With just six days remaining until our final FEC Report in the Primary, this is our moment to make a difference. Early voting begins from May 2 through 9, and the primary election date is May 14.

Together, Peter, we are poised for victory, but we urgently need to raise an additional $50,000 this week to fuel our media purchases.

Your support is crucial, Peter. Would you consider making a [generous contribution tonight to help us reach our goal?](https://wallaceforamerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02f8ed46254477239a346360b&id=ec3ca1a76f&e=dc3f23d13e "https://secure.winred.com/wallace-for-america-inc/donate-today?amount=250")

We've been tirelessly working towards our shared vision for America's future. With diligence and persistence, we have fought to get equal opportunity to be on the radio! We can proudly state that we have finally reached an agreement to be on the radio 9-12 noon, Monday through Friday!

I will work even harder for you when you nominate me to proudly represent you in our Second Congressional District of Maryland, for Baltimore and Carroll County!

---
| [PLEASE DONATE](https://wallaceforamerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02f8ed46254477239a346360b&id=dab7ed2f9c&e=dc3f23d13e "PLEASE DONATE")
---
| **Also, Please join me on Monday, April 22, 2024 LIVE on WCBM Radio AM 680**

I will be discussing the issues facing American Families, the policies that directly affect you and my mission to fix it.
---
|
---
| Furthermore, I've pledged with my honor the American's for Tax Reform pledge to you as a hardworking American taxpayer to never raise your taxes. Additionally, I further pledge to fight to lower spending to balance our Budget.

I am your responsibile candidate with a proven track record as a business owner who keeps his promises!

I make a pledge to use your campaign contribution strictly for my campaign activities to win this race, for you!
---
|
---
| So I pledge to you,
To:
1. Restore America's Border and National Security!
2. Restore America's Economy to End Inflation and Restore America’s Energy Driven Industry.
3. Restore America's Culture protect our Children and Empower Parents.

---
|
---
| **You know me by the company I keep! I have a long history of standing strong on common sense principles and sound judgement!**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

[Your contribution will make a significant impact on our campaign's success.](https://wallaceforamerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02f8ed46254477239a346360b&id=c315661a7b&e=dc3f23d13e "https://secure.winred.com/wallace-for-america-inc/donate-today?amount=250")

Thank you for your unwavering support.

You are receiving this email because you are friends or have shown us or a fellow Republican support. Thank you!

Visit our website at [DaveWallace.us](https://wallaceforamerica.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02f8ed46254477239a346360b&id=1a906da8bf&e=dc3f23d13e) to learn more about our campaign and how you can get involved.

Dave Wallace, Candidate US Congress MD Congressional District 2

My primary has come and gone and Election Day will be here before any of us know it, and to that end, I’m going to ask for your financial help a few times in the body of this email. Our finance team tells me that to spend what we need to spend through the rest of the month– which Is just 12 days away – I realize that’s a big number – but one that is achievable given that so many of you graciously donated to my campaign before today. Whether everything helps. Democrats continue to outpace in fundraising, and I, for one, intend to fight to make sure that we have just enough cash to win this race outright. I’ll let you know what this email raises when I reach out tomorrow afternoon. I’d love to be able to report that we raised $4,000 off this email alone. For liberty, Jim Jordan | | ---|--- | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Team Harper
subject: POLL: Should marijuana be federally legalized?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Submit your response ASAP >>>
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH)
**Quick question for you, Peter:
[Do you think marijuana should be legalized at the federal level?](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=2&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH)** | [YES](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=3&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH) | [NO](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=4&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH)
---|---
If you said “yes,” Hill Harper is right there with you.
As a staunch advocate for criminal justice reform, he’s intimately aware of the impact America’s failed war on drugs has had on our communities: overcrowded prisons, the militarization of police, and inequitable enforcement of the law against Black and Brown folks, to name a few. In fact, Black Americans are up to 4x as likely to be arrested for possession as their white peers.
While Black and Brown folks remain _locked up_ on marijuana possession charges, they’re being _locked out_ of the booming marijuana economy in states and territories where it’s legal. As of a few years ago, over 80% of all marijuana business owners in the U.S. were white — compared to just 5.7% and 4.3% for Hispanic and Black owners.
**The bottom line is: The American people _overwhelmingly_ support marijuana legalization.** A record 70% of Americans now think it should be legalized — a clear sign of where this issue is headed and where the voters stand.
But Peter, Hill wants to hear from you today! Tell us: **[Should Congress follow Michigan’s example and legalize marijuana at the federal level?](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=5&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH)**
[YES](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=6&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH) | [NO](https://act.hillharper.com/survey/em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024/?source=em_HHR_PET_MarijuanaLegalizationPoll_042024&t=7&akid=1179%2E62735%2EW5PQKH)
---|---
Thanks for your input!
\- Team Harper

name: Summer Lee
subject: Help me defeat my Republican billionaire-backed opponent on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m in Congress today because of this grassroots movement. Because of
people like you, I was able to go up against the Democratic establishment
and the millions of dollars in attacks from right-wing groups like AIPAC
and Moderate PAC and WIN this seat for Pennsylvania’s 12th District in
2022.

Now, I need your support again to take on my Republican billionaire-backed
opponent in the April 23 Democratic primary and WIN in 3 days. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240420-34398&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34398%2E1203867%2E777tHK ]Can you
split a donation between me and Justice Democrats to help save this seat
and keep up our fight for progress?

In 2022, I was an underdog running to take on the status quo and deliver
the bold change our communities need and deserve. Now, I’m Pennsylvania’s
most progressive member of Congress, and the only Democratic incumbent in
the state facing a primary challenge.

Since my term began in 2023, I’ve delivered $1 billion in good-paying
jobs, public transit, affordable housing, and other community projects to
PA-12 in one single year.

I’ve stood with workers on the picket lines, coordinated roundtables to
combat food insecurity, fought for clean water and lead remediation,
introduced the OLIGARCH Act to stop billionaires from cheating the system
on the backs of hardworking families, and a whole lot more.

I was also one of the first members of Congress to call for a permanent
ceasefire and release of all hostages in Gaza, which further put a target
on my back.

Now, the richest man in Pennsylvania — anti-choice, anti-education, and
pro-Trump billionaire Jeff Yass — is funding Moderate PAC as they try to
replace me with a moderate who will do his bidding in Congress.

There’s still so much left to fight for and achieve, and I know that if we
come together now like we did in 2022, we can beat the odds and win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240420-34398&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34398%2E1203867%2E777tHK ]My primary is this Tuesday: can I count on you to rush a split donation
to my campaign and Justice Democrats so we can not only defend my seat but
also protect my fellow Squad members from being ousted this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-sl.wJpHnY&refcode=em20240420-34398&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34398%2E1203867%2E777tHK ]Contribute $5

Thank you for making progress possible,

Summer

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240420-34398-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34398_1203867_777tHK&akid=34398%2E1203867%2E777tHK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34398%2E1203867%2E777tHK

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

When you’re in combat, you see how strong your faith really is.

I spent 25 years serving on the front lines in the U.S. Navy. I saw my life flash before my eyes more times than I can count. _But each time, I thought of the same two things: my family and our Lord and Savior._

I walked with God every step of the way during my military career, and I saw the power of prayer firsthand.

Today, I still pray for America all day, and I hope you can take a few minutes to join me.

**Can you share a prayer for our country’s future with me?**
---
[**PRAY FOR AMERICA**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=4bb7b5f430ca4a9aae05250be93dc233&_e=Dwh_IEiGPQAr-aoKr81vstXuOhH0gu5CgVGlaGIHuyVe80Yx4zEyF9LeaZChXZgfKWwkKNAY3rY9OvP4a-pktPfj-MuE3dYA4_ZgaxVUkes4qtPFREgHSTZIO0V-1o5KfmFP678FF10pQESHlcgQlulO58eZVPbM-UON7rEkh9GEO3Zjkg2Q0K93_eqe8aoZeoG6l2aOAIkhhRq3fm5wjfwHmMd6gcqLcf9aerhN6t1XdfyNbrlBl-yvXQUMhvqSVm249Ug_70QNuvBE15D3pwAOfjOQWHui0RJem_G6YtGiXTl4Di-ixjp2_XN9IcK83pIFXPWxRNel7W71ZG5SYCfS4fRohGb0fshV3LEdbTGc4dzYyNK1-Kq1gbzUG2q8)

name: Gallego, Ruben
subject: Yeah, right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
“Moderate” Kari Lake? |
---
Peter, something weird is happening in Arizona.

If you’ve got a minute, I hope you’ll let me explain.

There’s this new narrative going around in the media that Kari Lake is going to turn into some plain old boring Republican, that she will moderate her platform to appeal to moderates.

Apparently she thinks the people of Arizona are going to forget all of the absolutely ridiculous and dangerous things she said and did back in 2022.

Yeah, right.

I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen.

No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.”

But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could.

I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative.

So, I’ve got to ask:

clean_body: “Moderate” Kari Lake? | Peter, something weird is happening in Arizona. If you’ve got a minute, I hope you’ll let me explain. There’s this new narrative going around in the media that Kari Lake is going to turn into some plain old boring Republican, that she will moderate her platform to appeal to moderates. Apparently she thinks the people of Arizona are going to forget all of the absolutely ridiculous and dangerous things she said and did back in 2022. Yeah, right. I can tell you this: We are not going to let that happen. No matter what Kari Lake says or does, she is still the MAGA Queen. The woman who called herself, “the most dangerous politician in the world.” But I can’t correct the record here all by myself. Never could. I need a big team behind me so our campaign can fight back against Kari Lake and this ridiculous narrative. _**The thing is, their strong fundraising numbers also mean they’re scared to death of us.**_

We can do this, but only if you’re in my corner.

**Nella Domenici**
Republican for Senate

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=87b6d81b132d4971823ab38e8aedbf1e&_e=XcaKD299uKl7RuRC8RCl7aWYY07zs8gyaVF2JUIg8kp-y-bYC_fBt6hr1448NW0X-RMcBulsj2Q0K4MzsNijKkmnCYkxoX5Y5zT-vrj1h9ExXy8gVFmJX-XKDq9J52wRiKiQSBxbCRRlTaBL83N5-NJwjXW6_HT_A3i5gpGuUMXPBcKwibbIXlrkCIBM1o5fW4kqd2wgDoQ9r8duXfYjyNX58VTY1nIhMpoV0YDtodKx04WS_-ozzc5dMz82LWoRwUl1q5lDK2ijEVFUy7MtLiJCtH6HTvYiFG-8-ZPg-1KZ8gRerzWpi_7_FXF0OomiMxmW3J3p_H_tlQ3WMmCfDrUq9ggsLinFjpWCxsKIIVBISFSjH3_4wQhI-f_rXF1957UnGPRGRM6DBxLeBTqvDg%3D%3D)

_Now his super PAC is bringing in $10 million checks!_

body:
Millions of Americans will have their Social Security benefits delayed
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju)
---
_**We have HORRIBLE news:**_ [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240420_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju) If the GOP is successful, _millions of Americans will have their Social Security benefits delayed and will be faced with a terrifying and uncertain future._ | _So we’re launching a MASSIVE poll to see where Democrats stand:_
**[_Do you approve of the GOP’s plan to raise the retirement age?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240420_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju)** | **[YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240420_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240420_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raise-retirement-poll?source=FFR_20240420_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=21300%2E4449941%2Er3mZju)**
**_WE NEED 250 LOCAL RESPONSES FOR ACCURATE DATA_ – PLEASE RESPOND PROMPTLY BEFORE OUR POLL CLOSES TOMORROW AT 9AM.**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We can’t protect Social Security without your response.

Thank you,

– FFR

It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

Look at the headline from one of our newspapers here in Montana.

I’m sending this message to you today because it’s not only timely, it’s pretty darn important.

On Tuesday, my Democrat opponent announced he’d raised **EIGHT MILLION DOLLARS in the 1st quarter of this year**. That’s an astronomical amount of money for anyone seeking re-election.

While we did everything possible to raise as much money from Jan 1st - March 30th, _**we raised nearly five million dollars LESS than Jon Tester. That’s bad.**_

What’s worse is that when**[I attempted to draw your attention to the large fundraising gap via an email solicitation yesterday afternoon, just 14 people contributed $577](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7f7aba504ab44e29ba8eeb02a325d2d4&_e=0jTN-lUjMl3Vv5CfaSGWVivpBQvljn0USuhpbOVuhOwIdjaKP30V4ddpbn39wQ8rrmi7WI3_rmBKk2GeJUtNMKowgI5QHUIjmkxlr_xMHGAgehOizoEQ_r09jjBrlDO-hswKDmj7z0r3kH9E8CWqzCzoT2-27wjQsXvjMAvkCOFL5vQ5jneEvoYxxa2sJIh0n8CHZDU_Z1H5aEyWYYVJen-hmxR2AEJtyUj_B66zbfiDzqNGWLoJPVxkQv-Gk_RU1j6gcAvfG5s1kE4c_4T84-5AKce479DP4uL3YMy7obBQCoJXDLUB2uKeNddQaxEnSa_WQcVT0N93Br38cik_nqKofezu7pq5m1ynDrpL5x5HEBgEoh_gM7gXvp9QzXj-rTmmTOKC8C9CAl4ZroWZnA%3D%3D)**.

**I’m stunned this plea for help went largely unanswered.**

[**CHIP IN $5
HELP TIM SHEEHY CATCH UP->** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7f7aba504ab44e29ba8eeb02a325d2d4&_e=0jTN-lUjMl3Vv5CfaSGWVivpBQvljn0USuhpbOVuhOwIdjaKP30V4ddpbn39wQ8rrmi7WI3_rmBKk2GeJUtNMKowgI5QHUIjmkxlr_xMHGAgehOizoEQ_r09jjBrlDO-hswKDmj7z0r3kH9E8CWqzCzoT2-27wjQsXvjMAvkCOFL5vQ5jneEvoYxxa2sJIh0n8CHZDU_Z1H5aEyWYYVJen-hmxR2AEJtyUj_B66zbfiDzqNGWLoJPVxkQv-Gk_RUPy8hy4PK1yPrsdB3uRF-d2Fer2XTLkCzBvpZaiB0ikhS5IkFOf87LeAaUbKYEboFtKbG7WJWQgc54RoscE7H6icVjAi-KXOSWnxZUdnLL4N-UKuRB43srKp3qgWm6nZxD1UEIK8sG6ns3_c06Aj8MQ%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative, the Senate majority hangs in the balance, and this race is widely regarded as the one that will decide whether Democrats or Republicans control the majority.

Last week alone, Democrats spent more than one million dollars attacking me on the airwaves in Montana. **We can’t compete with $577.** Link to donate -> **[here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7f7aba504ab44e29ba8eeb02a325d2d4&_e=0jTN-lUjMl3Vv5CfaSGWVivpBQvljn0USuhpbOVuhOwIdjaKP30V4ddpbn39wQ8rrmi7WI3_rmBKk2GeJUtNMKowgI5QHUIjmkxlr_xMHGAgehOizoEQ_r09jjBrlDO-hswKDmj7z0r3kH9E8CWqzCzoT2-27wjQsXvjMAvkCOFL5vQ5jneEvoYxxa2sJIh0n8CHZDU_Z1H5aEyWYYVJen-hmxR2AEJtyUj_B66zbfiDzqNGWLoJPVxkQv-Gk_RUdOOOY7PiQPkslBQ6zfc7HNLjOBbHAwBrIbGGeIDLvcy7hIsHbVSJWIZUUslwMpm6NjVzwp5Ds6ByT8Uo2dRT3JynAxWcifWnbERXUl7OFSrMfQaB09scQ15-k9TsRhONHG9Rfg-BSy6zcEu0QHUe6w%3D%3D)**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Governor Pritzker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Gov. Pritzker and I are fighting like hell for our reproductive rights. |
#
---
Hi team, My friend, Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker, is in Michigan this weekend to fight like hell alongside us to reelect President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris! I’m going to let you in on a little secret — Governor Pritzker and I have a bit of a friendly rivalry. He thinks Chicago Pizza tastes better than Detroit Pizza **_(it doesn’t)._** He believes that the Cubs and White Sox are better than the Tigers **_(they’re not)._** And he thinks Lake Michigan looks better from the east coast than the west coast **_(it never has and never will)._** But there’s one thing we _both_ agree on: **we _all_ need to work together to protect our reproductive freedom, stop Donald Trump, and send President Biden and Vice President Harris back to the White House.** Governor Pritzker is in Michigan today to join Fight Like Hell PAC and volunteers to say that we _must_ send Team Biden-Harris back to the White House to protect and restore abortion rights across the country. **[As a special thank you to Governor Pritzker, my team is planning to deliver him a card signed by our grassroots supporters. Will you add your name and give him a warm welcome to Michigan? You can even leave a personal message if you’d like.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83378849/468224486/-1222972528?contactdata=L1bd07Gq71xN3L7fSIYqKP9LZRDtfGPGp/7PW+T8irfrsYe9PXpHXzPIhcpeOfrSM9xqWg9MF/I4tzIio8R5cF08/Sv5k8dGouyh7q7OR67z4zGmSG/vlzVaYx9gOaAqcRQYLGPgaW59VQpXXiCDsQ==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240420_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI1MDI1NjgtMjBmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yzsrXDfMdhRABXrn758Kqs3gbJB9cY1BEjtv5gicavU=&emci=f953f579-1aff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=5b502568-20ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=1028753)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83378850/468224487/-1222972528?contactdata=L1bd07Gq71xN3L7fSIYqKP9LZRDtfGPGp/7PW+T8irfrsYe9PXpHXzPIhcpeOfrSM9xqWg9MF/I4tzIio8R5cF08/Sv5k8dGouyh7q7OR67z4zGmSG/vlzVaYx9gOaAqcRQYLGPgaW59VQpXXiCDsQ==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240420_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI1MDI1NjgtMjBmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yzsrXDfMdhRABXrn758Kqs3gbJB9cY1BEjtv5gicavU=&emci=f953f579-1aff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=5b502568-20ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=1028753)

name: Andy Kim
subject: I can beat any of the MAGA Republicans running in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
If Republicans retake the Senate Majority, they’ll use the Senate to enact a nationwide abortion ban, stop our efforts on climate change, and subvert our democracy.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83378813/468224444/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjUwMjU2OC0yMGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1EG0tuEihQnf7PTV_mZHyr_8SI2sh3WhVXG3_ZsCLKE=&emci=08b97992-96fd-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=4b502568-20ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Let's be clear about the stakes of this race: If Republicans retake the Senate Majority, they'll****use the Senate to enact a nationwide abortion ban, stop our efforts on climate change, and subvert our democracy.** I've won NJ's toughest races by bringing a different kind of politics. I'm not a career politician, I'm a public servant. I'm a dad who went to New Jersey public schools, raising his two young boys down the street from where I grew up. **I ran to stand up to Donald Trump.** I ran to protect my family and families like mine when my member of Congress threatened their healthcare. And I'm running now because New Jersey deserves better; we deserve a Senator we can trust, we deserve a Senator who understands what working people go through every day, and we deserve a Senator who will restore integrity back to this seat. While it is not clear who the GOP nominee will be, it is clear that New Jersey cannot afford to be the state that gives the Republican Party control of the Senate again. Donald Trump is the standard bearer for the Republican Party, and our working families can't afford to have someone representing us while pursuing a MAGA agenda of banning abortion nationwide, taking away healthcare from our families, and destroying our democracy. We need the strongest Democrat possible to help mobilize voters this November. I've proven I can beat any of the MAGA Republicans running in this race. But it's going to take all of us to win. clean_body: If Republicans retake the Senate Majority, they’ll use the Senate to enact a nationwide abortion ban, stop our efforts on climate change, and subvert our democracy. | | | | Let's be clear about the stakes of this race: If Republicans retake the Senate Majority, they'lluse the Senate to enact a nationwide abortion ban, stop our efforts on climate change, and subvert our democracy. I've won NJ's toughest races by bringing a different kind of politics. I'm not a career politician, I'm a public servant. I'm a dad who went to New Jersey public schools, raising his two young boys down the street from where I grew up. I ran to stand up to Donald Trump. I ran to protect my family and families like mine when my member of Congress threatened their healthcare. And I'm running now because New Jersey deserves better; we deserve a Senator we can trust, we deserve a Senator who understands what working people go through every day, and we deserve a Senator who will restore integrity back to this seat. While it is not clear who the GOP nominee will be, it is clear that New Jersey cannot afford to be the state that gives the Republican Party control of the Senate again. Donald Trump is the standard bearer for the Republican Party, and our working families can't afford to have someone representing us while pursuing a MAGA agenda of banning abortion nationwide, taking away healthcare from our families, and destroying our democracy. We need the strongest Democrat possible to help mobilize voters this November. I've proven I can beat any of the MAGA Republicans running in this race. subject: A fairer, more compassionate approach

body:
Together, we can build a fairer future for all Americans by ending unjust marijuana imprisonment. | |
---
**“No one should be in jail just for using or possessing marijuana.” -- President Joe Biden** Since taking office, President Biden has prioritized:
1. **Executive actions:** Reviewing and reforming federal drug policies
2. **Support for legislative reform:** Backing efforts to decriminalize marijuana
3. **Community engagement:** Listening to impacted communities
4. **Investment in alternatives:** Funding drug treatment programs

Derek, for far too long, imprisoning individuals for marijuana possession has destroyed lives, disproportionately impacting Black and brown communities. It’s time to fix these injustices and create a fairer, more compassionate approach to marijuana possession. clean_body: Together, we can build a fairer future for all Americans by ending unjust marijuana imprisonment. | | “No one should be in jail just for using or possessing marijuana.” -- President Joe Biden Since taking office, President Biden has prioritized: 1. Executive actions: Reviewing and reforming federal drug policies 2. Support for legislative reform: Backing efforts to decriminalize marijuana 3. Community engagement: Listening to impacted communities 4. Investment in alternatives: Funding drug treatment programs Derek, for far too long, imprisoning individuals for marijuana possession has destroyed lives, disproportionately impacting Black and brown communities. It’s time to fix these injustices and create a fairer, more compassionate approach to marijuana possession. Thank you for your support, The Democrats | | | | ---|---|--- Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Building a strong economy starts with ensuring workers’ rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I know firsthand the crucial role unions play for workers and the working class. Peter — I am proud to come from a union family.

I know firsthand the crucial role unions play for workers and the working class, _that’s why I’m honored to be endorsed by six labor unions in St. Louis._

Building a stronger economy starts with fortifying workers' rights and ensuring equity for working Americans. As a former union member (NEA), I understand the importance of standing shoulder-to-shoulder with workers.

In 1967, my grandfather, Reverend Melvin T. Bell, fearlessly spearheaded a strike against Duncan Foundry and Machine Works in Alton, Ill. His leadership resulted in significant improvements in pay and benefits for workers, culminating in a landmark ruling by the National Labor Relations Board.

Fast forward to 2018, amidst the fight against "right-to-work" laws, I took to the streets, knocking on doors to rally support to defeat Proposition A. Together, we stood firm urging voters to say "NO" to measures that threatened workers' rights and fair labor practices. **In Washington, D.C., I will continue to be a strong advocate for workers' rights and a voice that amplifies the need for fair wages and equitable treatment.**

President Joe Biden is making strides at providing good-paying jobs across the nation, and I am committed to advancing these initiatives rather than hindering them. But if I’m going to cross the finish line this November, I’m going to need the support of this grassroots team.

[**That’s why I’m asking: Will chip in $5, or whatever you’re able, to help ensure we have the resources needed to build a winning campaign ahead of Election Day? I entered this race to make sure that the law is used as a tool for justice — to hold special interests accountable, protect reproductive freedom from extreme Republicans, root out injustice, and preserve our democracy. I’m ready to fight for ALL Pennsylvanians and have the track record to prove I can do it.
As the underdogs in this race, we’ve built a truly powerful coalition of grassroots supporters and donors from every corner of Pennsylvania — _as a first-time candidate_!
We’re the reason there is an open primary and election experts are still calling it a “TOSS UP” even with days to go. This campaign is a force to be reckoned with.
