clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Last week, Trump visited Pennsylvania — the largest battleground in the country — to win votes he literally tried to delegitimize in 2020 to overturn the election ... So, what stopped him then and what is going to stop him again in November? Attorney General. That’s why I need your support now more than ever to win my Democratic Primary next week in Pennsylvania. | | I entered this race to make sure that the law is used as a tool for justice — to hold special interests accountable, protect reproductive freedom from extreme Republicans, root out injustice, and preserve our democracy. I’m ready to fight for ALL Pennsylvanians and have the track record to prove I can do it. As the underdogs in this race, we’ve built a truly powerful coalition of grassroots supporters and donors from every corner of Pennsylvania — as a first-time candidate! We’re the reason there is an open primary and election experts are still calling it a “TOSS UP” even with days to go. This campaign is a force to be reckoned with. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Keir for AG and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Here’s to making history on Tuesday, — Keir Bradford-Grey The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: Q1 2024 fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’ve got some good news and some bad news.
#
I’ve got some good news and some bad news for you today, Peter.
**I’ll start with the good news:** After all the first quarter fundraising reports were filed with the FEC this week, we learned that our grassroots campaign outraised Josh Hawley’s campaign — again!
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47252?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX)
**[KEEP IT UP: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47252?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX)**
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again. I’m just so proud of the people-powered, worker-led movement we’ve built together over the last year. And I can’t thank you enough for being part of it, Peter.
**Now, here’s the bad news:** On Hawley’s report, we saw the biggest transfer from DC-aligned groups to his campaign yet.
They know our movement is a threat to their corrupt status quo, so they’ve been doing, saying, and spending whatever it takes since the day I launched this campaign to put Josh Hawley in the position to win.
**I’m counting on you to help my campaign stay prepared for whatever comes next, Peter.[So please, will you chip in $10 or whatever feels right for you today so we can keep up this record-breaking momentum and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47252?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47253?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/47252?refcode=em20240420-5311&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5311%2E614464%2E4SMntX)

This election is our one and only chance to hold Hawley accountable for his attacks on everyday Missourians — and we can’t afford to waste it.

clean_body: I’ve got some good news and some bad news. I’ve got some good news and some bad news for you today, Peter. I’ll start with the good news: After all the first quarter fundraising reports were filed with the FEC this week, we learned that our grassroots campaign outraised Josh Hawley’s campaign — again! I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again. I’m just so proud of the people-powered, worker-led movement we’ve built together over the last year. And I can’t thank you enough for being part of it, Peter. Now, here’s the bad news: On Hawley’s report, we saw the biggest transfer from DC-aligned groups to his campaign yet. They know our movement is a threat to their corrupt status quo, so they’ve been doing, saying, and spending whatever it takes since the day I launched this campaign to put Josh Hawley in the position to win. I’m counting on you to help my campaign stay prepared for whatever comes next, Peter. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: 25 years since Columbine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last night, I attended a vigil in Denver, Colorado where we honored the 13 lives lost in the tragic shooting at Columbine High School on this day 25 years ago.
No matter how many years pass, the pain of losing a loved one to gun violence or living through a shooting never truly goes away. For the last 25 years, survivors of the shooting at Columbine High School have bravely shared their stories, and I was inspired to hear them at the vigil last night. I will always hold them close to my heart.
The fight to end gun violence is a long, hard haul. Since Columbine, over 360,000 students have experienced gun violence in their schools. This is unacceptable, and it’s why I will not rest in the fight to end gun violence until every student in our nation can go to school without the fear of being a victim of a mass shooting.
The community that gathered in Denver last night proved that we are stronger together. As we honored the lives lost or forever changed at Columbine High School 25 years ago, we also looked ahead to the future. The gun violence prevention movement is now stronger than ever. We made leaps and bounds in our progress two years ago with the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act—the most significant gun safety law passed in nearly 30 years. And just last week, President Biden finalized a rule that addresses loopholes and brings us closer to universal background checks than we’ve ever been before.
We couldn’t have made this progress without you and your commitment to GIFFORDS. The fight is far from over. But with your help, we can continue to turn pain into purpose and make our country a safer, better place. Thank you for all that you do for our movement to end gun violence.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240420-1-30&t=1&akid=7984%2E3935704%2E3NLOHH)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=7984%2E3935704%2E3NLOHH) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Michael Maher
subject: U.S. Cyber Command on Alert
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12791169?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=1588382b09&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | April 20, 2024

Dear Friend,

This week, FBI Director Robert Wray told a House Select Committee that Chinese Communist Party hackers are positioning against American infrastructure in “preparation to do real-world harm against Americans.”

As a former FBI Special Agent familiar with counterterrorism and cyber warfare, I can tell you that we are at risk. From our banking to communication systems and how we operate and live our daily lives, the U.S. homeland, including our Central Valley, is under threat.

U.S. Cyber Command is a division of the Department of Defense charged with, as they say, “owning the domain” —strengthening our nation’s ability to repel cyber threats and attacks. They are critical in the mission of protecting us from the Chinese Communist Party threat.

Let’s be frank. These advanced technological threats require new, capable leadership in Congress. Our congressional incumbent, Jim Costa, is not prepared or equipped to help lead us into the future or understand these advanced threats.

I’m prepared. I will be ready on day 1 when elected to Congress, but I need your help to get there.

Will you invest in our future with a $5 recurring gift today? OR will you make a one time contribution of $20, $50, $100 or whatever you can do?
---
| Please chip in $10, $20, $100, or whatever you can do today!
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=6230d18bdb&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Your support goes directly to our grassroots volunteers efforts and helps us communicate with hundreds of thousands of voters in the Central Valley.

Your gift today will help position us to win in November and take on these real-time cyber threats from the Chinese Communist Party and other adversaries of the United States.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**

| **About:**_ Michael Maher was raised in Tulare County where his parents still live and his father, who had been a pastor for over 30 years, continues to shepherd his church congregation in community. Michael and his wife Anne, who comes from a local multigenerational valley farming family, live in Fresno County where their two children attend local public school and where Michael owns and operates his aviation business. _

_Maher is a United States Navy veteran, and served abroad the USS Salt Lake City, a Los Angeles Class Fast Attack Submarine. Following the Navy, Michael graduated from Fresno Pacific University and then was accepted and graduated from FBI Academy in Quantico, Virginia. Michael served as a Special Agent for the Bureau working in the National Security Division. Additionally with the FBI, Maher was the Counterproliferation Coordinator for the Los Angeles Field Office which included responsibility in supervision of Chemical Weapons Inspections._

clean_body: | | | | | | | April 20, 2024 Dear Friend, This week, FBI Director Robert Wray told a House Select Committee that Chinese Communist Party hackers are positioning against American infrastructure in “preparation to do real-world harm against Americans.” As a former FBI Special Agent familiar with counterterrorism and cyber warfare, I can tell you that we are at risk. From our banking to communication systems and how we operate and live our daily lives, the U.S. homeland, including our Central Valley, is under threat. U.S. Cyber Command is a division of the Department of Defense charged with, as they say, “owning the domain” —strengthening our nation’s ability to repel cyber threats and attacks. They are critical in the mission of protecting us from the Chinese Communist Party threat. Let’s be frank. These advanced technological threats require new, capable leadership in Congress. Our congressional incumbent, Jim Costa, is not prepared or equipped to help lead us into the future or understand these advanced threats. I’m prepared. I will be ready on day 1 when elected to Congress, but I need your help to get there. Will you invest in our future with a $5 recurring gift today? OR will you make a one time contribution of $20, $50, $100 or whatever you can do? | Please chip in $10, $20, $100, or whatever you can do today! | "DONATE NOW" | Your support goes directly to our grassroots volunteers efforts and helps us communicate with hundreds of thousands of voters in the Central Valley. Your gift today will help position us to win in November and take on these real-time cyber threats from the Chinese Communist Party and other adversaries of the United States. Thank you in advance for your help! Under President Biden's watch, it continues to strengthen: 📉 Unemployment has remained below 4% for the longest period in over 50 years. 📈 Wages are up. 📈 The economy is growing from the middle out and the bottom up. Meanwhile, Donald Trump and his extreme MAGA allies are attacking President Biden and anybody who supports him. We’re not going to sit back and let the GOP smear the president’s record with lies. That’s why we’re counting on President Biden's supporters to step up and show Republicans that we couldn’t be prouder to stand with the president. So, as one of our top supporters, we want to ask you: Do you approve of President Biden? Thank you, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | ** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Can you believe it, Peter? Primary Election Day is 3 days away!

Team Keir is going all out this weekend — our _last weekend_ — to make sure we reach as many voters as possible before the big day.

Making sure we have the resources to get out and talk to voters through Election Day is critical and will make all the difference at this stage of the race, Peter. If we fall short of this goal, we might have to cut back on our crucial voter outreach efforts at a time when it matters most.

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s time to end the war on drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m more committed than ever to this fight.
#
Happy 420, folks 🥦
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/2024-legal-weed-petition-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=8934%2E434096%2E20zx3y)
I’ve been clear for _*years*_ about what Legal Weed 4 PA means:
1️⃣ **More justice** for all those criminalized for a plant.
2️⃣ **More revenue** for our state.
3️⃣ **More jobs** for our farmers.
I’m more committed than ever to this fight – for *full* cannabis legalization + to end the War on Drugs.
[**If you’re with me on that, sign our petition today to show your support for legal weed.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/2024-legal-weed-petition-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=8934%2E434096%2E20zx3y)
**[Add your name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/2024-legal-weed-petition-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=8934%2E434096%2E20zx3y)**
– John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240420-8934-footer&t=1&refcode2=8934_434096_20zx3y&akid=8934%2E434096%2E20zx3y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8934%2E434096%2E20zx3y)

subject: Stand Against Hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee[contact us](mailto:info@ourtenn
body:
We need your help. | | | | | [](https://ourtenn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a95bfbc579ccf722fbe5af10&id=5ab187701f&e=dd6ea0462d)

Peter,
As we face unprecedented MAGA attacks on our rights, your steadfast support is crucial to sustaining our fight for justice, equality, and the preservation of our democratic values. It is unbelievable that these extremist Tennessee politicians are making Trump look like a moderate.
They don’t just want an extremist agenda, they are trying to end democracy right here, in Tennessee!
We know these issues are important to you. [Become a monthly donor](https://ourtenn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a95bfbc579ccf722fbe5af10&id=32627922d5&e=dd6ea0462d) to support Tennessee Democrats as they fight against the bigoted, racist, and hate-filled agenda that the MAGA GOP brings to our great state.
[Contribute $10 a month](https://ourtenn.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a95bfbc579ccf722fbe5af10&id=2a3bf241d5&e=dd6ea0462d)
Our Democratic legislators can’t win this fight alone. Monthly donors play a pivotal role in our ability to plan strategically, mobilize effectively, and respond promptly to emerging issues. By committing to a regular contribution, you ensure a steady stream of resources that empowers us to challenge the attacks on our democracy, fight against racial gerrymandering, and advocate for the rights of every Tennessean.
Your sustained commitment allows us to sustain our efforts, amplify our message, and build a stronger foundation for the future of Tennessee. As we confront the challenges ahead, we need champions like you by our side, supporting us every step of the way.
With you in Tennessee,
Chris Murdoch
Our Tennessee Future PAC

clean_body: With the primary election just around the corner, we wanted to take a moment to emphasize the clear difference between Matt and his opponent. | Peter, With the primary election just around the corner, we wanted to take a moment to emphasize the clear difference between Matt and his opponent. Matt has been a tireless advocate for the people of PA-08, fighting for their interests every step of the way. Meanwhile, his opponent has already pledged his allegiance to Speaker Mike Johnson and the chaotic,useless House majority. We can't afford to fall into party politics and support candidates who prioritize their party over the needs of their constituents. What we need is real leadership, and Matt embodies just that. This primary election is our chance to send a powerful message to everyone: PA-08 stands behind Matt. But we can't do it without your support. Your contribution, no matter the amount, will help us make a strong showing this Tuesday and set the stage for a successful general election campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. Fellow American,

Schumer literally just argued that the offense Mayorkas is charged with in article II of the impeachment articles — knowingly making false statements to Congress — is not impeachable. THIS IS A CODE RED.

This is not okay! I’m worried that the American people aren’t paying close enough attention to this, I need to raise $1,115 ASAP in order to fund additional outreach and make sure Biden’s border czar is held accountable.

Hey, it's Jared. Have you been getting my emails? Thank you!!
Darin

clean_body: | | | Trump is one of the only Republicans to endorse hate monger and candidate for NC Governor Mark Robinson, yet the polls are way too close for comfort. The extreme nature of Mark Robinson’s campaign is creating a level of toxicity that prevents even the most notable Republican leaders from endorsing him. However, Robinson does have ONE key endorsement... Any guesses? Yup, fellow extremist grifter, Donald Trump. North Carolina’s Republican Treasurer said he wasn’t going to “waste” his vote on “history’s latest example of someone trying to rise to power through hate.” Mark Robinson has said the LGBTQ+ community is “filth,” women shouldn’t be allowed to vote, and the Holocaust was “hogwash.” Friend, polls show a very close race for NC Governor... Too close for comfort in fact. We’ve got to REJECT hate. name: Mark Warner
subject: The only thing preventing an abortion ban in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If not for our Democratic legislature, we might be facing the same restrictions as Arizona.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83389689/468248334/205180178?refcode=mw_em_240420_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNlMzkyNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbVupixYExPmn4-AHi0cAxbPfGn_jDdQpSkb_DyW4Po=) Derek,

In the eleven days since the Arizona Supreme Court banned abortion in nearly all circumstances by reinstating a 160-year-old ban, Democrats in the state legislature tried twice to repeal the ban.

State Republicans blocked it, both times.

The situation in Arizona is abhorrent and horrifying. Critical health care services are at risk due to this ban, which threatens abortion providers with a prison sentence of two to five years. It also underscores the importance of Democratic legislatures – here in Virginia, Republicans pushed a similar bill earlier this year, which was defeated thanks to Democratic control of the state House.

**_[**We must continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight to codify _Roe_ into law and protect reproductive health care for every American. If you agree, please, chip in $5 now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83389690/468248336/205180178?refcode=mw_em_240420_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNlMzkyNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbVupixYExPmn4-AHi0cAxbPfGn_jDdQpSkb_DyW4Po=)_**

We know this is not the end of the fight.

In Arizona and at the federal level, we will continue to push to restore and protect the right of all to make their own health care decisions. Here in Virginia, where we know that Republicans will continue to push draconian bans like this one, we must ensure that we continue to elect Democratic majorities who will defend that right.

**_[**I hope you’ll stand with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83389691/468248338/205180178?refcode=mw_em_240420_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNlMzkyNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbVupixYExPmn4-AHi0cAxbPfGn_jDdQpSkb_DyW4Po=)_**

Thank you,

Mark Warner****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83389692/468248340/205180178?refcode=mw_em_240420_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNlMzkyNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbVupixYExPmn4-AHi0cAxbPfGn_jDdQpSkb_DyW4Po=)****

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: please read. don’t delete.

body:
---

name: Team Bohannan
subject: The GOP wants to put Social Security on the chopping block
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
Republicans are once again attempting to chip away at the vital benefits millions rely on.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83390025/468249119/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY0NWFiNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3swfK--by2N1bucvZX_BW1heN8skKdr6VihANWOwq4=)
Peter,

Republicans are once again attempting to chip away at the vital benefits millions rely on. Donald Trump openly stated his willingness to cut Social Security, and House Republicans have proposed raising the retirement age in their latest budget proposal. **This is unacceptable.**

**[We’re launching a petition to tell Republicans to keep their hands off everyday Americans' hard-earned benefits and protect Social Security – will you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83390026/468249120/2048136505?ms=em24_240420_sspet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em24_240420_sspet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em24_240420_sspet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240420_sspet_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=WdcfKtRq00bS0rphdfoYMEbxo/0QqSuXyyXTyOO1z0GOaTSGIaWya6JAM2VtmXmAazgdt+zh5/G45gCwQSi1UKHDA9WqXjKuL+dnGtFJqRCNP7eHQxXBSP0FSFlWaze78ZMORyS531B74SzFNl+LeYJWnCCVFxJU213xfKH3Cq4=&refcode2=c4f45ab6-2bff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY0NWFiNi0yYmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N3swfK--by2N1bucvZX_BW1heN8skKdr6VihANWOwq4=&emci=1a392c8d-78fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c4f45ab6-2bff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13891890)**

Social Security is not just a safety net; **it's a lifeline for countless individuals and families who have worked hard their entire lives, including Christina’s.** When Christina’s father got sick and insurance companies canceled his insurance, Social Security and Medicare helped her family keep food on the table, gas in the car, and helped pay for his medication. Cutting Social Security benefits would be unconscionable and could have devastating consequences.

**Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her Republican allies have repeatedly tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to fund tax breaks for wealthy corporations and billionaires. But we won't stand for it.**

Christina is committed to protecting Social Security for _all_ Americans. In Congress, she will fight tirelessly against any GOP attempts to gut this essential program.

clean_body: Republicans are once again attempting to chip away at the vital benefits millions rely on. | = Peter, Republicans are once again attempting to chip away at the vital benefits millions rely on. Donald Trump openly stated his willingness to cut Social Security, and House Republicans have proposed raising the retirement age in their latest budget proposal. This is unacceptable. Social Security is not just a safety net; it's a lifeline for countless individuals and families who have worked hard their entire lives, including Christina’s. When Christina’s father got sick and insurance companies canceled his insurance, Social Security and Medicare helped her family keep food on the table, gas in the car, and helped pay for his medication. Cutting Social Security benefits would be unconscionable and could have devastating consequences. Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her Republican allies have repeatedly tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to fund tax breaks for wealthy corporations and billionaires. But we won't stand for it. Christina is committed to protecting Social Security for all Americans. In Congress, she will fight tirelessly against any GOP attempts to gut this essential program. Thank you, Team Bohannan = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. clean_body: Our country isn’t just complicit in this genocide—we’re actively participating in it. | | | Friend, Today, the House of Representatives is set to vote on a bill that would send over $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu as he carries out the genocide of Palestinians in Gaza. The atrocities being committed by the Israeli government are horrific and well-documented. All across Gaza, the medical system has been deliberately and intentionally destroyed. Doctors and journalists have found that Israeli snipers have been deliberately targeting children. At least 14,000 children have already been slaughtered in the past 6 months. Their lives and futures have been stolen, with U.S. support. And another child is killed in Gaza every 10 minutes, according to UNICEF. We must act now to save lives. | This week, doctors who’ve been treating patients in Gaza came to Congress to show Congresspeople what they’ve seen, pleading with them to see Palestinians’ humanity and asking them to take action. Thank you for speaking up for our shared humanity. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Apr 19, 2024 Subject: Sign to tell Congress before tomorrow’s vote: Don’t send $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s government while it commits genocide. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Tomorrow, my colleagues in Congress want to vote to send over $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu as he carries out the genocide of Palestinians in Gaza. Our country isn’t just complicit in this genocide—we’re actively participating in it. Every year our country spends billions of tax dollars, which help maintain Israel’s apartheid policies and support the continued ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. Over many years, the U.S. has shielded Israel’s government from any accountability as it violates international laws. And this week, President Biden’s administration just vetoed a motion to grant Palestine full membership in the United Nations (UN), undermining their claims to support Palestinians’ self-determination. Netanyahu continues to escalate the risk of a regional war by consistently violating international law. For the entire world’s sake, we must avoid this. For the sake of the children in Gaza and our future humanity, we must demand peace instead of endless war. Thank you for continuing to affirm the value of all life, no matter faith or ethnicity. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The SAFER Banking Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
More than half of the United States has enacted legislation allowing for either medical or adult-use of recreational cannabis, yet federal law remains in conflict.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83391963/468252986/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTE2ZTAxOC0yZWZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8daj8TrOuHraFHTyJLanrljfcU4zr7sZfkz_kacBMk=&emci=940998a3-6dfe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=3516e018-2eff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Today, I want to take a moment to talk about cannabis and why we should end the federal prohibition on it. More than half of the United States — in red states and blue states — has enacted legislation allowing for either medical or recreational adult-use of cannabis, yet it remains illegal under federal law. This creates significant problems, not only with the prosecution of nonviolent cannabis crimes — which disproportionately hurts people of color — but also with the lack of banking services for legally operating businesses, which forces these businesses to operate in an all-cash environment that's unsafe and lacks accountability. In 2014, I was the first U.S. Senator to support legalizing marijuana in their state at the federal level for many reasons. And I’m continuing to introduce legislation that would make it safer for businesses and consumers. **In 2023, I introduced a bipartisan bill, the Secure and Fair Enforcement Regulation (SAFER) Banking Act** , that would end the cannabis cash economy and ensure cannabis businesses have access to banking and financial services — including bank accounts and small business loans — they need to operate safely. This bill, a successor to the SAFE Banking Act, which I have led since 2015, is an important step forward for cannabis businesses. **The cash cannabis economy is dangerous for everyone.**
* It’s dangerous for the retailers – with more than 100 retail outlets robbed in the last year in Oregon alone.
* It’s dangerous for customers arriving with cash in their pocket and employees who might be leaving with their monthly pay in their pocket.
* It’s dangerous for owners who might be transporting cash to the State Capitol to pay their quarterly taxes.
* It’s an open invitation to money laundering and organized crime.

**None of this is good for anyone, and it needs to change with the passage of the SAFER Banking Act.** In addition, our veterans deserve access to treatments like medical marijuana that help address PTSD and other conditions. **Outdated laws should never censor veterans' doctor-patient relationships.** That's why I supported an amendment to the Fiscal Year 2024 Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act to protect veterans' ability to discuss with VA physicians the use of medical cannabis in states where it is legal. **Finally, I support the Marijuana Justice Act, which would decriminalize marijuana by removing it from the list of scheduled substances under the Controlled Substances Act.** The legislation also seeks to reverse failed drug policies that disproportionately impact communities of color by expunging federal possession convictions and reinvesting in communities most impacted by the War on Drugs. Cannabis has been legalized or decriminalized in many states across the country, but federal law still lags behind. Americans are ready for progress on cannabis, and these bills are much-needed steps to make our country a more equitable place as well as create opportunities for small cannabis businesses to operate safely. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: More than half of the United States has enacted legislation allowing for either medical or adult-use of recreational cannabis, yet federal law remains in conflict. | | | | Today, I want to take a moment to talk about cannabis and why we should end the federal prohibition on it. More than half of the United States — in red states and blue states — has enacted legislation allowing for either medical or recreational adult-use of cannabis, yet it remains illegal under federal law. This creates significant problems, not only with the prosecution of nonviolent cannabis crimes — which disproportionately hurts people of color — but also with the lack of banking services for legally operating businesses, which forces these businesses to operate in an all-cash environment that's unsafe and lacks accountability. In 2014, I was the first U.S. Senator to support legalizing marijuana in their state at the federal level for many reasons. And I’m continuing to introduce legislation that would make it safer for businesses and consumers. In 2023, I introduced a bipartisan bill, the Secure and Fair Enforcement Regulation (SAFER) Banking Act , that would end the cannabis cash economy and ensure cannabis businesses have access to banking and financial services — including bank accounts and small business loans — they need to operate safely. This bill, a successor to the SAFE Banking Act, which I have led since 2015, is an important step forward for cannabis businesses. The cash cannabis economy is dangerous for everyone. It’s dangerous for the retailers – with more than 100 retail outlets robbed in the last year in Oregon alone. It’s dangerous for customers arriving with cash in their pocket and employees who might be leaving with their monthly pay in their pocket. It’s dangerous for owners who might be transporting cash to the State Capitol to pay their quarterly taxes. It’s an open invitation to money laundering and organized crime. None of this is good for anyone, and it needs to change with the passage of the SAFER Banking Act. In addition, our veterans deserve access to treatments like medical marijuana that help address PTSD and other conditions. Outdated laws should never censor veterans' doctor-patient relationships. That's why I supported an amendment to the Fiscal Year 2024 Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act to protect veterans' ability to discuss with VA physicians the use of medical cannabis in states where it is legal. Finally, I support the Marijuana Justice Act, which would decriminalize marijuana by removing it from the list of scheduled substances under the Controlled Substances Act. The legislation also seeks to reverse failed drug policies that disproportionately impact communities of color by expunging federal possession convictions and reinvesting in communities most impacted by the War on Drugs. Cannabis has been legalized or decriminalized in many states across the country, but federal law still lags behind. Americans are ready for progress on cannabis, and these bills are much-needed steps to make our country a more equitable place as well as create opportunities for small cannabis businesses to operate safely. Onward! name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: What we're building toward
body:
Friends,

When I look at the progress we've made this year, I'm encouraged about where we're going -- because the work has never been more important.
You know I'm not one for hyperbole. Our democracy really is on the line this year. And our freedoms -- like a woman's right to control over her own body and reproductive decisions -- are on the line with it.

My parents, who are both special education teachers, taught me that the best way for everyone to flourish is for everyone to have a seat at the table. They also taught me having a seat at the table is not just a right, but a responsibility. We all have to do our part to protect our rights and our freedoms.

Those are the stakes of this election. What we're building toward is a future where everyone's voice is heard and every citizen can have confidence his or her vote has been counted. We've already achieved the most secure and transparent elections in history right here in Michigan, and we're going to keep building on that legacy. When election deniers cry fraud, we'll fight it with the truth.
We've got just over six months to make an impact for pro-democracy, pro-woman candidates across Michigan. Today's campaign finance deadline is a chance for our team to take stock of what we're going to be able to do the rest of the year. If you can, please pitch in today -- your support has never been more important. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michiganlegacypac?refcode=emq224]
From our state Supreme Court to key House races around the state, we're all in to elect pro-democracy and pro-woman candidates. Our voices are going to be the difference this year. And I'm even more excited to keep building our network of Democracy Defenders everywhere -- that means you and the thousands of Michiganders who have already stepped up to be part of our movement. It will take all of us working together to make sure our democracy can work for everyone.

That's our mission, and I'm grateful you're with me.

Thank you for all that you do to defend our democracy.

-Jocelyn

PAID FOR WITH REGULATED FUNDS BY MICHIGAN LEGACY PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.
PO Box 21910,
Detroit MI 48221.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fqSK2PQg_UCkKErG0V0_Ew2?unsubscribedata=meEGLdv6ih6Ls12FTthD%2B2FopmQa0C4jPUEsMbwaqENQHyqbAlgjojGtf%2BPRM%2Bgbnaa0oWQEotq1fn%2B%2FOwhfeMJfvOgt4EhT0fxSbhNPG3a%2FmlklWHxmQd2KIAted7OSdpqM4%2BfvOGg2oN1EoynjFbdIQNTNv1uo2l1unMPYZjbKD%2Fn%2BrJp2abb%2F4CQSMBytseuLCvu%2FVZ5Qqf4FYXN%2BVNS2gQrXGvWQVKBAkcJ9MbuiotfL2Q%2FIQyN6FVqzTvegEjb1BCsq4ubSKjh%2BYg89CvdMkH5bdwc1KLK4mbolTXkSFUXI5%2BPZC%2Fpd9MOdBBnTMjq%2FidVYPJgUy73Re5I84qTtkkcxVr%2Bg51M52VE2AcSGbWwTywhGCvU9O8OwvuKHJTwjVHwHrmACEiWOIA0%2F6xtQu1Lagtbq6noiABxZoeo%3D .

name: George Whitesides HQ
subject: 3 things to know (quick)
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83393004/468256227/-731719488?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzODYxMi0yZmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Gsxu1IzwUsujpzxaynNdZ1CE-OEk13xcJLL6owKQL0=)

subject: Republicans are once again trying to take away your hard-earned benefits

body:
Time and time again, Republicans have tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to pay for their handouts to greedy corporations and billionaires.
Team,

Republicans are once again trying to take away your hard-earned benefits. Donald Trump himself said he is willing to cut Social Security, and House Republicans have proposed raising the age of retirement in their latest budget proposal.

Let's be clear: **Social Security is a critical lifeline for millions of Americans. Cutting it is unconscionable.** Time and time again, Republicans have tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to pay for their handouts to greedy corporations and billionaires. We know they won't stop until they get their way.

As millions of working families struggle to keep up with rising costs due to corporate price gouging, leaders in Congress should be fighting to lower costs and make life easier for everyday Americans. **In Congress, I will not rest so long as Republicans continue their cruel attempts to gut Social Security.**

clean_body: Time and time again, Republicans have tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to pay for their handouts to greedy corporations and billionaires. Team, Republicans are once again trying to take away your hard-earned benefits. Donald Trump himself said he is willing to cut Social Security, and House Republicans have proposed raising the age of retirement in their latest budget proposal. Let's be clear: Social Security is a critical lifeline for millions of Americans. Cutting it is unconscionable. Time and time again, Republicans have tried to put Social Security on the chopping block to pay for their handouts to greedy corporations and billionaires. We know they won't stop until they get their way. As millions of working families struggle to keep up with rising costs due to corporate price gouging, leaders in Congress should be fighting to lower costs and make life easier for everyday Americans. In Congress, I will not rest so long as Republicans continue their cruel attempts to gut Social Security. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- In solidarity, Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: NYC Authorities Cancel Dr. West Rally After Peaceful Columbia Protest
body:
Due to decisions by city authorities, our planned 4/20 rally has been postponed until 5/21.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=1)
---
## **Authorities Cancel 4/20 Peace Rally After Peaceful Columbia Protest**
**In a deeply troubling move, authorities have unjustly canceled our planned April 20th rally for peace, reframing it as a protest requiring police oversight.** This action is a powerful reminder of the ongoing challenges we face in our pursuit of justice and equity. This forceful suppression of our peaceful assembly rights for a Free Gaza underscores the urgent need for your support.
---
### **Save the date for the upcoming May 21 rally—we will reach out with more details as they become available.**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/columbia?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=2 "Donate Today - Help Us Stand Against the Duopoly ") [Donate Today - Help Us Stand Against the Duopoly ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/columbia?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=3)
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/columbia?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=4)
---
## **Stand Up Now for Independent Choices and Voices!**
**We urgently need donations to combat these oppressive tactics and continue our peaceful push for a society that prioritizes people over profit.

** Join us in this fight for our democratic right to gather, speak out, and advocate for a future that reflects our shared values of truth, justice and love against genocide.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/columbia?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=5 "INDEPENDENTS PROTECT INDEPENDENCE! DONATE NOW") [INDEPENDENTS PROTECT INDEPENDENCE! DONATE NOW](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/columbia?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=5)
---
## **The DNC has Openly Declared War on Independents & Voter Independence**
---
|
---|---
| **As we fight for ballot access in all 50 states, your support is essential to give voters a choice for an independent voice!** The DNC has escalated its campaign against third-party voices, declaring an all-out war on those who dare to challenge the bipartisan hegemony. Together we work toward a long-term vision to reshape our governance and affirm that true democracy thrives on human respect, diversity, dialogue, and dissent--especially in the face of violent international assaults and the militarization of our cities. Stand with us NOW to ensure voters have a choice. **Value Your Vote. Dismiss the Duopoly.**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_april_rally_cancel&n=6)

---
Keep an eye on our official campaign channels for the latest information and campaign news. Thank you for your continued support of Cornel West's candidacy. Together, we can build a brighter future for all. In solidarity, **Team Cornel West 2024** _**P.S. Do not underestimate the power of your voice—help spread the word that we have an option for TRUTH, JUSTICE and LOVE in 2024 so future generations can have brighter options that put people before party.**_
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Folks, Jim Jordan has spent the last 16 months chasing his own tail on fruitless impeachment hearings. And, despite thousands of taxpayer dollars wasted, he still doesn’t have a shred of evidence. That time and money could’ve been spent helping Ohio farmers, small businesses, veterans, school systems, and so much more. But, no, Jim Jordan just HAD to waste all of this time and money to please his MAGA Extremist supporters. Frankly, enough is enough. Jim Jordan isn’t serious about doing the job of a Congressperson - and now it’s on us to defeat him. | | | | | | | Wilson is ready to hit the ground running on Day One in Congress. In fact, she’s already hard at work drafting bills that will make a real difference for the working-class. She just needs your help to defeat Jordan once and for all. Thanks, Team Tamie Wilson for US | | | | | | | | | | | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | | | Mail checks to: Tamie Wilson for US 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

Hi there, With less than a week to go until the Pennsylvania primary on April 23rd, we need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter and leader in our people-powered movement — Pittsburgh’s champion, Summer Lee. If you haven’t already seen the news, Summer’s race is full of 🚩 BIG RED FLAGS 🚩 that EVERY voter deserves to know about, especially now with less than 1 week to go. **[But before we get into it, consider clicking here to make a donation to Summer Lee’s campaign today. With all the Republican money stacked against her, we need all hands on deck to help her fight back! Whether it’s $5, $50, or $500 — every dollar counts!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393741/468258067/775217707?amount=5&refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393742/468258068/775217707?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=) **Here’s what Summer is up against:**
* PA’s richest Republican and the #1 Republican donor in the entire country, Jeff Yass, has already [spent](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393743/468258069/1273468675?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) a **WHOPPING **$800,000**** against Summer. Instead of challenging her policies, these ads lie to voters about Summer’s record and prop up her “Democratic” opponent. **The shocking part is that Yass has spent more money trying to help Summer’s opponent than her opponent has spent on their own campaign!**

**Why is this a big deal?**
* Jeff Yass is THE top donor to the Republican party right now (he’s given $54 million to Republicans this cycle), and [he's using his deep pockets](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393744/468258070/-1576315983?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) to support Summer’s Democratic opponent. This should set off alarms everywhere. ⏰

* Yass is in tight with Trump. Not only is he Trump’s top pick for Treasury Secretary, but he even got a shout-out from [Trump calling him “fantastic”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393745/468258071/-1083158658?sh=2710d76017d6&refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) and recently [helped him raise MILLIONS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393746/468258072/301416765?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)!

* [Yass bailed out Trump’s Truth Social](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393747/468258073/-770324807?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) to bankroll Trump’s campaign and pay his million-dollar legal fees.

* His money has fueled efforts to [strip away abortion rights](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393748/468258074/597741006?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105), [undermine public education](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393749/468258075/2102646294?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105), and ensure the wealthy [don’t pay their fair share in taxes](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393750/468258076/-495435308?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105).

* Despite Yass’ PAC’s intentionally deceptive name, the “Moderate PAC” is anything but moderate — with [Yass funding a staggering 77%](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393751/468258077/-743457661?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)! Since when is it okay for [Trump’s anti-abortion financier and potential Treasury Secretary](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393752/468258078/1586490088?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) to **_**LIE TO VOTERS**_** about Summer’s record and [associate her with Donald Trump](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393753/468258079/2032054986?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105)?

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393754/468258080/2032054986?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) **On top of ALL that, Summer’s Democratic opponent actually asked Republicans to switch parties just to vote against her in the primary.** This is a clear attempt to push out a leader like Summer who has always stood up for what's right — like better jobs, clean air and water, and making sure everyone has a fair shot. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393755/468258081/-1323205137?refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=&emci=a4e286d6-64fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=4823105) They’re afraid of what Summer stands for because she's tough, she never gives up, and she will always challenge the status quo for the good of the people. **The Republican billionaires know Summer is a strong candidate that won’t be bought out by big money, and they're pulling out every single trick in the book to take her down.** **We have to ask ourselves: Why would a Republican spend so much money to help a Democrat? It’s not support, it’s strategy!** Now more than ever, we have to have Summer's back. We are appealing to all our supporters and allies to rally behind her and help counteract the Republican billionaires trying to play in our primaries! **[Your contribution today can make a real difference as we work to inform voters and combat these shady tactics. Will you click here today, donate a few bucks, and show Summer that we ALL have her back just like she has ours?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83393756/468258082/775217707?amount=5&refcode=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ms=ea.c84fc17e-2fff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NGZjMTdlLTJmZmYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTdjMWU1MjAxNzAzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rue3MJXPb_JR8p2_AgWdhMI8uFh9wD6C34sYzLSHZz4=)** **It’s “Summer-Time!”** Let's show them what we're made of and keep fighting for what's right! Our progressive movement has always been about sticking together and protecting the future we all want and deserve. clean_body: | Hi there, With less than a week to go until the Pennsylvania primary on April 23rd, we need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter and leader in our people-powered movement — Pittsburgh’s champion, Summer Lee. If you haven’t already seen the news, Summer’s race is full of 🚩 BIG RED FLAGS 🚩 that EVERY voter deserves to know about, especially now with less than 1 week to go. = = Here’s what Summer is up against: PA’s richest Republican and the #1 Republican donor in the entire country, Jeff Yass, has already a WHOPPING $800,000 against Summer. Instead of challenging her policies, these ads lie to voters about Summer’s record and prop up her “Democratic” opponent. The shocking part is that Yass has spent more money trying to help Summer’s opponent than her opponent has spent on their own campaign! Why is this a big deal? Jeff Yass is THE top donor to the Republican party right now (he’s given $54 million to Republicans this cycle), and to support Summer’s Democratic opponent. This should set off alarms everywhere. ⏰ Yass is in tight with Trump. Not only is he Trump’s top pick for Treasury Secretary, but he even got a shout-out from and recently ! to bankroll Trump’s campaign and pay his million-dollar legal fees. His money has fueled efforts to , , and ensure the wealthy . Despite Yass’ PAC’s intentionally deceptive name, the “Moderate PAC” is anything but moderate — with ! Since when is it okay for to LIE TO VOTERS about Summer’s record and ? On top of ALL that, Summer’s Democratic opponent actually asked Republicans to switch parties just to vote against her in the primary. This is a clear attempt to push out a leader like Summer who has always stood up for what's right — like better jobs, clean air and water, and making sure everyone has a fair shot. They’re afraid of what Summer stands for because she's tough, she never gives up, and she will always challenge the status quo for the good of the people. The Republican billionaires know Summer is a strong candidate that won’t be bought out by big money, and they're pulling out every single trick in the book to take her down. We have to ask ourselves: Why would a Republican spend so much money to help a Democrat? It’s not support, it’s strategy! Now more than ever, we have to have Summer's back. We are appealing to all our supporters and allies to rally behind her and help counteract the Republican billionaires trying to play in our primaries! = It’s “Summer-Time!” Let's show them what we're made of and keep fighting for what's right! Our progressive movement has always been about sticking together and protecting the future we all want and deserve. Thank you for being there, for believing in Summer, and for fighting for a future where everyone gets a fair shot! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It's time for the federal government to join the 21st century and legalize marijuana.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Washington needs to get with the program.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2127%2E4032634%2E7IQxEb)
---
It is time for our federal government to join the 21st century and legalize marijuana. But we can’t stop there. We must also ensure justice for people who are incarcerated right now — or have been incarcerated — for non-violent cannabis-related charges. [**Add your name if you agree, and let’s work together to make the federal legalization of marijuana happen.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-legalize/?source=EMZ19T_MAR_E_20240420_V1S1&t=8&akid=2127%2E4032634%2E7IQxEb) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-legalize/?source=EMZ19T_MAR_E_20240420_V1S1&t=9&akid=2127%2E4032634%2E7IQxEb)
---
You know, most Americans already live in a state where marijuana is legal for recreational use. Nearly 3 in 4 live somewhere where it’s legal either medicinally or recreationally. And 88% support some form of legalization.
Washington needs to get with the program.
But I’m not holding my breath for the Republican House of Representatives to leap into action and legalize cannabis.
So I’ve called on the Department of Justice to take its own steps and deschedule marijuana. Right now, marijuana has the same legal status as heroin, and is labeled as more dangerous than fentanyl or cocaine, which makes no scientific sense.
Descheduling would allow for research on medicinal marijuana, tackle criminal penalties that disproportionately hurt Black and Brown communities, restore access to public housing or nutrition assistance for individuals who use marijuana recreationally, and more.
For years, I've stood with those who called on multiple administrations to issue pardons to people convicted of federal non-violent cannabis offenses. President Biden has taken historic steps on that front. And we've seen similar movement at the state level, including in Massachusetts. But we can't stop there.
Look: It’s not justice when we lock up kids caught with an ounce of pot, while hedge fund managers make millions off of the legal sale of marijuana. We can regulate the cannabis industry so it’s safe and legal. And by reinvesting the tax revenue earned from marijuana sales, we can begin to rebuild communities devastated by the policies of the failed War on Drugs, and ensure that those communities are equally able to participate in the cannabis industry.
I’m going to stay on this — and I’d be grateful to have you fighting by my side.
[**Add your name to say you support the federal legalization of marijuana — and the pardoning of individuals convicted of non-violent cannabis offenses so we can start to right this historic wrong.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-legalize/?source=EMZ19T_MAR_E_20240420_V1S1&t=10&akid=2127%2E4032634%2E7IQxEb)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Tell Jim Jordan he is NOT above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Team,
Jim Jordan is running from the consequences of his actions, and the truth is quickly catching up to him.
Spreading his usual propaganda on the far right MAGA network Newsmax, Jordan called the January 6th Committee "partisan" and falsely claimed that they promoted lies about what happened that day.
But we all know exactly why Jordan continues to attack the BIPARTISAN January 6th Committee and defend the rioters who invaded the Capitol and attempted to "hang Mike Pence" while trying to keep Donald Trump in power: Jordan himself is implicated in planning the events of that day with Trump.
That's why Jordan defied a lawful subpoena for his testimony from the January 6th Committee, and continues to hide his role in the insurrection—for over 705 days and counting.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Jim Jordan may be able to spread his lies and MAGA nonsense unchecked on Newsmax and Fox News, but the truth is catching up with him quickly—I'm making sure of it!
Every day I am talking with the voters here and not a single person, Republican, Democrat, or Independent, supports the way Jordan conducts himself in office. He has done nothing for them, passed 0 bills into law over 18 years in office, and never shows up. He is weak and we can defeat him.
The people of Ohio are ready to fire Jim Jordan and hire me to fight for them in Congress.
Can you help me and my team win this race and dump Jim Jordan for the good of the entire country? I need your urgent support to keep up our momentum—please rush a contribution of $25, $50, $100 or more -- split with Serve America -- if you can! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Thank you for your support!
Tamie Wilson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-wilson]
Tamie Wilson
Candidate for Congress (OH-4)

body:
Right now, the zip code you grow up in is the single biggest factor in determining if you will succeed in life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83394328/468260251/-1919350451?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-04-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUwYzI0MjctMzFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fO5xrhY4BPbELtGOl1KfXP8r4JNODSOZbc9BEr9avDU=)

| Hi there, it’s Sam.

I know we send a lot of emails, so I wanted to take a moment to tell you more about myself and why I’m running for Congress.

Growing up, I had access to all the opportunities given to me because my mom pulled herself out of poverty and into the middle class through education. My mom is my hero. She was able to make ends meet, and build a better life for herself and our family. But so many families struggle to make ends meet and don’t get a quality education just because of where they live.

Right now, the zip code you grow up in is the single biggest factor in determining if you will succeed in life. It shouldn’t be this way. Every child deserves the opportunity to achieve their full potential.

So, I was inspired to join Teach for America after college, which led me to teach in one of Dallas’ most underprivileged schools. Then, I wanted to do more to help our students, so I became the youngest principal in Dallas ISD, leading a school where students are able to better prepare themselves for the future.

Now, I’m running for Congress because what our country needs most right now is a new generation of leadership to build a brighter future for everyone, in every zip code.

[_**Will you contribute whatever you can today to join our team and help us flip this seat from red to blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83394330/468260255/-1919350451?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-04-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDUwYzI0MjctMzFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fO5xrhY4BPbELtGOl1KfXP8r4JNODSOZbc9BEr9avDU=)

name: Team AOC
subject: We must continue to grow our progressive power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
One big reason why the Left doesn’t run primary challenger campaigns as often as Republicans do is because _conservative_ primary challenges have billionaires behind them — and _progressive_ primary challenges do not.
That’s why Alexandria started Courage to Change, her leadership PAC to support people-first progressive candidates who fight tooth and nail for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
And this November, there are hundreds of elections happening. **The Left must win as many of them as possible to expand our strength in Congress and chart a path of policy transformation.**
[ Will you help power our movement for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics — by splitting a $5 contribution between Alexandria and Courage to Change today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240420.De5B2B&refcode=em20240420-6232-P_FND_SPL_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6232%2E2526796%2ETj3BMb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240420.De5B2B&refcode=em20240420-6232-P_FND_SPL_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6232%2E2526796%2ETj3BMb)**
Progressives have exerted a lot of influence in the past few years, shaping legislation and expanding our grassroots movement by speaking truth to power.
Alexandria knows that it’s now time to assert our influence in larger institutions. That’s also why she just made her first ever contribution to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee — after the D.C.C.C. agreed to dedicate her dues _entirely_ to the Voter Protection Program.
Democrats will now have the resources to protect every vote in every state to halt the immediate threat of fascism from the MAGA movement.
[Can you split a $5 contribution between Alexandria and Courage to Change today? Your support will have an immediate impact on progressive campaigns, their ability to organize, and our movement’s shot at victory. **[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240420.De5B2B&refcode=em20240420-6232-P_FND_SPL_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=6232%2E2526796%2ETj3BMb)** This is the first time in history that a candidate has specified that their dues be used for voter protection. Thank you for your help. None of this would be possible without you. Our sincerest thanks, Team AOC

clean_body: One big reason why the Left doesn’t run primary challenger campaigns as often as Republicans do is because conservative primary challenges have billionaires behind them — and progressive primary challenges do not. That’s why Alexandria started Courage to Change, her leadership PAC to support people-first progressive candidates who fight tooth and nail for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice. Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class. And this November, there are hundreds of elections happening. The Left must win as many of them as possible to expand our strength in Congress and chart a path of policy transformation. Progressives have exerted a lot of influence in the past few years, shaping legislation and expanding our grassroots movement by speaking truth to power. Alexandria knows that it’s now time to assert our influence in larger institutions. That’s also why she just made her first ever contribution to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee — after the D.C.C.C. agreed to dedicate her dues entirely to the Voter Protection Program. Democrats will now have the resources to protect every vote in every state to halt the immediate threat of fascism from the MAGA movement. This is the first time in history that a candidate has specified that their dues be used for voter protection. Thank you for your help. None of this would be possible without you. Our sincerest thanks, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Insider career politicians like Sherrod Brown are working overtime in D.C. to put America LAST. They care more about Ukraine than they do about our southern border.

**_Enough is enough._
**
[ **STAND WITH RAND AND BERNIE** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=348b92f28ca0461aae10d844469eaecb&_e=Fia9SkBjT3UdpdY26Kn8suANpBP0Ve8r1a_vWosZfKMF1EwsxZONBRnfdT1XBmSSLt26Ts12s9nXOmjtRn4rwIJTE42Ha6pUBo0qr3W1SaL_vDodQezjIWT_sHGC36epJanLFu6glzgf4K2yEsP4Z9Mx23XwS1zIFObeDIqPO5Dk9_mTWSGixBC5Yyxd2Jjsqyi-UaSMjHH3DWx_wHM-FyaidKi52Fx6IEqh5doy8mFVQMDWUEvQj8zGsznLQLLmqOMg9_TVOkwRKVRE_DCBz5PdXBnwkluRPjGHFJhF7eI0NIVT_3AS9fkUkNRlmajxR14xRrvrZuYJmAm40or3Ttx9AkKjW0buXCNgGtGBNDzRucB2VvIOHzmTpPmd8UjjKVhEF7AWTXeZuEdu25pY4eXxY4PoWq9dmtrSCNqUl6M%3D)

For America,

Senator Rand Paul

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=348b92f28ca0461aae10d844469eaecb&_e=Fia9SkBjT3UdpdY26Kn8suANpBP0Ve8r1a_vWosZfKMF1EwsxZONBRnfdT1XBmSSLt26Ts12s9nXOmjtRn4rwIJTE42Ha6pUBo0qr3W1SaL_vDodQezjIWT_sHGC36epJanLFu6glzgf4K2yEsP4Z9Mx23XwS1zIFObeDIqPO5Dk9_mTWSGixBC5Yyxd2Jjsqyi-UaSMjHH3DWx_wHM-FyaidKi52Fx6IEqh5doy8mFVQMDWUEvQj8zGsznLQLLmqOMg9_TVOkwRKVRE_DCBzystWSuZK-knrcpvblLWaaPxcOOM5OEaKJo3WpXJDJ_V_zgu2RLIqGROLxH6DjYi4eVxur0ZhzmT1MrkoasuQAtSjt5yuQ57MTsX4675jqTpbr70nfAYO1chwGY7hn0vTrOoHueB3uL6HMhBt9VydEY%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=348b92f28ca0461aae10d844469eaecb&_e=Fia9SkBjT3UdpdY26Kn8suANpBP0Ve8r1a_vWosZfKMF1EwsxZONBRnfdT1XBmSSLt26Ts12s9nXOmjtRn4rwIJTE42Ha6pUBo0qr3W1SaL_vDodQezjIWT_sHGC36epJanLFu6glzgf4K2yEsP4Z9Mx23XwS1zIFObeDIqPO5Dk9_mTWSGixBC5Yyxd2Jjsqyi-UaSMjHH3DWx_wHM-FyaidKi52Fx6IEqh5doy8mFVQMDWUEvQj8zGsznLQLLmqOMg9_TVOkwRKVRE_DCBzzeDEXyBF7sm4s8g7JOMsjE2j-jx42rUfpkTwkm7yXA8_TV4SWApsqdR-_cm5yqg76OLxei_wYWaK0qxwUUAokg44pa1-u6l_My4vcL5eeA_93t42ilAuOVx3GBfNhshXQxVIoadiXTrBgbd3g_VO5g%3D)
