body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83395248/468264134/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240420_fr_GOTVgoal3_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2EyYWIxNi0zM2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8fmmyUHUqtFFgbkR8xvPp5TGesvtR4RXKTJuqnIfag=)

Hey co-pilot, We had a saying in the military: "I've got your 6." It comes from fighter pilots in World War I, and **it basically means ‘I've got your back’.** Right now, Brian Fitzpatrick does not have Pennsylvanians' 6. He constantly sides with MAGA – on abortion, on gun violence, on our very freedom to vote. I flew Apache helicopters in combat, where my main job was providing cover for troops on the ground. As an Army officer, I had to look out for every single member of my unit and do my utmost to protect them. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83395249/468264136/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240420_fr_GOTVgoal3_cand_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2EyYWIxNi0zM2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8fmmyUHUqtFFgbkR8xvPp5TGesvtR4RXKTJuqnIfag=)
---
I got into this race because folks in Bucks and MontCo need a representative who will have their 6 – something I've got experience doing.
The thing is, I'm a public school kid who went into the Army as a way to afford college. I don't have a rich family or a big network of private school pals who can write max-out checks to my campaign. I'm not taking money from corporate PACs, either.
[Instead, I'm counting on folks like you to have MY 6 – by pitching in whatever you can to raise what we need to win. If you can give just $10, it would mean a lot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83395250/468264138/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240420_fr_GOTVgoal3_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2EyYWIxNi0zM2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8fmmyUHUqtFFgbkR8xvPp5TGesvtR4RXKTJuqnIfag=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey co-pilot, We had a saying in the military: "I've got your 6." It comes from fighter pilots in World War I, and it basically means ‘I've got your back’. Right now, Brian Fitzpatrick does not have Pennsylvanians' 6. He constantly sides with MAGA – on abortion, on gun violence, on our very freedom to vote. I flew Apache helicopters in combat, where my main job was providing cover for troops on the ground. As an Army officer, I had to look out for every single member of my unit and do my utmost to protect them. | = I got into this race because folks in Bucks and MontCo need a representative who will have their 6 – something I've got experience doing. The thing is, I'm a public school kid who went into the Army as a way to afford college. I don't have a rich family or a big network of private school pals who can write max-out checks to my campaign. I'm not taking money from corporate PACs, either. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this with me as my co-pilot, Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Happy 4/20, Peter! It's a real problem that in Washington, politicians have failed to de-schedule marijuana. It's currently a Schedule 1 drug, meaning that the Federal government considers it a drug without any accepted medical use. In 2024, it is crazy that outdated policies consider weed an addictive and dangerous substance. With nearly half of states legalizing it, it's long overdue to do the same on the federal level. Eric Wilson is running for Congress to bring a fresh perspective to today's challenges. He's the most progressive candidate in WI-03, one of the best red-to-blue flip opportunities in the country. In Congress, he'll fight to legalize weed and so much more. Medicare for All. Fighting the climate crisis. Doing more to safeguard our community from gun violence. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Oh no! We're embarrassed...

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Our warehouse is
overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!
With all the worries
about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's
no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food
Kits have sold out over and over again!
So, we asked our
warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food
Kits possible.
And holy cow, did he
deliver!
However, an enormous
batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are
swamped with inventory.
Our pain is your
gain.
Yup, we're
practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands.
When you stock up
today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned
American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll

More Raving Customer

full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been

"I actually had lost
my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply,

The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME.

**First:** The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent.

**Then:** They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom.

**Now:** I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION.

You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.”

Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump.

I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths.

clean_body: | The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME. First: The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent. Then: They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom. Now: I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION. You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.” Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump. I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths. I don’t care if I’m homeless or if I lose everything. NOTHING matters if we don’t win the November election. **If there’s ANYTHING you can spare — your donation will be MATCHED 10X if you donate towards my midnight deadline. Please DONATE BELOW! | Thank you, Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, **.

| Working families in Maryland and across the country are struggling to keep a roof over their heads due to rising housing prices and a lack of affordable housing options.

**We need leaders in Congress who will prioritize attainable housing. That means creating opportunities for the people already living here to help keep our communities safe and strong.**

But it’s going to take innovative solutions to deliver high-quality, affordable housing that is connected to job opportunities, good schools, parks, and transportation.

As County Executive, Johnny O secured the largest attainable housing deals in Baltimore County history – _and he will bring that fight with him to Congress and ensure that people of all backgrounds have access to a home._

clean_body: Summer Lee — one of the biggest champions for working families in Congress — has an election in just 3 DAYS. | | | Hey Peter! It’s Isabel again from the Working Families Party’s Federal Affairs team with one more vital request: Summer Lee’s primary is only three days away. And we’re hosting our last and most important phone bank to turn out voters in her district the night before the election. Our phone banks so far have been a MASSIVE success. This past week, we made more than 15,000 calls to voters, talking about the importance of this election, and the phenomenal work that Summer Lee has done and will continue to do in office. But we’re not done yet. The data shows that the most effective time to talk to voters about the best candidates are in the final 48 hours before election day. And we want to make the most of that window in order to re-elect Summer Lee. Especially with how much money groups like AIPAC and other right-wing billionaires are spending to defeat her and other progressive champions. Thank you, thank you, thank you! body:
We need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter leader in our people-powered movement.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397179/468269378/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFkNmQwNi0zN2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NnmBR1rPTuhBwW0fLkH-mfysUyvFzSTX4wUtwFw9Z5E=&emci=c0b29f03-84fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=b2ad6d06-37ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=43402272) | Peter, With just a few days left until the Pennsylvania primary on April 23rd, we need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter in our people-powered movement — Pittsburgh’s champion, Summer Lee. If you haven’t already seen the news, there are major red flags in this primary that EVERY voter deserves to know about. [_**But before we get into it, will you split a contribution between Becca and Summer Lee today? With endless Republican money stacked against Summer, we need all hands on deck to help her fight back!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397180/468269379/1184186737?&refcode=E8073-20240419-SummerLeeSplit-SL-SplitSend&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFkNmQwNi0zN2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NnmBR1rPTuhBwW0fLkH-mfysUyvFzSTX4wUtwFw9Z5E=) Jeff Yass, PA’s richest Republican and the #1 Republican donor in the entire country, has already spent a whopping $800,000 against Summer. Instead of challenging her policies, these ads lie to voters about Summer’s record and prop up her “Democratic” primary opponent. **Yass has spent more money trying to help Summer’s opponent than her opponent has spent on their own campaign!** Jeff Yass is THE top donor to the Republican Party right now (he’s given $54 million to Republicans this cycle), and he's using his deep pockets to support Summer’s Democratic opponent. This should set off alarms everywhere. ⏰ **Why would a Republican spend so much money to help a Democrat? It’s not support, it’s strategy!** Now more than ever, we have to have Summer's back. clean_body: We need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter leader in our people-powered movement. | | Peter, With just a few days left until the Pennsylvania primary on April 23rd, we need all hands on deck in the fight to re-elect a true progressive fighter in our people-powered movement — Pittsburgh’s champion, Summer Lee. If you haven’t already seen the news, there are major red flags in this primary that EVERY voter deserves to know about. = Jeff Yass, PA’s richest Republican and the #1 Republican donor in the entire country, has already spent a whopping $800,000 against Summer. Instead of challenging her policies, these ads lie to voters about Summer’s record and prop up her “Democratic” primary opponent. Yass has spent more money trying to help Summer’s opponent than her opponent has spent on their own campaign! Jeff Yass is THE top donor to the Republican Party right now (he’s given $54 million to Republicans this cycle), and he's using his deep pockets to support Summer’s Democratic opponent. This should set off alarms everywhere. ⏰ Why would a Republican spend so much money to help a Democrat? It’s not support, it’s strategy! Now more than ever, we have to have Summer's back. We need each and every supporter to rally behind her and help counteract the Republican billionaires trying to play in our primaries. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being there, for believing in Summer, and for fighting for a future where everyone gets a fair shot! name: COURIER
subject: Sponsor a newsroom and support coverage like this
body:
Abortion rights are under attack. Help us get the word out.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397480/468270501/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlhNWViNzQtMzdmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5LGxfT6hBnEGsCm0T8RCj7ts7QLikc2OkRwcZSQRRoc=&emci=c574f434-6efe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=49a5eb74-37ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter,
Trump’s criminal trial is just getting started. Republicans have come up with new ways to attack abortion rights in Arizona and in states across the country. 2024 is set to be one of the most consequential election years ever.
With so much at stake, access to trustworthy local news has never been more important. **This is the moment COURIER was made for.**
Just take a look at how our Arizona newsroom, _The Copper Courier_ , covered Arizona’s reinstatement of a Civil War-era abortion ban earlier this month:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397484/468270511/1184252563?refcode=20240420-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlhNWViNzQtMzdmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5LGxfT6hBnEGsCm0T8RCj7ts7QLikc2OkRwcZSQRRoc=)
_The Copper Courier_ covered the ban when it broke. They detailed how this ban is a giant step backwards. And most importantly, they refused to allow the Republicans who fought for the ban to get off scot-free.
Our 10 battleground newsrooms across the country provide coverage just like this in the communities that need it most. The best part? All of our honest local news is available for free.
[**But in order to keep providing this service, we rely on the generous support of donors like you. That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to participate in our Sponsor A 2024 Battleground Newsroom Project:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397489/468270515/1184252563?refcode=20240420-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlhNWViNzQtMzdmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5LGxfT6hBnEGsCm0T8RCj7ts7QLikc2OkRwcZSQRRoc=)
**You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will support our newsrooms across ten battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, New Hampshire, and Wisconsin. And that’s not all. COURIER plans to open a newsroom in Texas before the 2024 election. ** **We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before April ends, so can we count on you to chip in $10 now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states?** **[Chip in $10 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397491/468270520/1184252563?refcode=20240420-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlhNWViNzQtMzdmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5LGxfT6hBnEGsCm0T8RCj7ts7QLikc2OkRwcZSQRRoc=)**
---
**We’re at a critical turning point in the fight against misinformation, Peter.** Trustworthy local news sources are rapidly disappearing. Media companies are laying off reporters at historic rates. As a result, many communities are relying more and more on right-wing propaganda to get their news.
**COURIER is on the frontlines of protecting access to high quality local news that makes an impact.**
**We protect democracy by publishing factual, left-leaning local news in the online spaces where right-wing lies thrive.** Our newsrooms in 10 battleground states fearlessly call out elected officials and hold them accountable for extreme laws like those in Arizona.
And in order to keep our journalism accessible to the communities who need it most, _none_ of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees. All of our news is free to read in the online spaces where right-wing lies spread.
[**But we can’t do it without you. Our ten battleground newsrooms rely on donations from supporters like you to keep the lights on and the presses running. Can we count on you to give $10 to sponsor one of our newsrooms?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83397494/468270523/1184252563?refcode=20240420-EM-Sponsor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlhNWViNzQtMzdmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5LGxfT6hBnEGsCm0T8RCj7ts7QLikc2OkRwcZSQRRoc=)
Thank you for your continued support,
COURIER team

All of our honest local news is available for free. = You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will support our newsrooms across ten battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, New Hampshire, and Wisconsin. And that’s not all. COURIER plans to open a newsroom in Texas before the 2024 election. We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before April ends, so can we count on you to chip in $10 now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states? = We’re at a critical turning point in the fight against misinformation, Peter. Trustworthy local news sources are rapidly disappearing. Media companies are laying off reporters at historic rates. As a result, many communities are relying more and more on right-wing propaganda to get their news. COURIER is on the frontlines of protecting access to high quality local news that makes an impact. We protect democracy by publishing factual, left-leaning local news in the online spaces where right-wing lies thrive. Our newsrooms in 10 battleground states fearlessly call out elected officials and hold them accountable for extreme laws like those in Arizona. And in order to keep our journalism accessible to the communities who need it most, none of our stories are locked behind paywalls or subscription fees. All of our news is free to read in the online spaces where right-wing lies spread. = Thank you for your continued support, COURIER team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
They want to put President Trump in JAIL | Peter,

_Our country is hanging on by a thread._

Team — today is 4/20, a day that is normally reserved for cannabis users and the industry and also brings with it many conversations about our country's relationship with weed. While the plant is legal to partake in recreationally and medicinally in Illinois, at the federal level, it’s still considered a Schedule I drug, making it illegal for use. Recently the FDA recommended to President Biden to lower the schedule of cannabis to a Schedule III drug, which would acknowledge its medicinal uses as well as its low propensity for addiction. [**We want to know your thoughts here — Do you believe that marijuana’s schedule should be lowered?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83398524/468273372/-21932735?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTRiY2E2YS0zOGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZaaj2x6NLDnbw0oFTaacl2qz336AnD0qMOaaI1hB68=&emci=8bc5e562-d7fd-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=114bca6a-38ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13891387) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83398525/468273373/-21932735?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTRiY2E2YS0zOGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZaaj2x6NLDnbw0oFTaacl2qz336AnD0qMOaaI1hB68=&emci=8bc5e562-d7fd-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=114bca6a-38ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=13891387)

Illinois has seen a 50% increase in tax dollars throughout the state and marijuana sales have increased Illinois’ economy by **$1.5 billion dollars in 2022.** We’ve felt its impacts at the local level too, with nearly $150 million going to support local governments across Illinois.
By lowering marijuana to a Schedule III drug and regulating the industry, we have the chance to boost our economy by BILLIONS of dollars, first/end.
Thanks for your input,

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Ending the War on Drugs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today, we want to recognize and uplift the work needed to end the racist and unjust War on Drugs.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240420-3775-footer&t=1&akid=3775%2E420207%2EtNiSEm)
Today is 4/20, Peter.
While many see this as a day to celebrate legalized recreational and medicinal marijuana — today, we want to recognize and uplift the work needed to end the racist and unjust War on Drugs.
The War on Drugs started over 50 years ago and it is still raging in neighborhoods across the country. And it continues to disproportionately harm Black and Brown communities.
Studies show a Black person is 3.6x more likely to be arrested for marijuana possession than a white person, even though Black and white people use marijuana at similar rates. In just one year, Latinos made up 77% of federal marijuana sentences.
Pramila knows this moment demands action. She successfully pushed the White House to issue pardons for everyone with federal convictions for simple possession of marijuana. And she knows we need to continue pushing to fully deschedule marijuana.
**It will take all of us to end this War on Drugs.** [**If you stand with our movement, please chip in $4.20 to help us build momentum for this fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240420.cgH1RX&refcode=em20240420-3775&t=2&akid=3775%2E420207%2EtNiSEm)
**[Chip in $4.20 ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240420.cgH1RX&refcode=em20240420-3775&t=21&akid=3775%2E420207%2EtNiSEm)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240420-3775-footer&t=22&refcode2=3775_420207_tNiSEm&akid=3775%2E420207%2EtNiSEm)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Will you help me win my race by rushing a $25 campaign contribution? ** Thank you, John James | | Paid for by John James for Michigan John James for Michigan P.O. We don’t need to tell you what day it is, team. Whether you’re blazin’ it or enjoying the free national parks this weekend, April 20 is special to enthusiasts and advocates alike.
While you’re celebrating, it’s important to continue fighting for legalization and expungement so everyone can enjoy 4/20!
Passing the HOPE Act and the MORE Act is a critical step toward ending the pointless War on Drugs. Together, these bills will expunge past nonviolent marijuana convictions and officially decriminalize marijuana at the federal level.
Sounds chill to us.
[Together, we can put an end to outdated, discriminatory policies that have affected millions of Americans. Write to your representative to pass the HOPE Act and the MORE Act now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83399224/468275148/-918552856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk2Mzk4OC0zYWZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jtdIs6b4F67CAFqG_294pxsnCB1YxO-M_s6eJkmL5LY=&emci=e85e48f5-59fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=86963988-3aff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=6787172)

**This is Trump’s worst nightmare:** **IF** we can fund our ads about the dangers of the Electoral College, we can convince states around the country to adopt the popular vote!

**BUT IF** we can’t, the Electoral College could hand Trump another DISASTROUS presidency in November. _**NO!!**_

[**We’re practically begging: We need you to chip in $7 now to help fund our Abolish the Electoral College ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42355?t=7&akid=21302%2E4449941%2E_rYHJL) | [$6,400 GOAL: Chip in $7 now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42355?t=8&akid=21302%2E4449941%2E_rYHJL)
---
* * *
**FACT:** In 2016, Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – _this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!_

**FACT:** In 2020, Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**FACT:** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!**

[**Trump has NEVER won the popular vote. Without the Electoral College, his re-election scheme will be TOTALLY derailed. Chip in $7 to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42355?t=9&akid=21302%2E4449941%2E_rYHJL)

name: John Avlon
subject: Your ideas in action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

When we put out the call for what issues matter most to you, I was blown away with how many of you wrote me back.

These conversations are exactly what we need to be having to win back this district. I’m sure you’ve noticed, like I have, that Nick LaLota (like many of Trump’s MAGA minions) has turned being our Member of Congress into a no-show-job. He seems afraid to do in-person town halls on Long Island to answer your questions. No-show Nick? You and I know that’s a firing offense.

Before I get into the issues, I need your help. We’re building our campaign to win every day – and we’re up against a well-funded MAGA extremist. Can you pitch in to make sure we can take the fight to them? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420

But back to the issues. We’re out here having real conversations about why this fight matters to you. Here’s what you had to say:

63% of you agree that defending our democracy is our highest priority.

What’s the biggest threat? Trump pulling stunts like killing the bipartisan border security bill all for the sake of partisan posturing - while Nick Lalota nodded along and insulted the good faith negotiators. They’re so busy fighting, they’re not fixing anything.

Of course, many of you told me protecting women’s reproductive freedoms and bringing down the daily cost of living here on Long Island were crucial. Many of you told me those were just as important as stopping Trump. I hear you.

I also love reading all your write-in issues. Many of you brought up the need to take action to curb the gun violence epidemic in America. I agree. And I was pleased to read that so many of you called for restoring the SALT deduction to help lower the costs of living while improving everyone’s quality of life. That’s a chief priority for me and one that Democrats can get done in Congress.

It’s clear we have a lot of work to do. When we take back the House, job one is going to be fixing, not fighting. Actually showing up and getting things done. But I can’t do it without you. Can you pitch in and make sure we can win this fight? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420

I’ll report back soon about more of the conversations I’m having on the campaign trail. Stay tuned on my Twitter for some videos too - I’ll get to as many as I can.

Thank you for making your voice heard and fighting the good fight with me.

-John

CONTRIBUTE https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420
PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IS8qlw_Po0mWPR_Ga3fvNQ2?unsubscribedata=%2B5w45%2BtKu%2FVMqyTtU5em%2BgVXe3fwM74GOrmTMjdnrybxXkACif8OYBB5CDDjy%2BPuP%2FSkUtRgW%2FEExhLJXqPlH70y6qjjbr7rZuOnDfLmFaIdzIAgy8YCQnX798F9QkxjvUc5pjqVD6i59mXdivIkVjTKd509zij4lVF5R871CBLtZxoxt4dNEOprA5tzxXg7Df1Lwt9vAeTFzrQdFYd%2BuzMJa4HlQ%2BbTpYjFSkne%2B4gBwyJFliAyC6IRYicRV3Jrz%2FeOmKcBlJqT5NJwyvefxJMfY%2FNjLJTK8oIhEBbYBOXuMmXvhFVJnCFgahykvweUumfJr1Nhz18Yia%2BYdQkEcN7PkqLleLizUFBjjXgJI072SEdPlOQN2BoJD8dh72Jg0JzmGywuhf%2BtxwGQxSf9ScHCb3DVlbcMKop7kyhTKn0FPSgG2sfT98eqasnULCs7 .

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A personal note from me today, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I carried a weapon in Iraq, and I thought I left that behind when my tour was up.
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
I want to take a step back today and zero in on something Kari Lake said earlier this week.
I’m quoting her directly here... she said her supporters need to “strap on a Glock” as they work to take back Arizona’s U.S. Senate seat. A literal call to arms.
It’s disturbing for a number of reasons, not least of which is our history of political violence in Arizona.
I carried a weapon in Iraq to defend my fellow Marines, and I thought I left that behind when my tour was up. But Kari Lake would have us all living under threat of violence from her supporters.
It’s reprehensible. It’s sad. More than anything, it’s dangerous.
I’m going to do whatever I can to defeat Kari Lake, but I’m going to do it the right way — at the ballot box. And I need you with me if I’m going to get the job done.
[**Can I count on your support as we take the fight to Kari Lake and work to win Arizona’s seat in the U.S. Senate? If you’re with me, please chip in whatever you can to my campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1298?c0=ruben-em-apr24.aJkBPb&refcode=em240420-1-160&t=1&akid=2231%2E734936%2EWoIBvq)

name: KristenMcDonaldRivet.com
subject: let us explain what we mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83400042/468277380/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVlYTEwYi0zZGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dk4zJIuSjKvVK4vJI7DMfYl8o5FDm710EZjKm_kE5hU=) As you have heard us say a lot, the race for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District is a “pure tossup.” But we want to take a moment to explain exactly what that means:
1. **This race could very well decide which party controls the House.** The US House has 435 seats, and right now, the GOP has just a 5 seat majority. There are just a handful of seats that will determine which Party controls the Chamber next year, and a top elections forecaster called this seat in Congress “Seat 218” making it THE majority-making seat.
2. **This race will be incredibly expensive.** In 2022, there was $18 million spent in this district alone, and with so much on the line, winning in 2024 will likely be more expensive. With our opponent already pumping $1 million into his campaign and hundred-million-dollar GOP Super PACs calling this seat a “top target,” we need to be ready, and that means building for success NOW.
3. **This race will be close.** A race this competitive will come down to just a handful of votes. And, as KMR likes to say, we will CEDE NO GROUND. We’re going to knock every door, make thousands of phone calls, and share with every single voter Kristen’s vision of progress for our kids and our families. That’s how we will win – but it is neither easy nor cheap.

The stakes in this race are as high as they get. But we know that with your support, we can defy the odds, beat back the flood of outside money, and send Kristen to Congress. **So today we’re asking you:[_if you care about winning back the House and sending a champion for everyday people to Congress, will you donate to Kristen McDonald Rivet’s campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83400044/468277382/1398971698?refcode=email_041924_Tossup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVlYTEwYi0zZGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dk4zJIuSjKvVK4vJI7DMfYl8o5FDm710EZjKm_kE5hU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83400046/468277384/1398971698?refcode=email_041924_Tossup&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVlYTEwYi0zZGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dk4zJIuSjKvVK4vJI7DMfYl8o5FDm710EZjKm_kE5hU=)

name: Team Lanon
subject: Zach Nunn can’t rewrite his anti-choice voting record
body:
IA-03 needs a leader who will fight to protect our care

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83400464/468278666/-1141683812?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JhMjY0ZmItM2VmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5W16492P51BcTdciD4HLmFFceQlyxnqcGMZqsFf7Op4=&emci=3d2a5509-95fe-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=7ba264fb-3eff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=23786099)
---
| | Peter, the Iowa House of Representatives passed a bill this year that could have restricted women’s access to fertility treatments, and potentially eliminated IVF access across Iowa. And despite trying very hard to mislead voters about where he stands, **_during his time in the legislature, Zach Nunn voted for an _identical bill_._ It’s just another example of Zach Nunn’s longstanding and relentless attacks on a woman’s right to decide if, when, and how to start a family.** | [PROTECT REPRODUCTIVE HEALTHCARE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83400465/468278667/-1850653015?&refcode=E8083-20240420-NunnIVF-SB-AbortionReproRights&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyOTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JhMjY0ZmItM2VmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5W16492P51BcTdciD4HLmFFceQlyxnqcGMZqsFf7Op4=)
---
Zach Nunn may be trying to distance himself from supporting bills that could end IVF, but his record speaks for itself:
❌ In 2018, Nunn used his position in the legislature to vote for what was then the nation’s strictest abortion ban.
❌ In 2019, Zach Nunn voted for an extreme bill that could have ended IVF fertility treatments in Iowa.
❌ When running for Congress in 2022, Nunn proudly raised his hand in support of banning abortion with zero exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the woman.
❌ **In Washington, he’s refused to support legislation that would protect fertility treatments, including IVF.**
**Zach Nunn may be trying to rewrite history on his reproductive rights voting record, but the fact is that Nunn has and will continue fighting to restrict abortion access and fertility care.**
[**Peter, with Iowa’s latest abortion ban now law, IA-03 needs a leader who will fight to protect our reproductive healthcare access and get the House the majority it needs to restore _Roe_. name: John Padora
subject: Honoring the lives lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Friends, Today marks 25 years since the tragic Columbine High School shooting, a day that forever changed our nation and left scars on our hearts here in Colorado.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=d39a1d8976444823a83bdb41a20fd6af&_e=-rbyYGTrIlkPpaOB8iIn_Ebzj3VDY6Utiq_kWQzG5UwULCvGp6tXlVtQebF7P1P1KUWJWNAsAP0_KRbSQsabSUP0orSsEv40AeOUZxLvcWF7rqayVsoAwKlf6knbzrYALAprlQDsic1nuSVG8TZhM6k1PuRWqBrbwGfG81N4wYzBEJdv1ZB0wyg5oQI-mQMG0nNOcd8NkFeWefihIkgiBA%3D%3D) Friends, Today marks 25 years since the tragic Columbine High School shooting, a day that forever changed our nation and left scars on our hearts here in Colorado. I’d like everyone to take a moment to remember the lives lost and the families who had their children ripped away from them by this senseless act of violence. I also want this to be a moment for us to renew our commitment to ensuring the safety and well-being of our families and the communities that we love so much. Columbine was not the first mass school shooting this country ever experienced, and it certainly wasn’t the last. Yet in the face of such tragedy, we must come together with resolve and compassion to continue the fight for a better future that we believe exists. We must stand up against gun violence and work tirelessly to prevent these tragedies from happening year after year. Every one of us has a role in creating a safer world for future generations. I would be honored to go to Washington to fight to make children in the Fourth District safer from gun violence than they are today. Let us honor the memory of those lost at Columbine by advocating for sensible gun laws, supporting mental health initiatives, and fostering a culture of kindness and empathy rather than grievance and division. Wishing you all the best, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_s=d39a1d8976444823a83bdb41a20fd6af&_t=_as047vwRgGYmjlJnGydnkLlUHw8vvbot56M0psH-_gUro1XaEapyTBYF72URpXl8pRcYiVvosr5s_j2aKyyEqcaCatRoiq7mdltJ4SEVQw%3D)
---
John Padora , PO Box 116, Severance, CO 80546

clean_body: I need every patriot receiving this message to take action | Friend, I’ve reached out to you MULTIPLE TIMES! My team has texted you FIVE TIMES! We have a MAJOR deadline that could determine the future of our country. Every moment counts, and we CANNOT afford to fall short now! Our mission is to protect our freedoms and uphold our American way of life. But thanks to Joe Biden and his puppet masters, our nation is teetering on the edge of Socialism. I’m humbly asking you, Friend, to stand with us TODAY – not tomorrow, not next week, but RIGHT NOW. | I need every patriot receiving this message to step up and take action before the clock strikes midnight, or else... Liberal forces led by Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Chuck Schumer are prepping for trench warfare and pouring $186 MILLION to secure a Senate Majority. Without a majority, Senate Republicans will be vulnerable and unable to protect our values. Our chances of reclaiming the White House and Senate will plummet, jeopardizing our conservative vision for America. The stakes are high this year, and failure is not an option. Friend,the last supporter I reached out to was able to Would you be willing to make their gift to help us reach our crucial goal? Your support has never been taken for granted, and this ask was made with careful consideration for this make-or-break goal. \- Jim Banks | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90b3be347669468e88c7d6bfafb768c6&_e=I3UncMGMyyWBUYeQgVaj6owDjIq2qpiSNtlizoWKRtNS3FYqqof8eoKhuqYsQIPp9ndM8ACp5NplrC_QDNqwpxK_tO4_DGx2a2qfUNGbm1Tp79fzu9nnUWHGZthy3np77Gapz7RFWt23ATp03haJOn__rSfQR8Su9HQkH3VcenDOC0N55p3PIHCbCprndpaTghCo8rhfA3CxsN4cl9m0Fx1WLpjf_ebge5LVM4j0a3QdlYNyCBVisuUvnV__dpNFBo8xvjPp8fPNArhFaEXROQJ_zjz29Z4Hbp5AKTLftJiYQ_DBqXP3Demat7ajDmAE5qoY0mGXT3ewfXahaUiGp3bTRihWHUV6u_pEaEH4YeSAgDZPKHoVtU14OVvVh9CbgxBSwkxzyzif2B_B_noZ6A%3D%3D)

| | | _**President Trump**_ fought to secure our border.

_**President Trump**_ treated criminals like criminals and stood with law-abiding citizens.

_**President Trump**_ oversaw unprecedented peace throughout the world.

**_And what has Joe Biden done? Made a mess of our country._**
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90b3be347669468e88c7d6bfafb768c6&_e=I3UncMGMyyWBUYeQgVaj6owDjIq2qpiSNtlizoWKRtNS3FYqqof8eoKhuqYsQIPp9ndM8ACp5NplrC_QDNqwpxK_tO4_DGx2a2qfUNGbm1Tp79fzu9nnUWHGZthy3np77Gapz7RFWt23ATp03haJOn__rSfQR8Su9HQkH3VcenDOC0N55p3PIHCbCprndpaTghCo8rhfA3CxsN4cl9m0Fx1WLpjf_ebge5LVM4j0a3QdlYNyCBVisuUvnV__dpNFlF6wkY_rWPFZjsmciQrfvqm9GKEP5rAomXisADFTgoGHTFPficvfA1Kt4GO1t427IP2vyUrm8pG8v-pEI8UQLywwqiOT6P20TStNHDWXSRhHpxctLl1gSNQX74mvJTnDrO3o4qvqnfzsNGZG8SbibQ%3D%3D)
---
| | When anyone asks me why I’m unapologetically pro-Trump, I just tell them to look at his record.

Even during some of America’s toughest times, President Trump got us through it.

Now, he needs his allies in Congress to WIN so he has an A-Team by his side when he takes back the White House.

**[**I have an urgent MAGA request: can you pitch in $10 right now so I can hold onto my seat in Congress and continue to defend President Trump?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=90b3be347669468e88c7d6bfafb768c6&_e=I3UncMGMyyWBUYeQgVaj6owDjIq2qpiSNtlizoWKRtNS3FYqqof8eoKhuqYsQIPp9ndM8ACp5NplrC_QDNqwpxK_tO4_DGx2a2qfUNGbm1Tp79fzu9nnUWHGZthy3np77Gapz7RFWt23ATp03haJOn__rSfQR8Su9HQkH3VcenDOC0N55p3PIHCbCprndpaTghCo8rhfA3CxsN4cl9m0Fx1WLpjf_ebge5LVM4j0a3QdlYNyCBVisuUvnV__dpNF6AleSYoaMzZTl9aHN7VK7RyRDhkWkELnFvIUAIIadl8-GNXLwnBcMtRqZrD9V-HOJVnbLDDj4sEr7D4JB7fC8_URWgtZMvLu-DYO-Ir9nsOKSS_4MEmdyDwz38OTvfNl4q-L_ynB5LBiLKWUXdcWyg%3D%3D)**

I almost passed out when I saw Democrats defending Hamas terrorists over our allies this year.

It’s downright un-American, and it’s something President Trump NEVER would have tolerated.

I’m pro-MAGA because I believe America is good, and we deserve leadership who puts us first.

If you chip in now, you can help President Trump and I rebuild our great country from the ground up.

**[**Every MAGA patriot is counting on you. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Don't miss Kennedy & Shanahan together ONLINE for Earth Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount.

|
---
| | | **[As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount.](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Join **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.** and **Nicole Shanahan** on **April 22** for a virtual **Earth Day panel** where they will share **their vision for healthy people and a healthy planet.** [REGISTER HERE.](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=3)
**Kennedy** has stated that he aspires to be the strongest environmental President since Teddy Roosevelt. He has long been one of the nation’s most influential environmentalists, bringing hundreds of lawsuits against corporate polluters and government agencies.
**Shanahan** is committed to regenerative agriculture and promoting soil health. She is the executive producer of the groundbreaking 2020 film “Kiss the Ground” and the just-released “Common Ground.”
| Date: Monday, April 22nd, 2024
---
Time: 3:00 - 4:15 PM EDT
Location: **Virtual Only**—[Register here](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=4)
Panalists: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., Nicole Shanahan, Vandana Shiva, Charles Eisenstein, Ryland Engelhart
Moderator: Stefanie Spear
Tickets: $24
[RSVP Now >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=5)
[This Earth Day event](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=6) is being held hours before the first night of Passover, both of which celebrate the Earth, its renewal, and the coming of spring.
Kennedy and Shanahan will be joined by food sovereignty advocate and author **Vandana Shiva** , philosopher **Charles Eisenstein** , and co-founder of the non-profit Kiss the Ground **Ryland Engelhart**. EcoWatch founder **Stefanie Spear** will moderate the panel.
**This event is virtual only.** Once you register, **you'll receive a link via email on the day of the event** , granting you access to the virtual event.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/earth-day-virtual-fundraiser?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth_day_4_20_24_rs2_a4&n=7)
See you there!

clean_body: As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount. | | | | | Dear Peter, Join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Nicole Shanahan on April 22 for a virtual Earth Day panel where they will share their vision for healthy people and a healthy planet. Kennedy has stated that he aspires to be the strongest environmental President since Teddy Roosevelt. He has long been one of the nation’s most influential environmentalists, bringing hundreds of lawsuits against corporate polluters and government agencies. Shanahan is committed to regenerative agriculture and promoting soil health. She is the executive producer of the groundbreaking 2020 film “Kiss the Ground” and the just-released “Common Ground.” | Date: Monday, April 22nd, 2024 Time: 3:00 - 4:15 PM EDT Location: Virtual Only— Panalists: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., Nicole Shanahan, Vandana Shiva, Charles Eisenstein, Ryland Engelhart Moderator: Stefanie Spear Tickets: $24 is being held hours before the first night of Passover, both of which celebrate the Earth, its renewal, and the coming of spring. Kennedy and Shanahan will be joined by food sovereignty advocate and author Vandana Shiva , philosopher Charles Eisenstein , and co-founder of the non-profit Kiss the Ground Ryland Engelhart. EcoWatch founder Stefanie Spear will moderate the panel. This event is virtual only. Once you register, you'll receive a link via email on the day of the event , granting you access to the virtual event. See you there! Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Josh Harder
subject: We have a major issue
body:
Speaker Mike Johnson is targeting my seat.

Hey Peter, it’s Josh.
I’m reaching out because we have a major issue.
Speaker Mike Johnson has decided the only way Republicans can stay in control is to beat me and elect my extreme MAGA opponent.
The Speaker flew over 2,378 miles from D.C. to Stockton to hold a fundraiser in my district for my GOP opponent. Then we learned the Speaker gave my opponent a whopping $60,058 check!
I knew this race was going to be tough, but I genuinely am shocked by how invested the Speaker is in this race. He is throwing everything he has at helping my MAGA opponent.
So once again, I look to this grassroots team to help me combat the influx of outside money. The truth is I can’t respond to this massive influx of cash for my opponent by myself.
**Will you please rush in a donation right now? It’s the only way we’re going to be able to combat our opponent’s huge fundraising haul thanks to Speaker Mike Johnson.**
Here is my link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-April2024-FR-April**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83402232/468283862/-1071878601?&refcode=E8059-20240420-MajorIssue-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFkY2Q0MTctNDFmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QupStuAJPc6P4O6OB2auViJ9m81jpRAjSLQTZdBTf_w=)
Thank you for having my back,
Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

So once again, I look to this grassroots team to help me combat the influx of outside money. The truth is I can’t respond to this massive influx of cash for my opponent by myself. Will you please rush in a donation right now? It’s the only way we’re going to be able to combat our opponent’s huge fundraising haul thanks to Speaker Mike Johnson. Here is my link: = Thank you for having my back, Josh Josh Harder for Congress PO Box 4220 Manteca, CA 95337 United States

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_042024_420_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_042024_420_act]
Friend,
Today is 4/20, a holiday dedicated to celebrating marijuana.
Colorado was the first state to legalize marijuana. Now, marijuana recreational use is legal in 24 states. And, seventy-four percent of Americans now live in a state where it is legal for recreational use or medical use.
Yet, tens of thousands of people remain in prison today for cannabis-related offenses.
Drug laws in the United States have historically targeted communities of color, exacerbated inequality, and led to mass incarceration. Despite Black and white individuals using marijuana at similar rates, Black individuals are almost four times as likely to be arrested.
It’s time to change these unjust laws.
Michael has been working to legalize marijuana at the federal level and expunge the convictions of individuals who served federal time for cannabis-related offenses.
This 4/20, will you support legalizing marijuana on a federal level by signing our petition? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_042024_420_act]

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2742%2E552475%2EI7EAVZ)
Hi Peter,
I know you receive a good number of emails, so I’m hoping you take the time to read this one. Pennsylvania is one of the GOP’s top targets to flip this November in their efforts to take back the Senate and the White House.
My opponent, David McCormick, is spending more than seven figures on an ad campaign with the support of billionaires from Wall Street.
Now, our campaign is fighting back with its own ads — showing Pennsylvanians that I am the candidate for working families, seniors, women, people with disabilities, and everyone who needs a fighter in Washington. To get our message out to as many people as possible, we need your help.
[**My team cannot keep these ads running without your support. Will you pitch in $5 or more today to help keep our ads on the air?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240420-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240420-1&refcode2=2742_552475_I7EAVZ&akid=2742%2E552475%2EI7EAVZ)

| Lots to discuss this week! Here’s a quick guide:
---
* NEW: The 611 Project: A Call to Action Against Non-Citizen Voting
* NEW: Breaking news on Konnech, documented by The Federalist
* UPDATE: IV3 - 47 states added and ready to go
* RECAP: DIY Quick Reference Guide Training and Links
* MARK YOUR CALENDARS: More Training, Events, Opportunities

**Let’s GOOOOOO!**
## **The 611 Project - Are Elections As Open As Our Borders?**
We’re excited to share our latest project with you. Titled ‘The 611 Project’, it’s call to action, together with comprehensive research, to empower advocates like you who are grappling with serious uncertainty over non-citizen registrations. [You can check it out here.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hccYBC-FZMF1qzUoe9o7VVlAqJfhzu3U5WQJAJnuM8KHnTudCoqmaUUhqaE7LDVWHfqZh2f4pDbtR1VjpeCfjo1JhhretHT5ITR1CY-U-pL1I/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h2/h001.hXB__8H1xKadgckReZgAMXmaBfOXCrP-tiFcNMQjqGQ)
#### **Call to Action: What Can You Do About Non-Citizen Voting?**
1\. Contact your Sec of State and other elected officials to demand your elections be protected from non-citizen voters. Citizenship verification must be conducted before November. Ask them to publish their process for verification - this should be in the public domain!
2\. Contact your Representatives in Congress. Ask them to issue a public statement confirming they will safeguard our elections by preparing to defend against an Executive Order or any other effort to grant immediate citizenship to a multimillion migrant voting bloc.
3\. Help review and report ineligible voter records with [IV3.us](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V0ErkPeR8pJKYnwS_lLaB_khAIdaJZ7fSSmGC8Vt9nOuO6V2NIQ_ItQxVr84S4amBO9ozIsxViJGjYY9Rs3zsAoPPIW-OxXPN8LrurOX_Oy5c3aatB5rfHNwHj352n-3zR0nnFLehZoRDwk8TgCbZVXNzS0mmrQZBumkfuWITslfd5IA3G_SnTWvBkJlYmaMnqXYDgyhzWeV9XiymLiiJA/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h3/h001.mud-p8xtMsaA28zNPXLDHtm4j0C_56iczaCGv7qmG5E).
4\. Leaving no polling place unmanned. Check [your state info here](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6WslQOS_dvFTVUCyttphx2eqMFGrqEul_JBY9g87xYnG4bpyVi6EvPPoIEYajQ6g6ULZTQ5ne6DT0sS-wGVGaAZEt0WkdBM-k4q5S-v2zFaaE8LCXeTktQld8vL30CtRBqLWiU7mMtQNPN3XscYZATRra2AwMQaftt7CV7to6I3RKYQ2wY0D6dg7Zkn0MxSkiFIS2g7m1YoYrITNnZF2jJrfzR8Fs-mzC9Mv8cYPfhr1/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h4/h001.THPYK5cmAuryKYsjNsu1_1OQIrPFiULTl2q4pGbwQuY) about how to apply for election service with your county, state, or party.
5\. Spread the word! From Scan. Check. Protect., to Voto Honesto, and our toolkits, podcasts, and trainings, you can use all the resources on our website to help strengthen election integrity in your own backyard.
#### **Where did the title** _**The 611 Project**_**originate?**
As you’ll discover in the handbook, _Title 18 of the US Code regarding Voting by Aliens,_[_Section 611_](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4reQG6metMTPwZYb7HrQzwxxNfeZiGfG6EOSX4h6aywV274zgqWut6xBrRwuudBozV-y_mIh2LfQ8qTeEs2GbsNxM5rVclY_6a2YKh2946KdFdc9jJ0YWge8CS_nWXeZ5o4eG0Z5MaDYLFAW532BBVIBlwNmLTc9sMXtWKePdYvpYf6cc31B7vUPDlHm8KtTHmXKsljptT1a4_qXxIaPDIh1igsuW4Rg-a0gIDBB9JL5/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h5/h001.66Ri-AL48CBmYpEJP7ZV0hZhhYe5UXweDWmjtLLmqUY) _Amendment C_ , is an amendment to immigration law that was passed 2000. It introduced, essentially, citizenship as a state of mind (kind of a big deal, as we’ll explain). The past few decades have been chock full of this and other policy changes that you may not have heard much about. Our position is that it all matters - and it’s all setting up for engineered chaos this November. So, we decided to name the project after _Section 611c_ and give it the discussion it deserves in 2024.
_The 611 Project_ handbook is packed with valuable insights, analyses, and actionable strategies. This is a must-have for anyone who’s passionate about safeguarding the sanctity of our electoral process.
* Understanding American Citizenship
* Identifying Non-Citizen Statuses
* Exploring Non-Citizen Voting
* A Timeline of the Border Crisis and its Impact on Elections
* Understanding Motivations
* Solutions and Call to Action

Check out [_The 611 Project_](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hccYBC-FZMF1qzUoe9o7VVlAqJfhzu3U5WQJAJnuM8KHnTudCoqmaUUhqaE7LDVWHfqZh2f4pDbtR1VjpeCfjo1JhhretHT5ITR1CY-U-pL1I/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h6/h001.E0eKfNrjF_Ce3F8_WC6utrqt332OYGGOjsu-q3p6Kic) and make your voice heard!

## **Prosecutor: California DA Dropped Bombshell Election Data Case Because It Might Help Trump**
##### **BY:****[MARGOT CLEVELAND](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6dGsieRKj9joHpTZ2bgyqu1LJjm3zxiCsEO2XZ4DvZo48jBCOpH6edNmhK-djlYc6xjFo4dBWWjOSh24uDG5Ts15_sScH1hFpww6b5bM8l4mAdU8kS3f7vVW2Fjkxhs-N2ycsLq4AtnD7BId1haZ4XcM2UYhbgNQbTFtYZr9fQULvja9VESYqNoOWoiG-Hc4aavjHM40Lc2yjcycFuuC6yge3gVXoGDAenWgLnpMZ4Nq4sk_PbfErq_sf4COmnNqFQ/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h7/h001.Qn74rAut1lsrxlIXXUvzDwyS0w8Z8zSz8okavBylako)****|****APRIL 17, 2024**
"L.A. County District Attorney George Gascon improperly — and for political reasons — dismissed the criminal charges against the CEO of election software services company Konnech, a governmental tort [complaint](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4kjr7yHeFYsH3n0Lg1c2o1XsEoFgViuadnjgXmCoDlD1xcHSOiZlYa6claRzciOKZJRkgPo9G7w2GgspBQ_PJhajGpVHnVvxD8_im2QDqbaAqVYtfhv6XMt1vF-aja9fzK42h1KN9Lrn4CRuOghGpDhGLxg2CwAoH_FQ-kY9jmBeydKymXBp3PinN-JMD0r6Y5yJtjSaxagv5y3vbGAj3v9tILWwgUnLb7AlHXAyEZEeTSvY1CrsXealB6zfawgd-g/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h8/h001.QYOjnt9qREUt1Cst1UQfJfcXnq7qwnrHZzbS5xbkdNU) filed Wednesday by the lead prosecutor on the case claims. That eight-page complaint against Gascon with the county Board of Supervisors further alleges the DA retaliated against his lead prosecutor for opposing the dismissal of the charges — and reveals many more previously unknown and troubling details about the entire case ...”
[Read the full story on The Federalist.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6dGsieRKj9joHpTZ2bgyqu0s9eGvrwWA5G9UPb-f2n3HMFhNl0ek02OWm8pQSn52kmiCXO1HnN412FjxGhdvYk02brsXuiPbkw_DJysXDYYH-f_IADAwaxHuv4nUErAJSicPJzaLjK0_sapxgR420UmE5gBRAp1BmntEe6S3v5eWpbR5vMJa5VzTblr9mZH3OfWufFrn9mQoTeaDOo8Ak3-ByUC8PQXA0xmeuWczYoM9hXh8-qytryrjI77qz6H_1ABThinEFqU5O_p13b6VH1cyF3n3Db9rNgKl7UH3t_d0aldE5SxfPkVfLINGMIJ65Ok2VrltoNyjjqVtVzkeEmUCdWKIA4ZkUcd5v6VY-4v9/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h9/h001.We1e1bhjwzFTAgFyfv6r6v48u9pgfSgQu2lWtSYhj3o)
_For more information on how True the Vote and private citizens came together to expose Konnech, a company that provides elections systems software to many of the largest counties in our country; its incontrovertible creation of open-door systems that send massive amounts of confidential election data and information to China; and its leadership’s work with, and loyalty to, the Chinese Communist Party;_[ click here.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.flIQTCCIxNEqWg_ApxSzTldJLWARe02QMeZiVzZ-4knDnFcjEJA_VC-sHcAtvJMS5kngBSODvpSSKHappews8g2cGI48NEZM05V44Zmysj_Ag4sGv4LnDKQkUnoknbaILwrDHwCYfto4SVJKoXH6XSoQRDB-55WHiZ2H9dMjWMtSHSNGn6keakaxVuZLbHaBzibHbDTt3MM4JttWLFrVFcI-sqOHd_QlGd5KiaKTguO4vMliqN5o_mBi76bz-tz3/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h10/h001.v5itinFIBeGY9DpfLxt671Jj5qFXuwwodq1d0Pv-__A)
|

## **IV3 Update**
On Monday, IV3 officially re-launched to a patiently awaiting team of over 25,000 volunteers. IV3 offers users a powerful toolkit to confirm the accuracy of voter rolls, pinpoint ineligible records, report findings to local authorities, and stay on top of changes in their local voter registries. [Check out IV3 here.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.sV4MFbzBllccGzy2svLCokN9gYO8jdh-gSJJK-hMZ8MuwQarFK8uveiTwuNNpIl1BO0hLCdJFOwl4U61NkEK7JakHP5I8pOzXqkPA7Qry7VnmKJf_tOZk2Wd5EbzjUwD1RVMBdmVhHglJVTpn3aH5pPM-3_W1XXWfHlH9DsnSSP-yLzBq775mGfdBxBpRr0vS3voQC8DfCmdupk7-7UozQ/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h11/h001.pzCoVrIx9RFiifDtIo8WxM_k46LcrLrrvR7su4ldoEE)
If you are already signed up, please check out the updates shown below 👇. If you have not yet signed up,[ please do! ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.sV4MFbzBllccGzy2svLCokN9gYO8jdh-gSJJK-hMZ8MuwQarFK8uveiTwuNNpIl1BO0hLCdJFOwl4U61NkEK7JakHP5I8pOzXqkPA7Qry7VnmKJf_tOZk2Wd5EbzjUwD1RVMBdmVhHglJVTpn3aH5pPM-3_W1XXWfHlH9DsnSSP-yLzBq775mGfdBxBpRr0vS3voQC8DfCmdupk7-7UozQ/45o/ylrRFnW_SR-aRH4WKfY0NA/h12/h001.8oG4hidADDSfDy5NTVQzbwLjuj4Ay02aEk_4_jeqe-o) Our goal is to have volunteers in every county/municipality/village/parish/township in the country, all looking at their local voter rolls. Over 25 million records are likely ineligible on the basis of residency alone. Voters can report local findings to their counties for review. This work is ongoing and time sensitive - **deadline mid-July,** before rolls close to prepare for early voting in the general election. (NOTE: NVRA establishes a 90 day pre-election moratorium on voter record changes. Out of an abundance of caution, we are taking early election into account.)

Here’s a quick guide: NEW: The 611 Project: A Call to Action Against Non-Citizen Voting NEW: Breaking news on Konnech, documented by The Federalist UPDATE: IV3 - 47 states added and ready to go RECAP: DIY Quick Reference Guide Training and Links MARK YOUR CALENDARS: More Training, Events, Opportunities Let’s GOOOOOO! The 611 Project - Are Elections As Open As Our Borders? We’re excited to share our latest project with you. Titled ‘The 611 Project’, it’s call to action, together with comprehensive research, to empower advocates like you who are grappling with serious uncertainty over non-citizen registrations. Call to Action: What Can You Do About Non-Citizen Voting? 1\. Contact your Sec of State and other elected officials to demand your elections be protected from non-citizen voters. Citizenship verification must be conducted before November. Ask them to publish their process for verification - this should be in the public domain! 2\. Contact your Representatives in Congress. Ask them to issue a public statement confirming they will safeguard our elections by preparing to defend against an Executive Order or any other effort to grant immediate citizenship to a multimillion migrant voting bloc. 3\. Help review and report ineligible voter records with . 4\. Leaving no polling place unmanned. Check about how to apply for election service with your county, state, or party. 5\. Spread the word! From Scan. Check. Protect., to Voto Honesto, and our toolkits, podcasts, and trainings, you can use all the resources on our website to help strengthen election integrity in your own backyard. Where did the title The 611 Projectoriginate? As you’ll discover in the handbook, Title 18 of the US Code regarding Voting by Aliens, Amendment C , is an amendment to immigration law that was passed 2000. It introduced, essentially, citizenship as a state of mind (kind of a big deal, as we’ll explain). The past few decades have been chock full of this and other policy changes that you may not have heard much about. Our position is that it all matters - and it’s all setting up for engineered chaos this November. So, we decided to name the project after Section 611c and give it the discussion it deserves in 2024. The 611 Project handbook is packed with valuable insights, analyses, and actionable strategies. This is a must-have for anyone who’s passionate about safeguarding the sanctity of our electoral process. \*\*MEET JIM\*\*

<-Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Hold DNC accountable Alert via Our Revolution
subject: How we influence the DNC platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16908?t=1011?refcode=email-20240420&akid=5839%2E5885482%2EU-rQiQ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, we’re going
to make a lot of noise at the Democratic National Convention in August.

In 2016, Bernie started a movement that we have to keep going — even as
Corporate Democrats and the DNC establishment push back every step of the
way. Because the status quo Democratic Party STILL refuses to ban dark
money from Democratic primaries, reject AIPAC’s influence, act with
urgency on climate change, and put people over corporate profits.

We’re working hard to send progressive delegates to the DNC to get our
demands into the Democratic Party platform — urgent priorities like Peace
in Gaza, desperately needed campaign finance reform, taxing billionaires
like Elon Musk, fighting climate change, reducing the power of
superdelegates and so much more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16908?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240420&akid=5839%2E5885482%2EU-rQiQ ]Can you help us make sure we have the funds to make our DNC demands heard
loud and clear by the entire Party? Donate today to help us send delegates
to the convention and advocate for our progressive priorities.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16908?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240420&akid=5839%2E5885482%2EU-rQiQ ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16908?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240420&akid=5839%2E5885482%2EU-rQiQ ]CHIP IN $27

The core of our message: President Biden and the entire Democratic Party
must listen to progressives and champion policies that help working people
if they want to actually energize and motivate voters to defeat Trump in
November.

Our platform priorities are built around the fundamental ideas of justice,
equality, peace, and the public good, priorities that Corporate Democrats
all too often leave behind.

We need the DNC and President Biden to embrace our fight for a better
society for all. It’s time that our government, and the Democratic Party,
governed for working people instead of billionaires and big corporations.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16908?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240420&akid=5839%2E5885482%2EU-rQiQ ]Donate today to help us make noise at the DNC and ensure the Party

| | **_Peter, we have a five alarm fire in Georgia._**

In 2020, we defeated Donald Trump by the skin of our teeth, carrying Georgia with fewer than 12,000 votes of the 5 MILLION votes cast. **We made Donald Trump and his GOP allies FURIOUS, and ever since then, one thing has been on their minds: Flipping Georgia back to red.**

In 2022, the GOP poured hundreds of millions of dollars into Georgia to elect Herschel Walker, only to be thwarted by our grassroots team.

Now, the GOP apparatus is working overtime to flip Georgia back for Trump. They’re terrified that Georgia might go blue for the fourth year in a row, and they can’t afford to let that happen.

[**_So here’s what we need from you: join our grassroots movement. The only way we stopped Donald Trump and the GOP before was by building a movement the likes of which they had never seen before. We invested in volunteers all across Georgia, and that investment paid off. So please, join our team, rush a donation, and help us keep Georgia blue._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83404712/468290775/710125701?refcode=20240420.1_DPG_4AJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODliYzdkMi00NmZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OsAqo38kgkt1yWmeDYMc4ta9MPl-tn1WzjvT2UPWj0c=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Should anyone be above the law?
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=785cdf7777cd4572b738b0ba5d2fd8f9&_t=DjjrgJFkUxQrF1EiZLHjY25DsqoFFSklOsiK9Xyo0WIl4nfG3oWR65r0CsBUeGgFUSMgYSSUESb9h3ynDVBmGf9PeGs1_8xhxJcG4HgWXzA%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=785cdf7777cd4572b738b0ba5d2fd8f9&_e=Cq7VHCUhmvivkXllBEykgGfd-0A8T36zu3kWFBFAa8vDKRlfQazidWmIV5Oden2oNamnrDgI3WnZ9t8-2YyBePdBmM3l6HU-McLF0EynNIuyzJPg-D_0ADoncvXItM2NYt7I6qXXb01VAiMnMrRNkFZwPHxQi0b4yyfj-qUwEDr897LeT5meQHriESxwCmmH0zIW9OUfIvG3l50J0MAxVcLCa89AYRt5b5lqMTfE7zQP_2he-PsQKSd1DJiocD-optoUrhBtwgMz-83uN5BMvDubu6UEUZ0xYjm9goH0RFBLGRFu5Ipf-Wkhn7Ngagz-axU0hcz8MUkRt8WhkBs61Q7_PJGMaAqlppdGOfkkPLVkirOKVOTvfnJSzSJ5nZqs)
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=785cdf7777cd4572b738b0ba5d2fd8f9&_e=Cq7VHCUhmvivkXllBEykgGfd-0A8T36zu3kWFBFAa8vDKRlfQazidWmIV5Oden2oNamnrDgI3WnZ9t8-2YyBePdBmM3l6HU-McLF0EynNIuyzJPg-D_0ADoncvXItM2NYt7I6qXXb01VAiMnMrRNkFZwPHxQi0b4yyfj-qUwEDr897LeT5meQHriESxwCmmH0zIW9OUfIvG3l50J0MAxVcLCa89AYRt5b5lqMTfE7zQfNT7nCLohGdkjJm6S52INEYmZhFKETtYWrBv7JDcDnBfP-UG8f4BTPlwwwPaeLr0AoY9PEgi1qB7TZI5Gw8W_yngJHixef342s2uhkrX_DtdcSDUHmQD8MWHmosupMNIoTDbuY57Glgxzp2-bA-Qz)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey has only eight questions, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=785cdf7777cd4572b738b0ba5d2fd8f9&_e=Cq7VHCUhmvivkXllBEykgGfd-0A8T36zu3kWFBFAa8vDKRlfQazidWmIV5Oden2oNamnrDgI3WnZ9t8-2YyBePdBmM3l6HU-McLF0EynNIuyzJPg-D_0ADoncvXItM2NYt7I6qXXb01VAiMnMrRNkFZwPHxQi0b4yyfj-qUwEDr897LeT5meQHriESxwCmmH0zIW9OUfIvG3l50J0MAxVcLCa89AYRt5b5lqMTfE7zTn7opWBQeRRgahTkY0LUuWYc-kQEHJPQYYQUJKaGGHTnVSU-3WwjM-TFnhlRmJ9j0ov9mFpa2KljlRmKx5y684KmvHlKjO06nbtJEtSqKX2BbAlSRBFptaqa-DiD7HbLw9nH7fPhfq9ZTtcAj-l6wd)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It only has eight questions and will take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=785cdf7777cd4572b738b0ba5d2fd8f9&_e=Cq7VHCUhmvivkXllBEykgGfd-0A8T36zu3kWFBFAa8vDKRlfQazidWmIV5Oden2oNamnrDgI3WnZ9t8-2YyBePdBmM3l6HU-McLF0EynNIuyzJPg-D_0ADoncvXItM2NYt7I6qXXb01VAiMnMrRNkFZwPHxQi0b4yyfj-qUwEDr897LeT5meQHriESxwCmmH0zIW9OUfIvG3l50J0MAxVcLCa89AYRt5b5lqMTfE7zQa5hOfxG4Bycoxc7zHz2NtX-ch1B8tGSsQafOOkr4bZ_vtTadwcu3OFPns1O-alp_EuTL6V7sUXX0BYDdJap96uvFp8eTWy3twlx-vgjeTLZf5vuFnljkX4uemD84NC-b_x3LOQQKJ1E5Jds4Hu0nY)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
