name: Tina Smith
subject: A time machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team, Republicans are trying to take women’s reproductive rights and put them in a time machine, back to the 1800s. And I’m not exaggerating — let me explain: Earlier this month, the Arizona Supreme Court ruled that a law from **1864** banning abortion can be enforced. For some perspective, Arizona wasn’t even a state back in 1864. It was a territory, and about 900 people voted in their election (all white men, of course). Meanwhile, the GOP policy architects behind Trump’s platform are planning to use the _Comstock Act_ , an outdated law from the **1870s** , to ban abortion outright. By banning the mailing of abortion medications like mifepristone, as well as the medical equipment doctors need to perform abortions, a new Trump administration could legally make abortions _nearly impossible_. **This is scary. In the years since the right-leaning activist Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , we’ve sounded the alarm bells that the anti-abortion movement would continue to come after reproductive rights. And it’s happening.** We need to take swift action to defend abortion access. Because if we leave it up to Trump and the MAGA movement, abortion will be outlawed across the country. **That’s why I’m leading the charge to repeal the _Comstock Act_ — before it’s misused by the GOP to enact a national abortion ban.** **[If you back my efforts to protect abortion access for women nationwide, please add your name in support of repealing the _Comstock Act_. We need all hands on deck to defend reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83405693/468293535/-402979384?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjdhNTk1Ny00OWZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbEbDQWWC4PToYIx8mD0mUg12zwTmqhF3cd3lCc7-pI=&emci=2e7a5957-49ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=2f7a5957-49ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83405694/468293536/-402979384?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjdhNTk1Ny00OWZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbEbDQWWC4PToYIx8mD0mUg12zwTmqhF3cd3lCc7-pI=&emci=2e7a5957-49ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=2f7a5957-49ff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=6227932)
---
Team, we have to defend every inch of reproductive freedom we have left.
We know the Republican playbook — they’ll use every archaic law and judicial maneuver they can to restrict abortions. That’s why we need to step up right now.
Thanks for voicing your support,
Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---

St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: Add your name to support federal legalization of cannabis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
There is no better day than today to speak out about this issue.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240420-1&t=1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
Peter, our co-founder David tweeted this two years ago and it still holds true:
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
[**Agree with David? Add your name now to support legalizing weed everywhere.**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
Ten years ago, Colorado and Washington became the first U.S. states to legalize the use and sale of recreational marijuana. Since then, the prohibition of cannabis has thankfully been reversed in a total of 24 states and the District of Columbia. On top of that, 17 additional states have legalized marijuana for medicinal use.
But at the federal level, marijuana remains a Schedule I drug, like heroin or LSD, meaning possession can carry misdemeanor charges and penalties like jail time.1
[**We believe it is LONG past time for the next generation of leadership to take power and right this wrong, Peter. Do you agree that we need new leaders who will advocate for sensible drug policies? Sign on to our petition now >>>**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
**[Add your name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)**
During his administration, President Biden has rightfully pardoned most federal offenses for simple possession of marijuana. The momentum is on our side – and young progressives are a major part of the coalition fighting for a lasting solution.
**That’s why the work we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve is so important, Peter.**
[**Let’s show the strong cross-generational support for sensible drug policies. Add your name now to support the full legalization of marijuana at the federal level.**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
**[Add your name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/20240420-cannabis-legalization-pt-email/?source=em20240420-1&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)**
Thank you,

Leaders We Deserve
1 - [NBC Washington](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/975?t=2&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240420-1&t=3&refcode2=590_587540_EtWQNg&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=590%2E587540%2EEtWQNg)

Leaders We Deserve

Peter, our co-founder David tweeted this two years ago and it still holds true: Ten years ago, Colorado and Washington became the first U.S. states to legalize the use and sale of recreational marijuana. Since then, the prohibition of cannabis has thankfully been reversed in a total of 24 states and the District of Columbia. On top of that, 17 additional states have legalized marijuana for medicinal use. body:
Your response is crucial for our Q2 strategy
| | |
---
Friend — Debbie here.
I'm in this race because with so much at stake this fall — from abortions to gun safety to democracy itself — Florida deserves better than power-hungry extremists like Rick Scott.
Unlike him, hardworking people like _you_ are at the heart of my campaign. **So as we enter the second quarter of the election year, I __ need to know what's on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and which issues I should focus on the most. **
**_[Will you please share them on my Q2 Strategy Survey tonight? Your insight as a grassroots supporter is key to my success in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83406966/468296748/843202167?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1104-su-nd&refcode=jtk1104-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzYxMzIzMWMtNGRmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zU1LeyfTl_eYzdpGSW3iFXzgGHfmy6ir8jJPRB0FScI=&emci=3eabc291-39fc-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&emdi=3613231c-4dff-ee11-aaf0-7c1e52017038&ceid=3969733)_**

I’ve watched as a loud, angry minority pushed Florida down a path of hatred and division while chipping away at our most precious democratic rights, values, and institutions.
Extremists like Rick Scott and Ron DeSantis are at the center of the GOP's nationwide attack on abortion rights and personal freedoms, programs that level the playing field for the underprivileged, protections from both natural disasters and man-made ones like gun violence, and _anyone_ who dares to disagree with them.
_**Ya no más —** _**enough is enough**. I refuse to stand by and watch any longer. I'm committed to fighting back. _And I know I'm not alone._
**With you alongside me, we can fight back against their extremism and build a kinder, safer, and smarter future for our children together.** **And as we iron out our Q2 campaign strategy, your input is __ uniquely __ valuable. clean_body: Your response is crucial for our Q2 strategy | | | Friend — Debbie here. I'm in this race because with so much at stake this fall — from abortions to gun safety to democracy itself — Florida deserves better than power-hungry extremists like Rick Scott. Unlike him, hardworking people like you are at the heart of my campaign. So as we enter the second quarter of the election year, I need to know what's on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and which issues I should focus on the most. | | I’ve watched as a loud, angry minority pushed Florida down a path of hatred and division while chipping away at our most precious democratic rights, values, and institutions. Extremists like Rick Scott and Ron DeSantis are at the center of the GOP's nationwide attack on abortion rights and personal freedoms, programs that level the playing field for the underprivileged, protections from both natural disasters and man-made ones like gun violence, and anyone who dares to disagree with them. Ya no más — enough is enough. I refuse to stand by and watch any longer. I'm committed to fighting back. And I know I'm not alone. With you alongside me, we can fight back against their extremism and build a kinder, safer, and smarter future for our children together. And as we iron out our Q2 campaign strategy, your input is uniquely valuable. So please, friend: | | I can't do this without you. That’s why we wanted to extend that experience to a lucky supporter like you! When you’re done with your beach day, you’ll get the chance to cool off and enjoy some ice cream with Jill and me.
**So, what do you say? We would love to meet you. Just chip in $25 or any amount below to get your name in the running:**

clean_body: We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone. | | | Peter, today I am so excited to announce my campaign’s new contest. We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone. 😎 🏖️ ☀️ 🍦 Flights and hotel stay are on us. All you need to do is donate for your chance to win. So don’t wait! | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Jill and I have fond memories of taking our kids and grandkids to Rehoboth Beach in Delaware. There’s just no better way to spend a hot summer day than with your toes in the sand, looking out at the ocean. That’s why we wanted to extend that experience to a lucky supporter like you! When you’re done with your beach day, you’ll get the chance to cool off and enjoy some ice cream with Jill and me. So, what do you say? We would love to meet you. Just chip in $25 or any amount below to get your name in the running: Can’t wait to see you there! Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

Putting the people first has always been a driving force during my time in Congress, and it will remain a guiding principle as I endeavor to lead Virginia forward as its next Governor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83407099/468297189/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmMwYTk5OGItNGRmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MCuPaC8H6CSU1RAn4xQEIjhRE3P9q_J4vYpyuOgUks=)

| Peter,

From my first day in office, I’ve been driven to deliver results for our Virginia community and Americans nationwide. I believe a representative must look out for the people they serve, not their stock portfolios.

**While that may seem obvious,_it’s not always clear._**

That’s why I introduced a bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading individual stocks. No one should use their position of leadership to look after their financial portfolios instead of their constituents. The majority of Americans from both parties support my bipartisan, commonsense reform, which continues to grow in popularity.

**Putting the people first has always been a driving force during my time in Congress, and it will remain a guiding principle as I endeavor to lead Virginia forward as its next Governor.[_So, I hope you’ll join my campaign with a contribution today:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83407100/468297190/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmMwYTk5OGItNGRmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-MCuPaC8H6CSU1RAn4xQEIjhRE3P9q_J4vYpyuOgUks=)**

name: VoteVets.org
subject: ☀️ To all VoteVets supporters - please don’t click away 🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there and have made a real difference in people's lives.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It stopped Trump and the MAGA-right, and got huge results in the House and Senate. It got the PACT Act done and forced Tommy Tuberville to back down. Right now, it’s helping us get support for Ukraine when they need it most.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with tensions escalating every day and with Trump ready to tear the Constitution we swore to protect to shreds, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important moment in modern American political history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective ads in politics, ads that make a real difference, seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before our deadline at midnight. clean_body: When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind. Derek - When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind. It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line. Like you, Derek. Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there and have made a real difference in people's lives. It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It stopped Trump and the MAGA-right, and got huge results in the House and Senate. It got the PACT Act done and forced Tommy Tuberville to back down. Right now, it’s helping us get support for Ukraine when they need it most. But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work. Today, we’re asking you to join that select group. Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with tensions escalating every day and with Trump ready to tear the Constitution we swore to protect to shreds, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation. We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important moment in modern American political history — the one we’re in right now. Friend, **Today, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to send $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s government as it commits genocide against Palestinians.** All while many Americans are struggling to afford basic needs like rent and healthcare. This is unacceptable and heartbreaking, and it could escalate a regional war. No U.S. weapons or tax dollars should be used to kill more civilians in the Middle East or anywhere else in the world. **Clearly, we need more people in public office who see our shared humanity and who value all life, no matter faith or ethnicity.** I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to train and support these kinds of candidates, who speak out to save lives and who care deeply about their communities. Who will fight for bold changes to meet their constituents’ urgent needs. [**To help build a government that invests in life rather than death and destruction, please split a donation today between my re-election campaign and my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvah7gV9tKh_n4TF7R2vnpfQ2QCiXu5IyrfIzM-QdIqJUrntu81py2r4ufZIpWOjlpXwt3rXErvigW71hAhFfvnKFiggbRUM4Xq-_gEHCllmSRAgpR5m5WSgiKKpYkksMIPVCiTa2CVDHtDO53IvxeVH1wliUa1QsfGzPw3O9vOHl9AblQ_a-qemVbsFNdlF982qwBk-SjgypvXLr94SIBMHZlgiDs8tajLy6HaxU9LyrbWmpXquvJe03hsTyTPIesWrf5kWYDxwlICFQKiF52sEUr6D0WAAbEdDacPqtQjV-417KjKhgnryCIC8dUqysIMIi6V0s4mo_D7lP2HjOxhTG9hbX0GCbN83a7i2SILxGzefrPwLUB61LHkTN-9rCSZDEPsb1h62YC-KmGK7EVJlm3aLUTVcThloTOUbvGLp70lygNjctce1-BAy3LKPwa-_U79t3cBLeZY6qIx9gCL/45o/SW54VoI-RG-ycXHndKjbuw/h1/h001.sQZ69NelUPDd4Q2873eVEiUb6jh_LNKDxgYhVpdwCSo) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvah7gV9tKh_n4TF7R2vnpfQ2QCiXu5IyrfIzM-QdIqJfOxRYV6ZkFRteypce3wZ4OPoFPZ8Kc8ocYOhGeW7GRUWLLdKoKB0FCuC6B83xU693toHpasj_fZO16a1AW8rv-XzanqYfkcjgCYAehGEr4Gv7R1Iz9QqghBIX2_OFQ6e4Ou2c-y3qraT-L3269-NbC4dcNOWJfKa4UBLgkCIqqwoAfZuRilFiWVT1LIFxjpyvqS8hjws2xvbuuJfYOWTcWE3gWG5dkDUKRGWxrAcWNovTso-Hf8gL04IhByoS4G3tricWxJD5Q7pVyOWDmKO27NpZOnbehdImCEGhC6fvzNpY03O0dkRoZPRGe6NWNn7Fc3pIGDjJzI-Gr0UqBnLXnqPU_TFTBzNBPZUsLc2-2j62uMSEAtqrTFf91R77wZGvF_DHq2CdOotbEpyWUThMP-ZQJ09iUAhdfCFPM3L5zk/45o/SW54VoI-RG-ycXHndKjbuw/h2/h001.zi1y47nVrEX9mQMwawfeTDb19SRMQM7rnXW1rq4j7jU)

Israel’s government is using U.S. weapons and tax dollars to kill Palestinian civilians and to bomb multiple countries in the Middle East.
This violence and dehumanization has very real consequences for people here in the United States, including MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans who are facing bigotry, repression, and violent harassment.
National media and lawmakers have also targeted Arab American communities like Dearborn, which is in my congressional district.
**As a proud and unapologetic Arab American woman serving in Congress, and the Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country, I know how important it is that our federal government represents our community and sees us as human beings.**
That’s why **I just re-introduced a resolution recognizing April as Arab American Heritage Month** , to honor the invaluable contributions Arab Americans have made in the United States.
**I’ve also led efforts in Congress to** **end our federal government’s systemic erasure of MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans.**
Our MENA neighbors have been forced to identify as “white” since 1977, when federal ethnic and racial data standards began. This distortion has hurt our communities and limited federal investment opportunities.
**We had a transformative victory recently: After decades of groups’ advocacy, federal entities will now include a MENA response category whenever collecting demographic data, including on the U.S. Census.**
In addition to demanding an end to this genocide, I will keep pushing to get April permanently designated as Arab American Heritage Month and to ensure that the MENA American community finally receives the recognition and resources they deserve.
We all deserve representatives who see us as full human beings, and who prioritize our needs as constituents rather than spending our tax dollars to commit war crimes.
[**Please chip in today to my re-election campaign and my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, to help build a government where we’re truly represented by our political leaders, who recognize the dignity and humanity of all people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvah7gV9tKh_n4TF7R2vnpfQ2QCiXu5IyrfIzM-QdIqJdqlIV_vVvnOxxGwhFlgeC1tmKYankx-LGwi8eJkp7IFRWNsAeGj-QGg9xJbO0XnBn3lKBLJOzzJjAFkzu7sZn95Gr-EbU3rDg3NEGMNXTKdF9GVeWjwY74UINLVGiQXLM1669tgE4M9ARCcgNH_NHHnyQ7TULz6bCO1BbjpoMJs_vD_B11EZlT7GnF6cd_6t3vQUUCJLGmpALGnU78xd9FRYL8YAD_g04bB07k5Icd4USLtwxpm68MqrjhUUSUkslz3kJdUKa-NdvBRFA_P8FhTOAL0711W5v9NvUFktlot6CfoR4nbdCJdmYlx7Zp_gNimwoyaFjZd0pxck96a5t_mUhkFMu-KIIQnt1E9m1LY5THOJVigmJdfrYrPHMu6z0tbL7hffzMF5d3virXiv_VS_JM1gUhQvsBBdfGsKV_B/45o/SW54VoI-RG-ycXHndKjbuw/h3/h001.mvYyV3oo-ODc3GbFSgAxOtIwkKX5WnfenSV-CArABLQ)

clean_body: We urgently need more lawmakers who will invest in life rather than death and destruction. | | | Friend, Today, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to send $26 billion of our tax dollars to Israel’s government as it commits genocide against Palestinians. All while many Americans are struggling to afford basic needs like rent and healthcare. This is unacceptable and heartbreaking, and it could escalate a regional war. No U.S. weapons or tax dollars should be used to kill more civilians in the Middle East or anywhere else in the world. Clearly, we need more people in public office who see our shared humanity and who value all life, no matter faith or ethnicity. I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to train and support these kinds of candidates, who speak out to save lives and who care deeply about their communities. Who will fight for bold changes to meet their constituents’ urgent needs. | Israel’s government is using U.S. weapons and tax dollars to kill Palestinian civilians and to bomb multiple countries in the Middle East. This violence and dehumanization has very real consequences for people here in the United States, including MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans who are facing bigotry, repression, and violent harassment. National media and lawmakers have also targeted Arab American communities like Dearborn, which is in my congressional district. As a proud and unapologetic Arab American woman serving in Congress, and the Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country, I know how important it is that our federal government represents our community and sees us as human beings. That’s why I just re-introduced a resolution recognizing April as Arab American Heritage Month , to honor the invaluable contributions Arab Americans have made in the United States. I’ve also led efforts in Congress to end our federal government’s systemic erasure of MENA (Middle Eastern and North African) Americans. Our MENA neighbors have been forced to identify as “white” since 1977, when federal ethnic and racial data standards began. This distortion has hurt our communities and limited federal investment opportunities. We had a transformative victory recently: After decades of groups’ advocacy, federal entities will now include a MENA response category whenever collecting demographic data, including on the U.S. Census. In addition to demanding an end to this genocide, I will keep pushing to get April permanently designated as Arab American Heritage Month and to ensure that the MENA American community finally receives the recognition and resources they deserve. We all deserve representatives who see us as full human beings, and who prioritize our needs as constituents rather than spending our tax dollars to commit war crimes. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and her Rooted in Community PAC | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for your support. I’m honored to fight for you, and for all our rights, in Congress. In service and solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: I know what it’s like to improvise.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
I know what it’s like to improvise on a limited budget. I know that many in our district have faced similar challenges.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83408280/468299823/568840269?refcode=BLU_EM_CBC_2024-04-20_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM3YWQxZTEtNTBmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0u3aPKLiUOQ410-WgHPrengTIB-z9Rc2-zoIyJ_Z5NI=)
---
| Peter,

My roots in Northern Michigan go five generations back.

I was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. I played basketball and volleyball and ran track before graduating as Valedictorian from Cheboygan Area High School.

After Matt, my husband, enlisted in the Marines, we moved five times in 15 years, all while raising two girls and caring for Matt after his tours overseas. My journey to now was propelled by the lack of support for active military members and veterans amidst rising costs of housing, groceries, education, and gas.

I know what it’s like to improvise on a limited budget. I know that many in our district have faced similar challenges.

So, when our representatives turn a blind eye to working and middle-class families all for corporate special interests, I listen. And I take action.

[_**Peter, I need your help to get me to Congress. Will you contribute $10 or whatever you can to my campaign right now so we have the resources to reach out to every voter in our district?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83408281/468299824/-1887195573?refcode=BLU_EM_CBC_2024-04-20_2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM3YWQxZTEtNTBmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0u3aPKLiUOQ410-WgHPrengTIB-z9Rc2-zoIyJ_Z5NI=)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: what we're up against, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm facing my toughest reelection yet in the race experts say could decide Senate control. Here's where things stand:
**_To begin with_** – my official GOP opponent, Bernie Moreno, is ultrawealthy. He self-funded his primary campaign and spent more than $4 million of his personal fortune to try to buy this seat.

**_Then_** – Donald Trump enthusiastically endorsed Moreno and held a massive rally for him in Ohio – and Moreno threw a lavish fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago to win the support of Trump's MAGA megadonors.

**_Today_** – We're falling short of our critical daily fundraising goal. We're behind where we need to be to compete with Moreno's millions, just as polls show us neck and neck.

**_What's next_** – We need a surge of support to close our fundraising gap immediately. That's where you come in, friend. If you join the thousands of grassroots folks who've already given this week, we'll be on track to meet our critical goal and have the resources it takes to fight back and win.
[**So I'm personally asking, friend, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to help us reach our fundraising goal, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83408275/468299789/-1982132473?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3725-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTNhNmM5YS01MGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaAaZeQnYldCayv-W16cgYBCWgQfNEGvsOyQj5e1LW8=)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: How To Activate Angels In Your Life
body:
Activating Angels Tomorrow at Sheridan.Church, I will be preaching out of our verse-by-verse series through the Book of Acts. We have reached Acts 1
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4149.1.a001361cd44a93eba63305694d2369d8) |
---
## Activating Angels
---
Tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4150.1.a054debb26502499d13deffd9d133a0b), I will be preaching out of our _verse-by-verse_ series through the **Book of Acts**. We have reached **Acts 12** , where an Angel helps break the chains off Peter and lead him out of prison. Angels are still helping to break chains today! BUT HOW? We will talk about what the Bible says in regards to Angels, their role in our lives and how they are dispatched to help us. You can join me in-person in **Tulsa/OKC** or [online](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4151.1.00f7737e72431fa1512cfbb4f624b129). **Tulsa** | 10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
**OKC** | 6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK Online: [www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4152.1.0ca9dfc105a1bb430d6b2b0e9217419b) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4153.1.c56f2d5ecca35ede45a70340376200eb)

---
One of my goals at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4155.1.0512e13f3c44e075b95d04bd96732a99) is to bring in speakers that are addressing issues we face in our nation. We have been blessed to host: [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4156.1.611b28156afa2b9c01c9fea1f782b058), **Perry Stone** , [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4157.1.aab729288dc576d08602942b77645ce7), **Rodney Howard-Browne** , [Darry Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4158.1.812f658ea4bb36d078b33cfc2d3014d4), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4159.1.8f5ced2538e230a3ec58afc83f038c4b), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4160.1.4d6858269c43fefa33c26ea7de3eec6a), **David Barton** and others in the past. I am excited to announce that [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4161.1.a3d078d4d9bf8e0b3ba8fbf2b877e2ab) will be joining us on Friday, July 26 to address one of the most crucial battles we have right now that centers upon _gender_. Other Upcoming Speakers: -**General Michael Flynn** : Monday, May 20
-**Tim Tebow** : Friday, June 28 RSVP - [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4162.1.275f748870059ff1b0057f4dd7261696) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4163.1.3fa18f8946cda88222dab3579aa77f88), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4164.1.adb5fbf4ac4c357e95f7b77c3eeaedd6), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4165.1.d6c69779f29e07ce86cec0640f919d10), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4166.1.9e625a4358db781a4e3ff3174ec4641d), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4167.1.edff4fadc41ad3ddaea476cacbfdc11e), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4168.1.19654ecf7ca14ecc2f93cf5379bbfbc4)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4169.1.2b517c80352792d7d43138e7c2c24582)

## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4177.1.28247edbc3594d9de0a57b9f22717341), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4178.1.a71517e68632e5c171d98671e2fe944a) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4179.1.f5134cf9247bdb7cd7c07c3a009b0494). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4180.1.08ae1d3ad2dcc9ae6e4cff526717c2e1): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4181.1.7d8b224145fdc1aa5b5c797aaed247b1) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4182.1.6445c9d9ad1ec9789943d5ba0ea2a2df) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4183.1.3f837696e801ad2eeadd43132a1a2c61)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4184.1.58b3db752654c037dd66e032b55e566a) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4185.1.be3cb596754ea4973554fa4b946452e8) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4186.1.0694b349d700b63fb559eebb18264bb4) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4187.1.945f8232f4dce3ecab7afe7518cbac60) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9285145.4188.1.3f86f2a418c84bcfad4b5a65d8431bdb)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Red State’s Pension Funds Used To Push Anti-Oil Shareholder Proposals, Report Finds
body:
Trump Train News

Red State’s Pension Funds Used To Push Anti-Oil Shareholder Proposals,
Report Finds
https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ahdp8mvv7bthls3264nb3jrinh2kctkh060aoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t1e9qnbc3he9q39ctjmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9gmf831cuh60pt2ekojb9jhegonadjlk1qj7djkmuprb8pleeojctd5epqj2dd1euqq0tbme2qq8ctheiqqfd5hmmj71d1iekobfcdh6kp7b83ieuo7fdjk66r7b8jl61rr4sblkcqb7c9meuh238h1e8he4937chj66pb7cdg62oh5u

https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrlf6qnbac3qltqlk96f2bjv0ekdsmijs9u15690_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t1e9qnbc3he9q39ctjmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9gmf831cuh60pt2ekojb9jhegonadjlk1qj7djkmuprb8pleeojctd5epqj2dd1euqq0tbme2qq8ctheiqqfd5hmmj71d1iekobfcdh6kp7b83ieuo7fdjk66r7b8jl61rr4sblkcqb7c9meuh238h1e8he4937chj66pb7cdg62oh5u

Louisianans’ pension funds have frequently been used to advance
climate-related proposals within publicly traded companies, according

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Eric Hovde and Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek — Eric
Hovde has spent weeks plastering the airwaves to sell himself to Wisconsin
voters. But this week, he revealed his true colors:

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2247?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240420_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwinsplit_TeamBaldwin_NA_mmfr.1.2&t=1001&akid=6693%2E1827488%2EEKhKWG ][IMG]
Tammy’s Republican opponent proudly took the stage at Donald Trump’s MAGA
rally this week in Green Bay. A rally where Trump doubled down on his
false claims that he won Wisconsin in 2020 (he didn’t) and peddled
dangerous conspiracy theories.

Trump gave his “complete and total endorsement” to Eric Hovde, empowering
him to “Go out and win.” Then Trump attacked Tammy from the stage.

Hovde and his allies have already spent nearly $5 million to defeat Tammy.
Their spending is quickly closing the gap in this race with a recent poll
showing Hovde surging to within the polling margin of error.

Donald Trump’s endorsement is sure to give Hovde a major boost from his
national network of right-wing donors, so we need to fight back ASAP.

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Derek, can you chip in $4.20 to help elect Adam to the Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6278%2E5257348%2E9QBELw)
Hey Derek —
If you haven’t checked the calendar yet, it’s April 20.
It’s a day that activists and legislators nationwide use to raise awareness about the unjust nature of our nation’s controlled substances policy toward cannabis.
For years, Adam has supported House legislation like the _MORE Act_ to end the federal prohibition on cannabis, remove it from the list of banned controlled substances, and begin to rectify the decades of failed policies that have derailed the lives of far too many Americans.
**Republicans have blocked it each time — including abusing the Senate filibuster to block it from even coming up for a vote after Democrats passed it in the House.**
Last December, President Biden pardoned every American convicted of marijuana possession — an important step towards nationwide decriminalization, which will help reduce barriers to employment, housing, and education.
But we must go further.
Cannabis reform is a bipartisan issue with widespread support among the majority of Americans. It’s already legal for adult use in 24 states, including California. The legal cannabis industry generated $33 billion in sales last year, creating tax revenue used to support public goods like roads and schools.
Enough is enough. Convictions for minor, nonviolent offenses have destroyed lives, torn apart families, and led to the disproportionate incarceration of people of color.
It’s time for Washington to get with the times and remove cannabis from the federal list of controlled substances. It’s time to make our justice system fairer and begin to rectify the damage of the most destructive elements of the War on Drugs.
**Adam will fight to decriminalize cannabis nationwide, including by abolishing the filibuster if necessary. First, we need to win this race, elect Democratic majorities, and defeat Trump.**
**[Will you contribute $4.20 or more today to help Adam fight for a fairer justice system with the Democratic majorities we need to get this done?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4098?c0=apr2024_abs_em.Vd4rI1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6278%2E5257348%2E9QBELw)**

# Quitting Is Not An Option!!!
### Christian Values in America
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/redirect/dc5d9eb1-cb52-40e0-b964-aef64e954073?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

With our Christian values in America at stake, quitting and giving up should never even be considered options, especially when it comes to standing firm in our beliefs as Christians. name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: ICYMI: Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom Speaks on Alaska’s Safety, Security, and Prosperity in Address to AKGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancyforalaska/ak-al-moves-towards-republicans-after-lt-governor-nancy-dahlstroms-entrance-into-the-race-10305385?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=1adc1edc31&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)

**ICYMI: Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom Speaks on Alaska’s Safety, Security, and Prosperity in Address to AKGOP**
**Anchorage, AK** \- Last night, Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom served as the keynote speaker at the Alaska Republican Convention. In her speech, she highlighted her plan to ensure Alaska’s safety, security, and prosperity for years to come. Dahlstrom also laid out why she is uniquely qualified to win and serve Alaska diligently in Washington.
Prior to her speech, Speaker Mike Johnson, Leader Steve Scalise, and Chairwoman Elise Stefanik introduced the Lt. Governor and laid out why they believe she is the best candidate to help win a Republican majority.
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=d3c623dbdc&e=a20d8ad2ed)
Speaker Johnson stated, **“Winning Alaska is our top priority - and the person to flip this seat is Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom. Nancy is the type of conservative fighter who can take on and take out your extreme Congresswoman.”**
Leader Scalise added, **“We need fighters in Washington who understand what is at stake for our country. Our safety, security, and prosperity are all at risk this cycle as we seek to elect President Trump and grow our Republican House Majority.”**
Chairwoman Stefanik finished saying, **“When I met Nancy, she made it clear that Alaska comes before all else. That is the type of honorable leadership we need more of. Nancy knows what it will take to protect our border, secure our elections, and unleash America's - and Alaska’s - potential.”**
Dahlstrom is facing off against Democrat Mary Peltola, who has endorsed President Biden even after he has shut down critical infrastructure and energy projects in Alaska. Peltola has also remained silent on Iran’s invasion of Israel.
# # #
|
---
| | | | [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=a47bcf8a46&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=364641c97a&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=2ed4c77105&e=a20d8ad2ed)

You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. clean_body: | | | | | Fellow American, It's official. We are through game one of the double header. The voters have spoken, and they chose me to be the Republican candidate for Senate in California. That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his ActBlue allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. There's no time to lose. With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it's so important we win this election. The reality is present-day America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. You and I must win this race. | | Sincerely, | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: Kevin Dellicker
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
We are down to the final weekend before the Primary Election |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=922fcf0bb7&e=1090c5c412)
---
| Dear Friend,

As we are in the final weekend before Primary Election Day, I want to send out a heartfelt _**THANK YOU**_ for all of your support!

Since I announced my campaign for Congress last summer, we have been out in the 7th Congressional District meeting with voters and learning what is on their minds.

Our country is headed in the wrong direction. We are losing our way of life to progressives and career politicians. I love my country and community too much to stand by and let that happen.

**Will you join me in the fight to Keep America Free?**

_There's still time to get involved as a volunteer._ We are looking for a few more volunteers to greet voters at the polls on Election Day, April 23rd. Polls are open from 7am - 8pm. Any time you can give is appreciated.
---
| [VOLUNTEER](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20help%20Kevin%20Dellicker%20at%20the%20Polls%20on%20Election%20Day! "VOLUNTEER")
---
| Every dollar raised is going to help us spread our message. Would you chip in and make a contribution - $5, $25, $100?
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=27ea5f80d5&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| Again, thank you for putting your trust in me. I will continue to fight every day to Keep America Free!

**Get out and vote on Tuesday, April 23!** If you have a mail in ballot, it must be returned to your County Board of Elections by 8:00 PM on April 23.
---
| Thank you and God Bless.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=a3ef1cf79b&e=1090c5c412)._

Neither military information nor photographs of Kevin in uniform imply endorsement of Kevin Dellicker for Congress by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

| In this momentous year marking the 60th anniversary of Freedom Summer, I am thrilled to extend a special invitation to join us at **Marquita 's Democracy Sneaker Ball**. This unique gathering is not only a celebration of our vibrant community but also a recommitment to the powerful ideals of democracy and equality that define our ongoing civil rights journey. Event Details:
* Date: April 20, 2024
* Time: 6 PM to 8 PM
* Location: Urevbu Contemporary, 410 S. Main St, Memphis, TN 38103
* Featuring: An enchanting performance by Michaelyn Oby

[In 1964, Freedom Summer emerged as a pivotal moment in our nation's history, spearheaded by courageous figures like Michael Schwerner, Andrew Goodman, and James Chaney, who sacrificed immensely to secure voting rights for African Americans. As we gather for an evening of culinary delights and soul-stirring music, we draw inspiration from their bravery and the ongoing efforts to ensure every American's right to vote remains unchallenged.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmJCk7UioAs8WM-Yp_OLIw-exQl-PS8PS8iH9aAukLAmNFSWlzJOFIAgTbqtBOX32Q1MxfhKk5LcUQqCVe-sFzXMcJvDtz_WgBRZveEGM6BR-jca38hYLbgfDeoL6rQ0cIIn32YJH4NVQrV-1NswWIdw1t1u9EW4LTNNEXx29hRY2nk2pr5cojH9WpkWxkwSdeTstNMa-u0TetQjlkbdl_-ReQUf8bnSFaQWFZRqcoenqgv_t_S93vSgJSmda5up69gc8-leQ6JYMUPd5-gbEkTrl5X9AVUxBzeDk-18KjVre0vl-LWNX_Rep0FyTvuGtHEFKkX8g3exTxB8vO-rQPwueA2cHUj_RXAuaxr7xOHvJJeZRKQKZZdV6alSpn1vClwpDB) Today, while we celebrate economic strides and societal advances, we also face daunting challenges such as restrictive voting laws that threaten to silence the voices of seniors, veterans, and minority communities in Tennessee. These issues remind us that our fight for equitable democracy is far from over. [Marquita's Democracy Sneaker Ball isn't just an event; it's a statement of our collective resolve to continue fighting for a future where economic opportunity knows no boundaries, healthcare is universally accessible, and our environmental well-being is secured. This evening promises to be more than just a celebration; it's a pledge towards a brighter, inclusive future where every vote counts and every voice is heard.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmJCk7XgvqQZ7VZ4dOdK-LC1Gpj2IuZmBB7zWVABKAwu6cUq9xoOUdgjy_QR6URL3LdK_IyezwTL75Nun0UruRVQLnWnbngjWzGVUFmN3v9485rgl157i2xxTFJiPiaCZwHQ-LFWScCMbvXrDJnXQhD0YTw7jXHPq2qe3PumYlH7ZZvXCbAHMhxrSCsYGzxLvJekoB_I1XhOMGf7GYoH5AQXRXjTHe3XvcSNqeq5piq-KW610-uUcHGfGU7HWSyIRU7Tb2ggsXCZVBrITJnwIa2hFSCufSRmVJjw16rk724fPUjQMw-TMGkmAfcZXz2sffLKJ9Ugr0U-mTzrJz54iSYe8heXYfx9tD2N-Lw8-9FAMDcA79WZdbxTxQZrAHe7NWOvsb) Join us as we lay the foundation for an inclusive economy and a healthier, more equitable state. Your participation symbolizes our shared journey towards a future where democracy thrives through active engagement and unity. This event will serve as a tapestry of music, art, and shared dreams, highlighting our united stand for progress and the sanctity of the vote.

clean_body: A special invitation to join us at Marquita's Democracy Sneaker Ball... | | | | | | = | Rekindling the Spirit of Freedom Summer at Marquita 's Democracy Sneaker Ball = | Peter | In this momentous year marking the 60th anniversary of Freedom Summer, I am thrilled to extend a special invitation to join us at Marquita 's Democracy Sneaker Ball. This unique gathering is not only a celebration of our vibrant community but also a recommitment to the powerful ideals of democracy and equality that define our ongoing civil rights journey. Event Details: Date: April 20, 2024 Time: 6 PM to 8 PM Location: Urevbu Contemporary, 410 S. Main St, Memphis, TN 38103 Featuring: An enchanting performance by Michaelyn Oby Today, while we celebrate economic strides and societal advances, we also face daunting challenges such as restrictive voting laws that threaten to silence the voices of seniors, veterans, and minority communities in Tennessee. These issues remind us that our fight for equitable democracy is far from over. Join us as we lay the foundation for an inclusive economy and a healthier, more equitable state. Your participation symbolizes our shared journey towards a future where democracy thrives through active engagement and unity. This event will serve as a tapestry of music, art, and shared dreams, highlighting our united stand for progress and the sanctity of the vote. | | | | | | | Need Further Information? Feel free to contact us at 901-304-7297 for any inquiries. We're eager to assist! Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, let's seize this moment to celebrate the pillars of democracy, style, and active community involvement. We eagerly anticipate welcoming you, as we stand united in our vision for progress. With warmest regards =, Marquita | | Marquita BradshawCandidate for United States Senate | | | == | == | == | = | == | == | == | Paid for by Marquita Bradshaw for US Senate.Marquita Bradshaw for U S Senate | | 1498 Union #901 Memphis, TN 38104 , United States | | You can or all you want, but you'll always be in our heart.

[](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=f7fa972465&e=869bcf0641)

Forget the typical birthday loot—this year, we're fundraising for our shared belief in democracy and everything this campaign represents! Join us for a night of fun, fervor, friends, and philanthropy. [RSVP now and be ready to party with purpose!](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=43d4c0fec9&e=869bcf0641)

## State Policy Update
---
| [ ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=39d0182838&e=869bcf0641)
---
### Coal Bailouts, Fracked Parks, & Solar Bans
In Ohio, recent environmental policies have raised concerns, especially with the approval of fracking in state parks and wildlife areas, which began after House Bill 507. This legislation mandates state agencies to permit fracking on public lands, including state parks and wildlife areas, leading to significant environmental and public health debates. Furthermore, Ohio's energy policies have subsidized aging coal and nuclear plants while imposing restrictions on renewable energy development, thus hindering progress toward a cleaner energy future. [Read full article here.](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=b3c4b11b0d&e=869bcf0641)
|
---
| [ ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=49bd08b441&e=869bcf0641)
---
### Some Hope for Trans Youth
A County Court of Common Pleas in Ohio has issued a temporary injunction against House Bill 68, which sought to ban gender-affirming care for transgender youth. This decision highlights the ongoing national debate and legal challenges surrounding transgender healthcare rights. [For more details, please refer to the full article here.](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=b3bbfd3cf1&e=869bcf0641)
|
---
|
## Campaign Update
---
| [ ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=2a66cc1f4d&e=869bcf0641)
---
### On to November!!
Thank you all for casting your votes this past March. With your steadfast support, we are energized and ready to advance to the November elections. Together, we will continue championing progressive policies for a just, sustainable future for all Ohioans. [Join us at our May 8th Fundraiser for Tristan's Birthday to celebrate! ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=f03df14b9e&e=869bcf0641)

name: Mike Lawler
subject: Peace through strength - an American Leadership Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
We cannot let China, Russia, and Iran win.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/support-our-allies?amount=1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pcoin_lawler_support-allies)
---
| | It’s time for an honest conversation, Peter. Do you support our American Leadership Agenda? I just voted in favor of supporting our allies, because like President Ronald Reagan, I believe in peace through strength. Our allies like Israel and Ukraine need help to stand up to enemies like Iran, Communist China, and Vladimir Putin. _**_My position is simple: We cannot allow our enemies to take one inch._**_ While some on the far-left, including Mondaire Jones’s best friends AOC, Rashida Tlaib, and Ilhan Omar, voted against funding for Israel, I just voted to give Israel over $26 billion so our ally can defend itself. At the same time, the House passed two of my bills which will stop Joe Biden from letting Iran continue to trade oil unabated. Since Biden took office, over 88 BILLION DOLLARS have flowed into Iranian coffers. _I will not stand by and allow Iran to continue to expand their nuclear and drone programs with funding from their oil trade._ It’s a fact that Iranians use the money China gives them for their oil to support _Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis_ , and to attack Israel. I think that’s totally unacceptable - and that we need to stand up to our enemies. We cannot let our enemies win. [**_Add your name in favor of our American Leadership Agenda and pledge your support TODAY. >>_**](https://links.lawler4congress.com/els/v2/4r_~S4YXk7QY/U25URWlYYlZTRFpFdE0rYXJLSGtrdnowUGl6MW1rMUR3MUpLeDN2OHVWYmF4cFJ5NG5nWUwvOVhuN2owSEsyTkFraXlWWCtFaDlvbmtHVGVZQTE2MG56Y3IySHdlem92VFNQUkNFRmtqRDA9S0/)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ) Dear Friend,

When I founded Project Veritas, I only wanted to work as an investigative journalist and expose the truth.

I focused on that for years, with little resources to pay for the tremendous cost of equipment and travel. I put most of my expenses on credit cards without knowing whether or not the public would ever support me.

Tens of thousands of Americans supported Project Veritas, and the organization grew and became a powerhouse to be feared by the corrupt.

I never imagined that it would be nearly destroyed from the inside, and in my worst nightmares, I never thought the hand-picked board I put in place to run the organization I founded would oust me and drive it into near non-existence.

But it got worse. They sued me with ridiculous claims, and I fought, spending enormous amounts of money on attorneys to defend myself.

Today, **[I have to ask for your help to keep fighting](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ)****.**

My attorney received a settlement offer from Project Veritas. The rules won't let me tell you about what exactly they asked for, but believe me, it's unaffordable and unconscionable.

That will not be happening, not out of pride, but out of my adherence to the truth.

No one wants to see their child on life support. Project Veritas was that to me, and as I work to build my new organization, O'Keefe Media Group, I have no competitive streak that wants Veritas to fail.

America needs MORE truthtellers, not less, and despite PV's board ousting me, I prayed for their success.

Truth is my passion. It's rooted in PV's name . . . "Veritas," which is Latin for "truth."

There are no vendetta's here. I want to focus on my overwhelming work at OMG and leave Project Veritas to do the work I hope they will. But to move on, I have to keep fighting this lawsuit imposed on me, **[and I could use your help to do that](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ).**

**[Will you donate to Liberty Guard](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ)** , the organization managing my defense fund, to help me raise $22,000 to replenish my defense fund?

**[Any amount you can contribute is greatly appreciated](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ)** and will help cover the cost of litigation.

Thank you so much for your support over the years. **[Please help me honestly put this chapter behind me](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ)** so I can focus on serving you with my reporting.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8z72OnDAQB_CnGTqQGRuzKSiSEFKlvGujwR6zzmJMbKOIt49Ap2v_85svCvvq3TlA_w0Qn95mQAT5FRCPIt_p7e1XOuu_-KP-2b3jchXxOyCWc-dP-TGk4UB-vdJ-rOygkFpnKh7avpVaaSV09RxEq5GdeXSzdQ9pBbImoaUUbd8hEld-QIFKKBQouha_NA_Tz2RIslGtkWoGJe5FjUvM5em3FydLfj0bE0O1Ds9S9nwfNgFOmc2RuKGNbSyXAJxWP3MqZ70clCzgFMNSm7g5ztnHrQ5zfTOQ01HC7xyPZBjk-IcC5zq-mB3XVAqZF6C-SGDrjwByvPruxFDYyS8byDHMH1nhdBlXbAuoKcRjKyBH7Ko02P2fX1efdQ9KLPd7Job_AQAA__-MwIKJ)

clean_body: Did you see George’s message? | | Peter, we’ll be quick. We just want to make sure you caught George’s message from yesterday. June 25th is fast approaching , and we’re doing whatever it takes to secure victory in this critical primary. Your support has been crucial to George’s success as a public servant throughout the past three decades. Now, he’s counting on you to help us take his career to the next level and continue delivering real results for the people of this community. With your help, we can raise the $170,000 we need in the next 65 days to maximize voter outreach and spread George’s message to every corner of this district. = | = — Team Latimer \--- Forwarded message from George --- Peter, it’s George Latimer. Our primary election here in NY-16 is less than 70 days away , and I need your help. I'm not going to sugarcoat it — we’re in the final stretch, and time is running out. So my team has set a huge fundraising goal for the next 67 days: $170,000. Your support is absolutely crucial to the success of this campaign. It’s what has allowed me to make incredible progress for the people of NY-16 over the last three decades, and it’s what will determine every move I make in the halls of Congress. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Throughout this campaign and my career as a public servant for the people of this community, my message has been clear and consistent: It’s time to deliver real results for NY-16 — not just rhetoric. It’s time for someone like me who puts public service first to represent New York’s 16th. But it’s going to be a tough fight, and we need your support to win. Believe me when I say that your donation could be the difference between achieving concrete progress for this district or another two years of overpromising and underdelivering. = = — George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Columbine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Trigger warning: This email contains mention of gun violence.

Team,

Today marks 25 years since the Columbine High School shooting.

A quarter-century has passed since the massacre, yet our communities continue to face the threat of gun violence. From Columbine to Littleton to the Aurora theater, Colorado’s 6th District knows this pain far too well.

But this issue isn’t unique to only Colorado: gun violence is the leading cause of death among children and teens across America.

It’s wrong. We cannot continue on this path.

I invited Heather Martin to the State of the Union this year to elevate the issue of gun violence.

Heather was a Senior at Littleton’s Columbine High School when two students opened fire on April 20, 1999, killing 13, physically injuring 21 others, and leaving many marked for life in the deadliest school shooting in US history at the time. While Heather survived physically unharmed, she faced challenges completing her college education in the years following due to the lasting trauma.

Ten years later, Heather earned her Bachelor’s degree in English and today serves as an Aurora Public Schools educator. Heather and a group of Columbine survivors founded The Rebels Project in the wake of the Aurora theater shooting.

These survivors wanted to offer their support to the Aurora community after they experienced similar trauma. Since then, they’ve helped offer a safe environment for survivors of mass tragedy and trauma.

https://www.therebelsproject.org/ [https://www.therebelsproject.org/]

Today, on the 25th anniversary of the Columbine shooting, I hope you’ll donate to The Rebels Project. Your gift can help survivors of mass tragedies like Columbine receive the resources and support they need to heal. [https://www.therebelsproject.org/]

DONATE NOW [https://www.therebelsproject.org/]

I am in awe of the work Coloradans like Heather do to support our Colorado community members. The fight isn’t over, and I’ll continue working to legislate and bring an end to the gun violence epidemic.

Thank you,

— Jason Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: River Gassen
subject: Remembering Columbine
body:
The tragedy of Columbine cast a large shadow over the many students who were there or grew up in its aftermath. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cea178540953/remembering-columbine?e=3818d77efc)
---
|
---
[](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=e6e8b224f1&e=3818d77efc)
|
---
## Remembering Columbine

"Twenty-five years ago, the fear of gun violence entered every American schoolhouse — and it's been there ever since," said John Feinblatt, president of Everytown for Gun Safety.
The tragedy of Columbine cast a large shadow over the many students who were there or grew up in its aftermath. My family lived right down the street from Columbine. It would have been my neighborhood school, but my mother chose to send me to Arapahoe High School. She tried to shield me from that deep scar that the community still feels today. She could not have known that decision would put me on the path to becoming a gun violence survivor.
Arapahoe High School, Virginia Tech, Sandy Hook, Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, Robb Elementary School, Uvalde, and many more schools have heard Columbine's echoes. Despite the repeated tragedies, gun violence continues to spread across the country. Gun violence is now the #1 cause of death for children. We face a crisis of character when our leadership refuses to stand against gun violence.
I am proud to be a [**Mom's Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate**](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=ae6bfedc54&e=3818d77efc). I am working to bring this trauma to bear in Congress and to work to save lives from further gun violence.Columbine was the start of a more significant problem, but we work to honor all the lives lost and put an end to gun violence.
River
|
---
[Donate Today](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=26487672dd&e=3818d77efc)

Our society has moved from slavery to Jim Crow to mass incarceration, and the prohibition of marijuana has been used to imprison an unprecedented number of Black and Brown Americans.
**David proudly supported the Marijuana Opportunity Reinvestment and Expungement (MORE) Act** when it came to the House floor for a vote last session and as co-chair of the Second Chance Task Force in Congress, **he has led on legislation – including the Fresh Start and Clean Slate Acts** – to seal or expunge eligible arrest records and allow individuals who have served their time move forward in life.
In the Senate, David will lead the charge for advocating for the legalization and reclassification of cannabis as well as funding expungement programs that will reduce our prison population and give more people a second chance.
**[Can you chip in $4.20 or any amount to ensure Marylanders have a fighter for marijuana legalization in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83414218/468310261/1122037525?&amount=4.20&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.20_B2_Cannabis_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMyMGVhNy02MGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b95367c2COzlv64uYKRZqjbcXU2eL94_rMUsWHs697g=)**

| Peter,

In just a moment, I’ll be asking you to [**split $3 between Mark Takano and our campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83414226/468310271/432447563?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240420_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzMyMGVhNy02MGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y033vmdYYvhvQ-HrIpbRiuBOYsBr2S_4nIYd1o4PcsQ=) to power us to flip CA-41. But first, I want to share a few important takeaways from the March primary that highlight our momentum headed into the November election.

**After combing through the results, we learned that our race in CA-41 saw higher voter turnout than anywhere else in Riverside County. Our district also saw more total Democratic votes than any other red to blue seat in California. That’s a big deal for a statewide, low-turnout election.**

The good news doesn’t stop there, Peter. The _Cook Political Report_ reaffirmed their classification of our race as a “toss-up,” and _Punchbowl News_ is calling this the _**second most important race**_ in the entire country for control of the House.

We’re wasting no time getting ready for the General Election. That means continuing to mobilize Democrats and making sure every undecided voter hears what’s at stake this election. But in a district as large as ours, these efforts can get expensive fast, which is why I’m reaching out for your support today:

[**We’re quickly approaching our next fundraising deadline, but pacing just behind where we should be in order to meet our fundraising goal. Will you split $3 between Mark Takano and our campaign to help us stay on track? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83414227/468310272/432447563?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240420_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzMyMGVhNy02MGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y033vmdYYvhvQ-HrIpbRiuBOYsBr2S_4nIYd1o4PcsQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83414233/468310278/432447563?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20240420_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzMyMGVhNy02MGZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y033vmdYYvhvQ-HrIpbRiuBOYsBr2S_4nIYd1o4PcsQ=)

**If we want to catapult Democrats across the finish line in states like Michigan and Pennsylvania, we’re going to need all hands on deck. We’re relying on this grassroots team to help our party stay on track to elect Democrats through reliable, dedicated support.**

name: Dave
subject: Serial Killer-Hunting Sheriff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
body:
I’ve stood up to kidnappers, human traffickers, and serial killers. Crime was down. Under Bob Ferguson, it’s grown out of control.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bcd2982d7398470493ce9207c1285787&_e=dUHd8fk-YsnvePId4unZ0odr034LaCUwAPAUu9SDQ8Ku9f_hKqG0unYFpbO3kZXo3kpwqT4ByQyYQO7OkgpNqikjo0oSDQOaufMlkUCpvLO_jMxVxvUIPBndnW3PR_yVrMzrh7IMYhh0r4st3EAhfeUDocvvR3RZnZjTVonck1mZfh5JB4Z5X_jwCHwg38E_PZoB4OiXltp1u73D4P_dzedQn09LtpFwij9K-bDEZT8y0-9ks-mcTax-1qREp-1xIZBc2f1vnX_ci3QV1Q4ixJdoWxSnSsz2mAIBiQLlrpJXmhBkIjWqleWJvdYKfSgaHjXaqejFYBS7wa6iSB8qEiZTmABhbA3kkS9eQGhQAlonFJLR21WpWGSxIuAIXKZZaLxotO2JR7EP4Pr4jBcKDJYPcc_2PWRoHFivjitzt93nnITBLtDp5DLT8d2vBZEZ)
---
Friend, as Sheriff I defended Washington from criminals. Now, with Bob Ferguson, crime is growing out of control.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bcd2982d7398470493ce9207c1285787&_e=dUHd8fk-YsnvePId4unZ0odr034LaCUwAPAUu9SDQ8Ku9f_hKqG0unYFpbO3kZXo3kpwqT4ByQyYQO7OkgpNqikjo0oSDQOaufMlkUCpvLO_jMxVxvUIPBndnW3PR_yVrMzrh7IMYhh0r4st3EAhfeUDocvvR3RZnZjTVonck1mZfh5JB4Z5X_jwCHwg38E_PZoB4OiXltp1u73D4P_dzedQn09LtpFwij9K-bDEZT94VfVG8xnNitjzsP1Hc_2yTZBnUaph99HdYfjbcH5yWfTLCpPzkH3nlS90O6aHAk-O9vc_Rr_7OPQ9vlvUp9yoBQ5AVvaqWl7bMYtsXRlqF4SQEdSdXQ11mVme3dXAJvppnoSFIu9KSqUGZUKvWnBXqexY2WQnRragWzm0Z_CsohL1XA8pKpEW1LLJgksvwdM%3D)
I’ve spent my life protecting citizens and enforcing the law. WA needs to restore the rule of law and hold people accountable for their actions.

| [**$25 TO RESTORE THE RULE OF LAW**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bcd2982d7398470493ce9207c1285787&_e=dUHd8fk-YsnvePId4unZ0odr034LaCUwAPAUu9SDQ8Ku9f_hKqG0unYFpbO3kZXo3kpwqT4ByQyYQO7OkgpNqikjo0oSDQOaufMlkUCpvLO_jMxVxvUIPBndnW3PR_yVrMzrh7IMYhh0r4st3EAhfeUDocvvR3RZnZjTVonck1mZfh5JB4Z5X_jwCHwg38E_PZoB4OiXltp1u73D4P_dzedQn09LtpFwij9K-bDEZT-kHOke9Ka7klbL-aLbItD81noPf-xGMgl8Wx4i3uWMT5XnKyc_REEEpSLiDfEjoJ0qDoyVNgSRsnxw44_UC1wSymGiFoilNApe0q_hM27MqM1blHfdfmqwhhAUUDFCeqanbGhN7HT2Sum34VVV5s3EePnS_qMUtBUvSnuDKwGlOpRYZGCRongIPY6weMHMGNu1REQZIVJFYNr5AWksBhyk)
---
[**$25 TO DEFEND WA FROM CRIME**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bcd2982d7398470493ce9207c1285787&_e=dUHd8fk-YsnvePId4unZ0odr034LaCUwAPAUu9SDQ8Ku9f_hKqG0unYFpbO3kZXo3kpwqT4ByQyYQO7OkgpNqikjo0oSDQOaufMlkUCpvLO_jMxVxvUIPBndnW3PR_yVrMzrh7IMYhh0r4st3EAhfeUDocvvR3RZnZjTVonck1mZfh5JB4Z5X_jwCHwg38E_PZoB4OiXltp1u73D4P_dzedQn09LtpFwij9K-bDEZT8y0-9ks-mcTax-1qREp-1xIZBc2f1vnX_ci3QV1Q4ixI-j6TIrx3i3ygIUf0JwaKDYbv6YqV9K5GKqjPciDRxyPpB161EcaLQiIxvwopGsW9_S4k012NOqcTo166-8EyOPWCdaD7nfUmsinkI0kos_w9bpH5ncSDXw13Sb-ORTFcInCxztDerPFNMf53lRClpoXqSR-O13peGZCp1yDVZy)
---

I’ve arrested rioters, rapists, and mass murderers. I’ve locked up human traffickers who preyed on women and children. On my watch, crime was down. We enforced the law, and everyone was accountable.

**Bob Ferguson is letting WA crumble under crime.**
Washingtonians deserve to feel safe in their homes and communities. I know how to handle crime and the rule of law. **I’m ready to take on the responsibilities of Governor and fix what’s broken.** **[I can’t do this without your help.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bcd2982d7398470493ce9207c1285787&_e=dUHd8fk-YsnvePId4unZ0odr034LaCUwAPAUu9SDQ8Ku9f_hKqG0unYFpbO3kZXo3kpwqT4ByQyYQO7OkgpNqikjo0oSDQOaufMlkUCpvLO_jMxVxvUIPBndnW3PR_yVrMzrh7IMYhh0r4st3EAhfeUDocvvR3RZnZjTVonck1mZfh5JB4Z5X_jwCHwg38E_PZoB4OiXltp1u73D4P_dzedQn09LtpFwij9K-bDEZT8y0-9ks-mcTax-1qREp-1xIZBc2f1vnX_ci3QV1Q4ixFVCJ9xJwEx2Ozgfau0e8vPjCTxBQhj8eMJRjILwJVYylrpBTtSbh-O6l4gtq-xPhfQSz4uGTXlyeOsMUq8xtK-PCKoekuilluWcojnjruuSd9aUTHtBtVDDRbrmlVq9UDnwxcyDTqKELgQMROQnTOY21NWt9ospX7LR-GQk0D1r)**

**We can’t let Bob tear down our Great State - as a former Sheriff, I’m ready to tackle crime and get criminals off the streets.**

clean_body: I’ve stood up to kidnappers, human traffickers, and serial killers. Crime was down. Under Bob Ferguson, it’s grown out of control. | Friend, as Sheriff I defended Washington from criminals. Now, with Bob Ferguson, crime is growing out of control. I’ve spent my life protecting citizens and enforcing the law. WA needs to restore the rule of law and hold people accountable for their actions. | I’ve arrested rioters, rapists, and mass murderers. I’ve locked up human traffickers who preyed on women and children. On my watch, crime was down. We enforced the law, and everyone was accountable. Bob Ferguson is letting WA crumble under crime. Washingtonians deserve to feel safe in their homes and communities. I know how to handle crime and the rule of law. I’m ready to take on the responsibilities of Governor and fix what’s broken. We can’t let Bob tear down our Great State - as a former Sheriff, I’m ready to tackle crime and get criminals off the streets. The time for change is now, don’t miss your chance to make a difference. Dave Dave Reichert is Running to Change what's wrong, Fix what's broken, and Do what's right. Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R) P.O.
