body:
Let’s be clear–we need to hold IN-01 in order to flip the House.

|
---
Peter, here’s what you need to know: Frank is fighting everyday for the folks here in Northwest Indiana. **He’s a tireless advocate for bringing jobs and more economic opportunities to our communities, and dark-money groups and National Republicans are doing everything possible to defeat him.** Let’s be clear–we need to hold IN-01 in order to flip the House. The GOP-controlled House has done absolutely nothing for working families, which is why the only way to make progress is to flip it back in November. By re-electing Frank and flipping the House, we can finally break through the extremism that has plagued Washington for far too long. **Frank has the grassroots momentum necessary for a successful re-election, but we need to keep this energy up all the way through November. ** [**Can we count on you to split a donation between Frank and the Indiana Democratic Party to help Frank and other Indiana Dems win this election cycle?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83415459/468312462/-969499340?refcode=240420know&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODhiM2NiOC02M2ZmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC03YzFlNTIwMTcwMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rD_RfaMATlrHOpHyveHyyRzIoy159AxWDYCkHqtyP-4=)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I wouldn’t be emailing if I didn’t think it would make a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240420-2?refcode=em20240420-2&refcode2=2744_552475_D4yGTN&akid=2744%2E552475%2ED4yGTN)
Peter --
Look, I don’t expect everyone to contribute each time we send one of these emails. But the truth is we’re a little bit behind on the fundraising targets we need to hit to win this election.
We have to catch up. Fast. But I’m about to say something that would make my finance director’s head spin -- **the amount you give doesn’t matter to me.** Here’s why:
I’m proud to run this campaign _the right way_ -- with over 500,000 individual contributions from folks like you powering everything we do.
My opponent has the backing of shady billionaires and Mitch McConnell himself. Outside groups are flooding Montana with over **$50,000,000** in TV ads to try and defeat me.
I won’t lie, that’s a lot of cash. And it’s concerning -- especially if we don’t have the resources to fight back. But I’d bet on this grassroots team any day of the week.
$10 here and $25 there might not seem like a lot, Peter, but I promise it adds up. I wouldn’t be emailing you if your support didn’t make a difference.
[**So what do you think? Can you split a donation today (of any amount) between my campaign and Bob Casey to help us catch up on our goals and build the kind of grassroots campaign that can take on dark money and win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240420-2?refcode=em20240420-2&refcode2=2744_552475_D4yGTN&akid=2744%2E552475%2ED4yGTN)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240420-2?refcode=em20240420-2&refcode2=2744_552475_D4yGTN&akid=2744%2E552475%2ED4yGTN)**
Thanks for everything. I mean it.
-- Jon

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2744%2E552475%2ED4yGTN)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2744%2E552475%2ED4yGTN)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

| | Hi Peter, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update:

**A brand new poll shows that my Senate race in Wisconsin is TIED 50-50.**

My megamillionaire Republican opponent is gaining ground in Wisconsin _— and fast._

First, he plastered Wisconsin’s airwaves with more than $4 million worth of ads. Then, the Republican primary field cleared for Hovde, giving him more than 7 uninterrupted months to campaign against me. **Now, the latest polling has us tied.**

Republicans are going all in to flip this seat red, and we can’t expect him to let up. Eric Hovde has pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me, _and he’s on pace to spend even more than that._

Look, unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign. I don’t have right-wing dark money groups or GOP megadonors who can spend a fortune to tilt the scales in my favor.

Instead, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back. We need your help to reach undecided voters, keep our ads on the air, and make sure Hovde’s attacks don’t go unanswered.

[**_Will you split a donation between the GA Dems and my campaign today to help me win this 50-50 Senate race? name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My toughest fight yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
The GOP is zeroing in on Nevada. |
---
Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.

**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate _will_ flip red.**

I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.

**We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least _$30,000_ by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short.**

clean_body: The GOP is zeroing in on Nevada. | Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically. I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate will flip red. I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap. We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least $30,000 by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thank you for doing your part to help defend Nevada and the Senate. – Jacky Rosen ******** ****** ****** ****** ****** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jon Tester
subject: They’ll spend and say anything to defeat me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2463%2E35263%2EI4tiJE)
Peter, I see it happen all the time. A lot of campaigns and politicians waste your money when you contribute to them. Not us. When you pitch into this campaign, we immediately use that investment to fight back against a mountain of super PAC attacks headed my way, and organize and turn out Montanans. **I don’t take a single dollar for granted. I still get my flattop haircut at my local barbershop—and all it costs me is $12, including tip!** [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240420_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2463%2E35263%2EI4tiJE) My finance team just told me that we’re running short of our fundraising goal, and that can make a huge difference in whether or not we have what it takes to win. These super PACs are ramping up their plans for Montana. **They’ll spend upwards of $50 million to try and change me into something I’m not with misleading attacks.** We need your help to gather the resources to fight back. **[Peter, they’ll spend and say anything to defeat me. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Who will protect your rights?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
RFK Jr. is ready to win the White House, protect our privacy, and heal America!

|
---
| | | | **[RFK Jr. is ready to win the White House, protect our privacy, and heal America!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fisa_4_20_24_nd1&n=1)
**

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fisa_4_20_24_nd1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The right to privacy was a core principle of our Founding Fathers, and shadowy surveillance programs should not be monitoring Americans without a warrant!
But this is exactly what’s happening under the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), _which was just extended two years with the support of both parties._
Enacted after 9/11, the law allows alphabet intelligence agencies—the FBI, CIA, and NSA—to collect phone calls, texts, emails, and other communications from non-Americans outside of the United States.
Unfortunately, despite clear mandates, intelligence agencies are still conducting backdoor searches to review communications __from Americans__ , in clear violation of the 4th Amendment.
Hundreds of thousands of violations have been documented with little or no recourse.
Former President Donald Trump was apparently lobbying on his social media platform to end FISA. But the truth is, Trump shamefully reauthorized the program during his administration.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fisa_4_20_24_nd1&n=3)
Donald Trump failed to protect our privacy and caved to the Deep State, _when it mattered the most_.
This should remind you that there's little difference between the two parties, especially when protecting your privacy. _It's time for a change_ , which is why more than 52% of Americans now consider themselves independent voters!
As President, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will reform America's intelligence services to protect our Constitutional rights.
RFK Jr. is ready to win the White House, protect our privacy, and heal America! [A gift of $100, $200, $500, or more will ensure that RFK Jr. is on the ballot in all 50 states, including yours.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fisa_4_20_24_nd1&n=4)

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: FL Senate Race Update - Read ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, I’m at a loss for words.

There is no way around this.

[**My ultra-liberal opponent outraised me in Q1 of 2024.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e735cb3f63cf4aa9bd35b3e93c141ecc&_e=FeNw2__BP0spgTIdxb5s2PGKYKZKxX4-C_nP602Eib_N18GvJzF0u08dba4XHc_gkTM2euOd0d6MhXcxYzaF6MzL8Iq6VPss0SInba5PE1OQG2vXWE0FWd1KnJxLqTaZcwJozbAelgbFRxP10GMjtQtS2l2lp2jztQZ8-QifckYU1M5flxFrMc-wuBVUqUrFIuXXtpeefV8omeyZfC8aDrhbJBFUearKigI3uGGv3pA3FfFxkAX-7OExD8kKvdVRjFGA5Vb-TXm5delbaxK-KzKeqF-mjQfBR9JfgcRZ27P1kXPtjyCbjVuiYH1O3x30lyRg1jtiUHdkRJnpRq-r7sRLv95olzWatmJU75Wu81YsCsjdCgKifeWTDmPlLm6f)
This will give her the upper hand to spread lies about our campaign, and who knows what else.

With so much money pouring in from out-of-state liberals, this race is going to be expensive, and we need to catch up.

**[I promise I wouldn’t be bothering you if I had any other option, but I’m relying on my grassroots team more than ever.](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e735cb3f63cf4aa9bd35b3e93c141ecc&_e=FeNw2__BP0spgTIdxb5s2PGKYKZKxX4-C_nP602Eib_N18GvJzF0u08dba4XHc_gkTM2euOd0d6MhXcxYzaF6MzL8Iq6VPss0SInba5PE1OQG2vXWE0FWd1KnJxLqTaZcwJozbAelgbFRxP10GMjtQtS2l2lp2jztQZ8-QifckYU1M5flxFrMc-wuBVUqUrFIuXXtpeefV8omeyZfC8aDrhbJBFUearKigI3uGGv3pAICJkpPMFGgxm8Oh8DRsWnpPk2b_UzlQXyHRfBW7eCpkox54-tpCDa81QESI5kL29_llWymHTYw9aC-mkwEi9nntLgY94rpgUKd__irIjhHdVTDcF1nsdeNwV9ODAdzSfYgSjVDXTsyiGr3JjJL-dn)**

---
[**SUPPORT RICK SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e735cb3f63cf4aa9bd35b3e93c141ecc&_e=FeNw2__BP0spgTIdxb5s2PGKYKZKxX4-C_nP602Eib_N18GvJzF0u08dba4XHc_gkTM2euOd0d6MhXcxYzaF6MzL8Iq6VPss0SInba5PE1OQG2vXWE0FWd1KnJxLqTaZcwJozbAelgbFRxP10GMjtQtS2l2lp2jztQZ8-QifckYU1M5flxFrMc-wuBVUqUrFIuXXtpeefV8omeyZfC8aDrhbJBFUearKigI3uGGv3pD8fVh9RGVrD59o-Ew4Hm0EHRfLdz3Yoru6Y2CXj2k0p6k0A9nA9OTo6K4XHAAS2MP59itC03e87lqS8EUn7Cm95OhHNwOPR7vfeyEC5xb8B7hAjPbjW6aAn0IJH2IwV3ufM5Q04_jehDIM8GKbj3J3)
---
We can’t afford to fall behind right now, especially with Election Day getting closer and closer.

clean_body: Will you submit your response now? Friend: We selected 10 people to represent 37087 in our latest poll about President Biden, and one of the only responses we’re missing is yours. We still want to hear from you, but we can only extend your deadline to respond until midnight tonight. Will you submit your response now? What grade would you give President Biden? | | | | | | | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Presidential Polling Date: Fri, Apr 19, 2024 Subject: You're 1 of 10 Dems selected to respond: Republicans are trying to diminish all of President Biden's accomplishments for American families | | | Friend, with the 2024 election on the horizon, Republicans are working hard to diminish President Biden’s accomplishments and prevent him from winning in November. He can only fight back and continue delivering for working families if folks like you stand with him. That’s why you’re one of 10 Democrats from 37087 that we selected to take part in our exclusive live poll – but we're still missing your response. So please, tell us now: Poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight Top Democrats like you know that the president has made real progress for American families. Here are just some of the things he’s accomplished: REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS: He signed executive orders protecting abortion rights from the GOP's attacks. CLIMATE ACTION: He enacted the most ambitious climate action agenda in American history. GUN SAFETY: He signed the first major gun safety bill in 30 years. HEALTH CARE: He lowered seniors’ health care expenses and capped insulin costs for millions. JOBS: He helped create millions of new, good-paying jobs under his leadership. | Republicans are doing everything they can to damage President Biden's reputation and undermine his agenda. And polls now show him neck and neck with Trump. That's why we're looking for 10 Democrats from 37087 to confirm where you stand at this critical point in the election year. But with time running out before the midnight deadline, we’re still missing your response. So please tell us now: | | | | | | | | *

Let’s be clear: The War on Drugs has not made our communities safer. Instead, people of color are arrested for cannabis possession at disproportionate rates and taxpayer money is wasted on incarceration for nonviolent cannabis-related convictions. **If we legalize cannabis on the federal level, we will create new economic opportunities and get one step closer to ending the failed War on Drugs.** New Mexico has already started seeing the benefits of legal cannabis on the economy‚ seeing record recreational and medical sales of more than $52 million last month. Overall, the state’s thriving industry has hit over $1 billion in sales. **[Martin is committed to helping legalize cannabis for medical and responsible recreational use in the U.S., but he’s counting on your support to stay in the Senate to get it done. name: Harry Dunn
subject: I want to talk about something serious for a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
FACT: Black men are criminalized FOUR times as often than white men, despite consuming the same amount of marijuana. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83419177/468316994/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.20_B2_Black-Men_U2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjdiNzNhOGItNmNmZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtN2MxZTUyMDE3MDM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w0SLRYZRbGkaZRESbQ_07Y0B-DdDI_TlyjJCIUrSgUU=)
---
Hey y'all, I know today is a fun day for those who partake... 😂 👀

But I wanted to talk about something serious – being Black.

Being Black in this country comes with some extra safety precautions.

Don't walk too fast at night and make sure your hood is down. Keep your hands in sight at the gas station so they don't think you're stealing. Don't get caught with a little bit of marijuana, because you'll go to jail for decades.

_That's an all too familiar outcome for Black people, especially Black men in this country._

**FACT:** Black men are criminalized FOUR times as often than white men, despite consuming the same amount of marijuana

There's legislation in Congress that will decriminalize marijuana federally and you can count on me supporting that, because being Black isn't a crime.

[**_But getting to Congress is going to take everything this grassroots team has. My election is less than 4 weeks away and I'm being outspent on air. I'm determined to fight for Black Americans in Congress, that's why I need to ask you to rush a few dollars to our campaign. clean_body: FACT: Black men are criminalized FOUR times as often than white men, despite consuming the same amount of marijuana. | = Hey y'all, I know today is a fun day for those who partake... 😂 👀 But I wanted to talk about something serious – being Black. Being Black in this country comes with some extra safety precautions. Don't walk too fast at night and make sure your hood is down. Keep your hands in sight at the gas station so they don't think you're stealing. Don't get caught with a little bit of marijuana, because you'll go to jail for decades. That's an all too familiar outcome for Black people, especially Black men in this country. FACT: Black men are criminalized FOUR times as often than white men, despite consuming the same amount of marijuana There's legislation in Congress that will decriminalize marijuana federally and you can count on me supporting that, because being Black isn't a crime. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Be safe, Harry Dunn = = | = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

clean_body: | = Hey folks, It’s Susan Wild here, Congresswoman from Pennsylvania’s Seventh Congressional District. I won’t sugarcoat it: as we approach the 2024 Election this fall, all eyes are on my district. FIRST: National experts rated my district, PA-07, a TOSS-UP district for 2024. THEN: The NRCC officially named me as a top target to unseat and replace with another rubber stamp for their extremist agenda. NOW: I’m worried. Republicans know that defeating me is their best chance at holding onto their House majority, and they’re willing to pull out all the stops to do it. = | = In 2022, my race came down toJUST 2% , and this year, we’re estimating an even closer race. My race was the most expensive in the state last cycle, and we know this year won’t be any different. The NRCC and their dark money groups will spend big on attack ads lying about my record in an attempt to protect their slim majority. That’s why I need your help. We must protect vulnerable seats like mine if we want to take back the House and keep me in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Susan Wild and NewDems will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Susan Wild (PA-07) | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus.
